description: HSK-graded reading passages with comprehension questions

passages.title: Self Introduction
passages.text_zh: 你好！我叫小明。我是中国人，今年二十岁。我是大学生。我喜欢看书，也喜欢喝茶。我家在北京。我有一个姐姐，她是老师。
passages.text_pinyin: Nǐ hǎo! Wǒ jiào Xiǎomíng. Wǒ shì Zhōngguó rén, jīnnián èrshí suì. Wǒ shì dàxuéshēng. Wǒ xǐhuan kàn shū, yě xǐhuan hē chá. Wǒ jiā zài Běijīng. Wǒ yǒu yí gè jiějie, tā shì lǎoshī.
passages.text_en: Hello! My name is Xiaoming. I'm Chinese, twenty years old this year. I'm a university student. I like reading books and drinking tea. My home is in Beijing. I have an older sister; she's a teacher.

questions.q_zh: 小明今年多大？
questions.q_en: How old is Xiaoming?
questions.answer: 二十岁

questions.q_zh: 小明的姐姐做什么工作？
questions.q_en: What does Xiaoming's sister do?
questions.answer: 老师

passages.title: Today's Weather
passages.text_zh: 今天天气很好，不冷也不热。我和朋友去公园了。公园里有很多人。有的人在跑步，有的人在看书。我们坐下来喝了一杯水。
passages.text_pinyin: Jīntiān tiānqì hěn hǎo, bù lěng yě bú rè. Wǒ hé péngyou qù gōngyuán le. Gōngyuán lǐ yǒu hěn duō rén. Yǒude rén zài pǎobù, yǒude rén zài kàn shū. Wǒmen zuòxiàlái hēle yì bēi shuǐ.
passages.text_en: The weather is nice today, neither cold nor hot. I went to the park with a friend. There are many people in the park. Some people are running, some are reading. We sat down and drank a cup of water.

questions.q_zh: 今天天气怎么样？
questions.q_en: How's the weather today?
questions.answer: 很好

questions.q_zh: 他们去了哪里？
questions.q_en: Where did they go?
questions.answer: 公园

passages.title: Lunch with a Friend
passages.text_zh: 昨天我和一个朋友去饭店吃午饭。我们点了三个菜：一个鱼、一个青菜、还有一个汤。饭店的菜比我做的好吃多了。我朋友说他以前来过这家饭店，觉得这里的鱼特别好。我们吃了一个小时，一共花了八十块钱。
passages.text_pinyin: Zuótiān wǒ hé yí gè péngyou qù fàndiàn chī wǔfàn. Wǒmen diǎnle sān gè cài: yí gè yú, yí gè qīngcài, hái yǒu yí gè tāng. Fàndiàn de cài bǐ wǒ zuò de hǎochī duō le. Wǒ péngyou shuō tā yǐqián láiguo zhè jiā fàndiàn, juéde zhèlǐ de yú tèbié hǎo. Wǒmen chīle yí gè xiǎoshí, yígòng huāle bāshí kuài qián.
passages.text_en: Yesterday I went to a restaurant for lunch with a friend. We ordered three dishes: a fish, a vegetable dish, and a soup. The restaurant food was much better than what I cook. My friend said he'd been to this restaurant before and thought the fish here is especially good. We ate for an hour and spent eighty yuan total.

questions.q_zh: 他们点了几个菜？
questions.q_en: How many dishes did they order?
questions.answer: 三个菜

questions.q_zh: 一共花了多少钱？
questions.q_en: How much did they spend in total?
questions.answer: 八十块钱

passages.title: My Weekend
passages.text_zh: 我的周末一般都很忙。星期六早上我去跑步，从七点跑到八点。跑完步以后，我去超市买东西。下午的时候，我在家看电视或者看书。星期天我要去学校学中文。我觉得中文很有意思，但是比英文难。
passages.text_pinyin: Wǒ de zhōumò yìbān dōu hěn máng. Xīngqīliù zǎoshang wǒ qù pǎobù, cóng qī diǎn pǎo dào bā diǎn. Pǎowán bù yǐhòu, wǒ qù chāoshì mǎi dōngxi. Xiàwǔ de shíhou, wǒ zài jiā kàn diànshì huòzhě kàn shū. Xīngqītiān wǒ yào qù xuéxiào xué Zhōngwén. Wǒ juéde Zhōngwén hěn yǒu yìsi, dànshì bǐ Yīngwén nán.
passages.text_en: My weekends are usually busy. Saturday morning I go running, from seven to eight. After running, I go to the supermarket to buy things. In the afternoon, I watch TV or read at home. Sunday I go to school to study Chinese. I think Chinese is interesting, but harder than English.

questions.q_zh: 他星期六早上做什么？
questions.q_en: What does he do Saturday morning?
questions.answer: 去跑步

questions.q_zh: 他觉得中文怎么样？
questions.q_en: What does he think about Chinese?
questions.answer: 有意思但是比英文难

passages.title: Moving to a New City
passages.text_zh: 去年我从上海搬到了成都。刚来的时候，我什么都不习惯。成都的天气跟上海不一样，冬天没那么冷，但是夏天又热又闷。我是坐火车来的，把所有的东西都带来了。除了工作以外，我每天都去附近的公园散步。成都的生活越来越让我喜欢了。这里的人很热情，菜也又便宜又好吃。
passages.text_pinyin: Qùnián wǒ cóng Shànghǎi bān dào le Chéngdū. Gāng lái de shíhou, wǒ shénme dōu bù xíguàn. Chéngdū de tiānqì gēn Shànghǎi bù yíyàng, dōngtiān méi nàme lěng, dànshì xiàtiān yòu rè yòu mēn. Wǒ shì zuò huǒchē lái de, bǎ suǒyǒu de dōngxi dōu dài lái le. Chúle gōngzuò yǐwài, wǒ měitiān dōu qù fùjìn de gōngyuán sànbù. Chéngdū de shēnghuó yuèláiyuè ràng wǒ xǐhuan le. Zhèlǐ de rén hěn rèqíng, cài yě yòu piányi yòu hǎochī.
passages.text_en: Last year I moved from Shanghai to Chengdu. When I first arrived, I wasn't used to anything. Chengdu's weather is different from Shanghai — winter isn't as cold, but summer is both hot and stuffy. I came by train and brought all my things. Besides work, I walk in a nearby park every day. Life in Chengdu is growing on me more and more. The people here are warm, and the food is both cheap and delicious.

questions.q_zh: 他是怎么来成都的？
questions.q_en: How did he get to Chengdu?
questions.answer: 坐火车

questions.q_zh: 他除了工作以外每天做什么？
questions.q_en: What does he do every day besides work?
questions.answer: 去公园散步

passages.title: A Service Issue
passages.text_zh: 上个星期我在网上买了一件衣服。昨天收到以后，我发现颜色跟网上的照片不一样。我打电话给客服，他们让我把衣服寄回去。我觉得这样太麻烦了，就跟经理说了。经理说可以给我换一件新的，不用寄回去。我被他们的态度感动了，以后还会在这家店买东西。
passages.text_pinyin: Shàng gè xīngqī wǒ zài wǎngshang mǎile yí jiàn yīfu. Zuótiān shōudào yǐhòu, wǒ fāxiàn yánsè gēn wǎngshang de zhàopiàn bù yíyàng. Wǒ dǎ diànhuà gěi kèfú, tāmen ràng wǒ bǎ yīfu jì huíqù. Wǒ juéde zhèyàng tài máfan le, jiù gēn jīnglǐ shuō le. Jīnglǐ shuō kěyǐ gěi wǒ huàn yí jiàn xīn de, bú yòng jì huíqù. Wǒ bèi tāmen de tàidù gǎndòng le, yǐhòu hái huì zài zhè jiā diàn mǎi dōngxi.
passages.text_en: Last week I bought a piece of clothing online. After receiving it yesterday, I found the color was different from the photos. I called customer service and they told me to send the clothes back. I thought that was too much hassle, so I talked to the manager. The manager said they could exchange it for a new one without sending it back. I was moved by their attitude and will shop at this store again.

questions.q_zh: 衣服有什么问题？
questions.q_en: What was wrong with the clothes?
questions.answer: 颜色跟照片不一样

questions.q_zh: 经理是怎么解决的？
questions.q_en: How did the manager resolve it?
questions.answer: 换一件新的

passages.title: My Family
passages.text_zh: 我家有五个人。爸爸是医生，妈妈是老师。我有一个哥哥和一个妹妹。哥哥很高，他今年二十三。我们都住在北京。我很爱我的家。
passages.text_pinyin: Wǒ jiā yǒu wǔ gè rén. Bàba shì yīshēng, māma shì lǎoshī. Wǒ yǒu yí gè gēge hé yí gè mèimei. Gēge hěn gāo, tā jīnnián èrshísān. Wǒmen dōu zhù zài Běijīng. Wǒ hěn ài wǒ de jiā.
passages.text_en: My family has five people. Dad is a doctor, Mom is a teacher. I have an older brother and a younger sister. My brother is very tall; he is twenty-three this year. We all live in Beijing. I love my family very much.

questions.q_zh: 他家有几个人？
questions.q_en: How many people are in the family?
questions.answer: 五个人

questions.q_zh: 爸爸做什么？
questions.q_en: What does Dad do?
questions.answer: 医生

passages.title: At School
passages.text_zh: 我是学生，我在学校学中文。我们的老师很好。上午我们读书，下午我们写字。我和同学都喜欢学中文。学校里有很多人。
passages.text_pinyin: Wǒ shì xuéshēng, wǒ zài xuéxiào xué Zhōngwén. Wǒmen de lǎoshī hěn hǎo. Shàngwǔ wǒmen dú shū, xiàwǔ wǒmen xiě zì. Wǒ hé tóngxué dōu xǐhuan xué Zhōngwén. Xuéxiào lǐ yǒu hěn duō rén.
passages.text_en: I am a student. I study Chinese at school. Our teacher is very good. In the morning we read, in the afternoon we write. My classmates and I all like studying Chinese. There are many people at school.

questions.q_zh: 他在学校学什么？
questions.q_en: What does he study at school?
questions.answer: 中文

questions.q_zh: 下午他们做什么？
questions.q_en: What do they do in the afternoon?
questions.answer: 写字

passages.title: Going Shopping
passages.text_zh: 今天我去商店买东西。我想买一些苹果和水。商店里有很多东西。苹果很好，我买了十个。我也买了三杯茶。我很喜欢去商店。
passages.text_pinyin: Jīntiān wǒ qù shāngdiàn mǎi dōngxi. Wǒ xiǎng mǎi yìxiē píngguǒ hé shuǐ. Shāngdiàn lǐ yǒu hěn duō dōngxi. Píngguǒ hěn hǎo, wǒ mǎile shí gè. Wǒ yě mǎile sān bēi chá. Wǒ hěn xǐhuan qù shāngdiàn.
passages.text_en: Today I went to the store to buy things. I wanted to buy some apples and water. There are many things in the store. The apples were good, so I bought ten. I also bought three cups of tea. I really like going to the store.

questions.q_zh: 他买了几个苹果？
questions.q_en: How many apples did he buy?
questions.answer: 十个

questions.q_zh: 他也买了什么？
questions.q_en: What else did he buy?
questions.answer: 三杯茶

passages.title: Eating at a Restaurant
passages.text_zh: 中午我和朋友去饭店吃饭。我想吃米饭和菜。朋友想喝茶。饭店的饭很好吃。我们吃了很多。朋友说明天我们也来这里吃。
passages.text_pinyin: Zhōngwǔ wǒ hé péngyou qù fàndiàn chī fàn. Wǒ xiǎng chī mǐfàn hé cài. Péngyou xiǎng hē chá. Fàndiàn de fàn hěn hǎochī. Wǒmen chīle hěn duō. Péngyou shuō míngtiān wǒmen yě lái zhèlǐ chī.
passages.text_en: At noon my friend and I went to a restaurant to eat. I wanted to eat rice and dishes. My friend wanted to drink tea. The restaurant's food was very delicious. We ate a lot. My friend said we should come here to eat tomorrow too.

questions.q_zh: 他们什么时候去饭店？
questions.q_en: When did they go to the restaurant?
questions.answer: 中午

questions.q_zh: 朋友想喝什么？
questions.q_en: What did the friend want to drink?
questions.answer: 茶

passages.title: My Day
passages.text_zh: 我上午八点去学校。中午十二点吃饭。下午我看书，也听老师说中文。五点我回家。回家后我看电视。我的一天很好。
passages.text_pinyin: Wǒ shàngwǔ bā diǎn qù xuéxiào. Zhōngwǔ shí'èr diǎn chī fàn. Xiàwǔ wǒ kàn shū, yě tīng lǎoshī shuō Zhōngwén. Wǔ diǎn wǒ huí jiā. Huí jiā hòu wǒ kàn diànshì. Wǒ de yì tiān hěn hǎo.
passages.text_en: I go to school at 8 in the morning. I eat at noon at twelve. In the afternoon I read and also listen to the teacher speak Chinese. At five I go home. After going home I watch TV. My day is good.

questions.q_zh: 他几点去学校？
questions.q_en: What time does he go to school?
questions.answer: 八点

questions.q_zh: 他回家后做什么？
questions.q_en: What does he do after going home?
questions.answer: 看电视

passages.title: My Friend
passages.text_zh: 我有一个好朋友，他叫小明。他是中国人，住在北京。他很高，也很好。我们都喜欢看书和喝茶。我们是同学。我很喜欢和他在一起。
passages.text_pinyin: Wǒ yǒu yí gè hǎo péngyou, tā jiào Xiǎomíng. Tā shì Zhōngguó rén, zhù zài Běijīng. Tā hěn gāo, yě hěn hǎo. Wǒmen dōu xǐhuan kàn shū hé hē chá. Wǒmen shì tóngxué. Wǒ hěn xǐhuan hé tā zài yìqǐ.
passages.text_en: I have a good friend; his name is Xiaoming. He is Chinese and lives in Beijing. He is very tall and also very nice. We both like reading and drinking tea. We are classmates. I really like being with him.

questions.q_zh: 小明住在哪？
questions.q_en: Where does Xiaoming live?
questions.answer: 北京

questions.q_zh: 他们都喜欢做什么？
questions.q_en: What do they both like to do?
questions.answer: 看书和喝茶

passages.title: What Time Is It?
passages.text_zh: 现在是上午九点。我在学校。十二点我去吃饭。下午三点我想去商店买水和苹果。五点半我回家。今天星期一，明天星期二。
passages.text_pinyin: Xiànzài shì shàngwǔ jiǔ diǎn. Wǒ zài xuéxiào. Shí'èr diǎn wǒ qù chī fàn. Xiàwǔ sān diǎn wǒ xiǎng qù shāngdiàn mǎi shuǐ hé píngguǒ. Wǔ diǎn bàn wǒ huí jiā. Jīntiān xīngqīyī, míngtiān xīngqī'èr.
passages.text_en: It is now 9 in the morning. I am at school. At twelve I will go eat. At 3 in the afternoon I want to go to the store to buy water and apples. At five-thirty I go home. Today is Monday, tomorrow is Tuesday.

questions.q_zh: 现在几点？
questions.q_en: What time is it now?
questions.answer: 上午九点

questions.q_zh: 他下午想去哪？
questions.q_en: Where does he want to go in the afternoon?
questions.answer: 商店

passages.title: My Home
passages.text_zh: 我的家不大也不小。家里面有电视和电脑。爸爸喜欢看电视，妈妈喜欢看书。我的书在桌子上面。我的家前面有一个商店。我很喜欢我的家。
passages.text_pinyin: Wǒ de jiā bú dà yě bù xiǎo. Jiā lǐmiàn yǒu diànshì hé diànnǎo. Bàba xǐhuan kàn diànshì, māma xǐhuan kàn shū. Wǒ de shū zài zhuōzi shàngmiàn. Wǒ de jiā qiánmiàn yǒu yí gè shāngdiàn. Wǒ hěn xǐhuan wǒ de jiā.
passages.text_en: My home is not big and not small. Inside the home there is a TV and a computer. Dad likes watching TV, Mom likes reading. My books are on the table. In front of my home there is a store. I really like my home.

questions.q_zh: 家里面有什么？
questions.q_en: What is inside the home?
questions.answer: 电视和电脑

questions.q_zh: 家前面有什么？
questions.q_en: What is in front of the home?
questions.answer: 一个商店

passages.title: Going to the Hospital
passages.text_zh: 昨天我不太好，去了医院。医生是一个先生，他很好。他说我喝水太少了。他说我要多喝水。今天我喝了八杯水。我现在好多了。
passages.text_pinyin: Zuótiān wǒ bú tài hǎo, qùle yīyuàn. Yīshēng shì yí gè xiānshēng, tā hěn hǎo. Tā shuō wǒ hē shuǐ tài shǎo le. Tā shuō wǒ yào duō hē shuǐ. Jīntiān wǒ hēle bā bēi shuǐ. Wǒ xiànzài hǎo duō le.
passages.text_en: Yesterday I wasn't feeling well and went to the hospital. The doctor was a man; he was very nice. He said I drink too little water. He told me to drink more water. Today I drank eight cups of water. I feel much better now.

questions.q_zh: 医生说他要做什么？
questions.q_en: What did the doctor say he should do?
questions.answer: 多喝水

questions.q_zh: 他今天喝了几杯水？
questions.q_en: How many cups of water did he drink today?
questions.answer: 八杯

passages.title: Watching a Movie
passages.text_zh: 我很喜欢看电影。昨天下午我和朋友去看了一个中国电影。电影很好。看了电影后我们去吃饭了。朋友说他明天也想看电影。我说好。
passages.text_pinyin: Wǒ hěn xǐhuan kàn diànyǐng. Zuótiān xiàwǔ wǒ hé péngyou qù kànle yí gè Zhōngguó diànyǐng. Diànyǐng hěn hǎo. Kànle diànyǐng hòu wǒmen qù chī fàn le. Péngyou shuō tā míngtiān yě xiǎng kàn diànyǐng. Wǒ shuō hǎo.
passages.text_en: I really like watching movies. Yesterday afternoon my friend and I went to see a Chinese movie. The movie was great. After the movie we went to eat. My friend said he also wants to watch a movie tomorrow. I said sure.

questions.q_zh: 他们昨天看了什么电影？
questions.q_en: What movie did they watch yesterday?
questions.answer: 中国电影

questions.q_zh: 看了电影后他们做什么？
questions.q_en: What did they do after the movie?
questions.answer: 去吃饭

passages.title: Taking a Taxi
passages.text_zh: 今天上午我坐出租车去医院。出租车里面很热。我对先生说我想开一下。到了医院，我说谢谢。下午我坐出租车回家了。明天我不想坐出租车了。
passages.text_pinyin: Jīntiān shàngwǔ wǒ zuò chūzūchē qù yīyuàn. Chūzūchē lǐmiàn hěn rè. Wǒ duì xiānshēng shuō wǒ xiǎng kāi yíxià. Dàole yīyuàn, wǒ shuō xièxie. Xiàwǔ wǒ zuò chūzūchē huí jiā le. Míngtiān wǒ bù xiǎng zuò chūzūchē le.
passages.text_en: This morning I took a taxi to the hospital. It was very hot inside the taxi. I asked the driver if we could open a window. When we arrived at the hospital, I said thank you. In the afternoon I took a taxi home. Tomorrow I don't want to take a taxi.

questions.q_zh: 他上午去了哪？
questions.q_en: Where did he go in the morning?
questions.answer: 医院

questions.q_zh: 出租车里面怎么样？
questions.q_en: How was it inside the taxi?
questions.answer: 很热

passages.title: My Weekend
passages.text_zh: 今天是星期天。上午我在家看书。中午我和妈妈一起吃饭，吃了米饭和菜。下午爸爸想看电视，我想看电影。我们都很高兴。明天是星期一，我要去学校。
passages.text_pinyin: Jīntiān shì xīngqītiān. Shàngwǔ wǒ zài jiā kàn shū. Zhōngwǔ wǒ hé māma yìqǐ chī fàn, chīle mǐfàn hé cài. Xiàwǔ bàba xiǎng kàn diànshì, wǒ xiǎng kàn diànyǐng. Wǒmen dōu hěn gāoxìng. Míngtiān shì xīngqīyī, wǒ yào qù xuéxiào.
passages.text_en: Today is Sunday. In the morning I read at home. At noon Mom and I ate together; we had rice and dishes. In the afternoon Dad wanted to watch TV and I wanted to watch a movie. We were all very happy. Tomorrow is Monday; I need to go to school.

questions.q_zh: 今天星期几？
questions.q_en: What day is it today?
questions.answer: 星期天

questions.q_zh: 中午他和谁吃饭？
questions.q_en: Who did he eat with at noon?
questions.answer: 妈妈

passages.title: Drinking Tea
passages.text_zh: 中国人很喜欢喝茶。我爸爸一天喝五杯茶。妈妈喜欢喝水，不太喜欢喝茶。我也很喜欢喝茶。今天下午我和爸爸在家喝了茶。我们一起喝茶的时候很高兴。
passages.text_pinyin: Zhōngguó rén hěn xǐhuan hē chá. Wǒ bàba yì tiān hē wǔ bēi chá. Māma xǐhuan hē shuǐ, bú tài xǐhuan hē chá. Wǒ yě hěn xǐhuan hē chá. Jīntiān xiàwǔ wǒ hé bàba zài jiā hēle chá. Wǒmen yìqǐ hē chá de shíhou hěn gāoxìng.
passages.text_en: Chinese people really like drinking tea. My dad drinks five cups of tea a day. Mom likes drinking water and doesn't really like tea. I also really like drinking tea. This afternoon Dad and I drank tea at home. We are very happy when we drink tea together.

questions.q_zh: 爸爸一天喝几杯茶？
questions.q_en: How many cups of tea does Dad drink a day?
questions.answer: 五杯

questions.q_zh: 妈妈喜欢喝什么？
questions.q_en: What does Mom like to drink?
questions.answer: 水

passages.title: Learning Chinese
passages.text_zh: 我在中国学中文。我的老师是中国人。她说中文说得很好。上午我们听老师说，下午我们读书和写字。我现在能说一些中文了。我想在中国住一年。
passages.text_pinyin: Wǒ zài Zhōngguó xué Zhōngwén. Wǒ de lǎoshī shì Zhōngguó rén. Tā shuō Zhōngwén shuō de hěn hǎo. Shàngwǔ wǒmen tīng lǎoshī shuō, xiàwǔ wǒmen dú shū hé xiě zì. Wǒ xiànzài néng shuō yìxiē Zhōngwén le. Wǒ xiǎng zài Zhōngguó zhù yì nián.
passages.text_en: I am studying Chinese in China. My teacher is Chinese. She speaks Chinese very well. In the morning we listen to the teacher speak; in the afternoon we read and write. I can now speak some Chinese. I want to live in China for a year.

questions.q_zh: 他的老师是哪国人？
questions.q_en: What nationality is his teacher?
questions.answer: 中国人

questions.q_zh: 他想在中国住多久？
questions.q_en: How long does he want to live in China?
questions.answer: 一年

passages.title: Counting Things
passages.text_zh: 我的家里有很多东西。我有三百本书。我有两个电脑，一个大，一个小。桌子上面有四个杯子。我有六个苹果，在桌子下面。我的东西太多了！
passages.text_pinyin: Wǒ de jiā lǐ yǒu hěn duō dōngxi. Wǒ yǒu sānbǎi běn shū. Wǒ yǒu liǎng gè diànnǎo, yí gè dà, yí gè xiǎo. Zhuōzi shàngmiàn yǒu sì gè bēizi. Wǒ yǒu liù gè píngguǒ, zài zhuōzi xiàmiàn. Wǒ de dōngxi tài duō le!
passages.text_en: There are many things in my home. I have three hundred books. I have two computers, one big and one small. On the table there are four cups. I have six apples, under the table. I have too many things!

questions.q_zh: 他有几本书？
questions.q_en: How many books does he have?
questions.answer: 三百本

questions.q_zh: 杯子在哪？
questions.q_en: Where are the cups?
questions.answer: 桌子上面

passages.title: Mom and Dad
passages.text_zh: 我爸爸是医生，他在医院。他上午七点去医院，下午六点回家。我妈妈是老师，她在学校。妈妈很喜欢她的学生。爸爸和妈妈都很爱我们。我很爱他们。
passages.text_pinyin: Wǒ bàba shì yīshēng, tā zài yīyuàn. Tā shàngwǔ qī diǎn qù yīyuàn, xiàwǔ liù diǎn huí jiā. Wǒ māma shì lǎoshī, tā zài xuéxiào. Māma hěn xǐhuan tā de xuéshēng. Bàba hé māma dōu hěn ài wǒmen. Wǒ hěn ài tāmen.
passages.text_en: My dad is a doctor; he is at the hospital. He goes to the hospital at seven in the morning and comes home at six in the afternoon. My mom is a teacher; she is at school. Mom really likes her students. Dad and Mom both love us very much. I love them very much.

questions.q_zh: 爸爸几点回家？
questions.q_en: What time does Dad come home?
questions.answer: 六点

questions.q_zh: 妈妈在哪？
questions.q_en: Where is Mom?
questions.answer: 学校

passages.title: Yesterday and Today
passages.text_zh: 昨天很冷，今天很热。昨天我在家看了电视。今天我不想在家，我想去商店。我去商店买了水和苹果。回家后我吃了苹果，喝了水。明天我想去看朋友。
passages.text_pinyin: Zuótiān hěn lěng, jīntiān hěn rè. Zuótiān wǒ zài jiā kànle diànshì. Jīntiān wǒ bù xiǎng zài jiā, wǒ xiǎng qù shāngdiàn. Wǒ qù shāngdiàn mǎile shuǐ hé píngguǒ. Huí jiā hòu wǒ chīle píngguǒ, hēle shuǐ. Míngtiān wǒ xiǎng qù kàn péngyou.
passages.text_en: Yesterday was very cold; today is very hot. Yesterday I watched TV at home. Today I don't want to stay home; I want to go to the store. I went to the store and bought water and apples. After going home I ate an apple and drank water. Tomorrow I want to visit a friend.

questions.q_zh: 昨天天气怎么样？
questions.q_en: How was the weather yesterday?
questions.answer: 很冷

questions.q_zh: 他明天想做什么？
questions.q_en: What does he want to do tomorrow?
questions.answer: 去看朋友

passages.title: Son and Daughter
passages.text_zh: 我有一个儿子和一个女儿。儿子今年十岁，他喜欢看书。女儿今年七岁，她喜欢看电影。他们都是学生。儿子想做医生，女儿想做老师。我很爱他们。
passages.text_pinyin: Wǒ yǒu yí gè érzi hé yí gè nǚ'ér. Érzi jīnnián shí suì, tā xǐhuan kàn shū. Nǚ'ér jīnnián qī suì, tā xǐhuan kàn diànyǐng. Tāmen dōu shì xuéshēng. Érzi xiǎng zuò yīshēng, nǚ'ér xiǎng zuò lǎoshī. Wǒ hěn ài tāmen.
passages.text_en: I have a son and a daughter. My son is ten this year; he likes reading. My daughter is seven this year; she likes watching movies. They are both students. My son wants to be a doctor; my daughter wants to be a teacher. I love them very much.

questions.q_zh: 儿子今年几岁？
questions.q_en: How old is the son this year?
questions.answer: 十岁

questions.q_zh: 女儿想做什么？
questions.q_en: What does the daughter want to be?
questions.answer: 老师

passages.title: A Birthday Party
passages.text_zh: 今天是我朋友的生日。我们一起去了她家。我给她买了一个新的书，她很高兴。我们唱歌、跳舞，吃了很多好吃的东西。因为太晚了，所以我坐出租车回家了。这是一个很快乐的晚上。
passages.text_pinyin: Jīntiān shì wǒ péngyou de shēngrì. Wǒmen yìqǐ qù le tā jiā. Wǒ gěi tā mǎi le yí gè xīn de shū, tā hěn gāoxìng. Wǒmen chànggē, tiàowǔ, chī le hěn duō hǎochī de dōngxi. Yīnwèi tài wǎn le, suǒyǐ wǒ zuò chūzūchē huí jiā le. Zhè shì yí gè hěn kuàilè de wǎnshang.
passages.text_en: Today is my friend's birthday. We went to her house together. I bought her a new book, and she was very happy. We sang, danced, and ate a lot of delicious food. Because it was too late, I took a taxi home. It was a very happy evening.

questions.q_zh: 他们在朋友家做了什么？
questions.q_en: What did they do at the friend's house?
questions.answer: They sang, danced, and ate delicious food.

questions.q_zh: 他为什么坐出租车回家？
questions.q_en: Why did he take a taxi home?
questions.answer: Because it was too late.

passages.title: Taking the Bus
passages.text_zh: 我每天坐公共汽车去上班。公共汽车站离我家很近，走路五分钟就到了。但是公共汽车有时候很慢，因为路上的车太多了。我觉得坐自行车比坐公共汽车快。可是今天下雨了，所以我还是坐公共汽车去了。
passages.text_pinyin: Wǒ měitiān zuò gōnggòng qìchē qù shàngbān. Gōnggòng qìchē zhàn lí wǒ jiā hěn jìn, zǒulù wǔ fēnzhōng jiù dào le. Dànshì gōnggòng qìchē yǒu shíhou hěn màn, yīnwèi lù shang de chē tài duō le. Wǒ juéde zuò zìxíngchē bǐ zuò gōnggòng qìchē kuài. Kěshì jīntiān xiàyǔ le, suǒyǐ wǒ háishì zuò gōnggòng qìchē qù le.
passages.text_en: I take the bus to work every day. The bus stop is very close to my home, just a five-minute walk. But the bus is sometimes slow because there are too many cars on the road. I think riding a bicycle is faster than taking the bus. But it rained today, so I still took the bus.

questions.q_zh: 公共汽车站离他家远不远？
questions.q_en: Is the bus stop far from his home?
questions.answer: No, it is very close, only a five-minute walk.

questions.q_zh: 他今天为什么没有骑自行车？
questions.q_en: Why didn't he ride a bicycle today?
questions.answer: Because it rained today.

passages.title: Learning to Swim
passages.text_zh: 我以前不会游泳。去年夏天，我朋友教我游泳了。一开始我很怕水，但是他告诉我别怕。我们每个星期去游泳两次。现在我已经会游泳了，我觉得游泳是很好的运动。我希望今年夏天可以游得更快。
passages.text_pinyin: Wǒ yǐqián bú huì yóuyǒng. Qùnián xiàtiān, wǒ péngyou jiāo wǒ yóuyǒng le. Yì kāishǐ wǒ hěn pà shuǐ, dànshì tā gàosu wǒ bié pà. Wǒmen měi gè xīngqī qù yóuyǒng liǎng cì. Xiànzài wǒ yǐjīng huì yóuyǒng le, wǒ juéde yóuyǒng shì hěn hǎo de yùndòng. Wǒ xīwàng jīnnián xiàtiān kěyǐ yóu de gèng kuài.
passages.text_en: I couldn't swim before. Last summer, my friend taught me to swim. At first I was very afraid of water, but he told me not to be afraid. We went swimming twice every week. Now I can already swim. I think swimming is great exercise. I hope I can swim faster this summer.

questions.q_zh: 谁教他游泳的？
questions.q_en: Who taught him to swim?
questions.answer: His friend taught him to swim.

questions.q_zh: 他们多长时间游泳一次？
questions.q_en: How often did they go swimming?
questions.answer: They went swimming twice every week.

passages.title: A Trip to Beijing
passages.text_zh: 去年我和家人一起去北京旅游了。我们坐了五个小时的飞机。北京的天气比我们这里冷，但是很好玩。我们去了很多有名的地方。我觉得北京的饭很好吃，可是有一点贵。我希望以后还可以再去一次。
passages.text_pinyin: Qùnián wǒ hé jiārén yìqǐ qù Běijīng lǚyóu le. Wǒmen zuò le wǔ gè xiǎoshí de fēijī. Běijīng de tiānqì bǐ wǒmen zhèlǐ lěng, dànshì hěn hǎowán. Wǒmen qù le hěn duō yǒumíng de dìfang. Wǒ juéde Běijīng de fàn hěn hǎochī, kěshì yǒu yìdiǎn guì. Wǒ xīwàng yǐhòu hái kěyǐ zài qù yí cì.
passages.text_en: Last year I traveled to Beijing with my family. We flew for five hours. The weather in Beijing is colder than here, but it was very fun. We went to many famous places. I think the food in Beijing is delicious, but a little expensive. I hope I can go again in the future.

questions.q_zh: 他们怎么去的北京？
questions.q_en: How did they get to Beijing?
questions.answer: They took a five-hour flight.

questions.q_zh: 他觉得北京的饭怎么样？
questions.q_en: What does he think of Beijing's food?
questions.answer: He thinks it is delicious but a little expensive.

passages.title: Playing Football
passages.text_zh: 我弟弟很喜欢踢足球。他每天下课以后都和同学一起踢足球。虽然他踢得不是很好，可是他很快乐。上个星期他的学校有一个足球比赛。他的身体很好，跑得很快。他们赢了，所以他非常高兴。
passages.text_pinyin: Wǒ dìdi hěn xǐhuan tī zúqiú. Tā měitiān xiàkè yǐhòu dōu hé tóngxué yìqǐ tī zúqiú. Suīrán tā tī de bú shì hěn hǎo, kěshì tā hěn kuàilè. Shàng gè xīngqī tā de xuéxiào yǒu yí gè zúqiú bǐsài. Tā de shēntǐ hěn hǎo, pǎo de hěn kuài. Tāmen yíng le, suǒyǐ tā fēicháng gāoxìng.
passages.text_en: My younger brother really likes playing football. Every day after class he plays football with his classmates. Although he doesn't play very well, he is very happy. Last week his school had a football match. He is in good shape and runs very fast. They won, so he was extremely happy.

questions.q_zh: 弟弟什么时候踢足球？
questions.q_en: When does the younger brother play football?
questions.answer: He plays football every day after class.

questions.q_zh: 上个星期的比赛他们赢了吗？
questions.q_en: Did they win last week's match?
questions.answer: Yes, they won.

passages.title: The Weather This Week
passages.text_zh: 这个星期的天气变了很多。星期一很热，星期二就下雨了。星期三早上还在下雨，但是下午天气变好了。我觉得今天比昨天冷。我妈妈告诉我要多穿衣服，别生病了。希望星期六是好天气，因为我们要去旅游。
passages.text_pinyin: Zhège xīngqī de tiānqì biàn le hěn duō. Xīngqīyī hěn rè, xīngqī'èr jiù xiàyǔ le. Xīngqīsān zǎoshang hái zài xiàyǔ, dànshì xiàwǔ tiānqì biàn hǎo le. Wǒ juéde jīntiān bǐ zuótiān lěng. Wǒ māma gàosu wǒ yào duō chuān yīfu, bié shēngbìng le. Xīwàng xīngqīliù shì hǎo tiānqì, yīnwèi wǒmen yào qù lǚyóu.
passages.text_en: The weather changed a lot this week. Monday was very hot, and then it rained on Tuesday. Wednesday morning it was still raining, but the weather got better in the afternoon. I think today is colder than yesterday. My mom told me to wear more clothes and not get sick. I hope Saturday has good weather because we are going traveling.

questions.q_zh: 星期二的天气怎么样？
questions.q_en: How was the weather on Tuesday?
questions.answer: It rained on Tuesday.

questions.q_zh: 他们星期六要做什么？
questions.q_en: What are they going to do on Saturday?
questions.answer: They are going traveling.

passages.title: Two Restaurants
passages.text_zh: 我家旁边有两个饭馆。一个是新的，一个是旧的。新饭馆的菜比旧饭馆贵，但是也好吃。旧饭馆离我家更近，走路两分钟就到了。我觉得旧饭馆的服务员比新饭馆的好。所以虽然新饭馆的菜很好吃，可是我还是常去旧饭馆吃饭。
passages.text_pinyin: Wǒ jiā pángbiān yǒu liǎng gè fànguǎn. Yí gè shì xīn de, yí gè shì jiù de. Xīn fànguǎn de cài bǐ jiù fànguǎn guì, dànshì yě hǎochī. Jiù fànguǎn lí wǒ jiā gèng jìn, zǒulù liǎng fēnzhōng jiù dào le. Wǒ juéde jiù fànguǎn de fúwùyuán bǐ xīn fànguǎn de hǎo. Suǒyǐ suīrán xīn fànguǎn de cài hěn hǎochī, kěshì wǒ háishì cháng qù jiù fànguǎn chīfàn.
passages.text_en: There are two restaurants near my home. One is new and one is old. The new restaurant's food is more expensive than the old one, but also delicious. The old restaurant is closer to my home, just a two-minute walk. I think the old restaurant's waiters are better than the new restaurant's. So although the new restaurant's food is very delicious, I still often eat at the old restaurant.

questions.q_zh: 哪个饭馆的菜更贵？
questions.q_en: Which restaurant's food is more expensive?
questions.answer: The new restaurant's food is more expensive.

questions.q_zh: 他为什么常去旧饭馆？
questions.q_en: Why does he often go to the old restaurant?
questions.answer: Because it is closer to his home and the waiters are better.

passages.title: Preparing for an Exam
passages.text_zh: 下个星期我有一个很重要的考试。这个考试的题很难，所以我一定要好好准备。我每天晚上看书看到十一点。我的同学告诉我，别太累了，要早一点睡觉。他说身体好了，考试才能考得好。我觉得他说得对。
passages.text_pinyin: Xià gè xīngqī wǒ yǒu yí gè hěn zhòngyào de kǎoshì. Zhège kǎoshì de tí hěn nán, suǒyǐ wǒ yídìng yào hǎohāo zhǔnbèi. Wǒ měitiān wǎnshang kàn shū kàn dào shíyī diǎn. Wǒ de tóngxué gàosu wǒ, bié tài lèi le, yào zǎo yìdiǎn shuìjiào. Tā shuō shēntǐ hǎo le, kǎoshì cái néng kǎo de hǎo. Wǒ juéde tā shuō de duì.
passages.text_en: Next week I have a very important exam. The questions on this exam are very hard, so I must prepare well. I study every night until eleven o'clock. My classmate told me not to get too tired and to go to bed earlier. He said only when your health is good can you do well on exams. I think he is right.

questions.q_zh: 考试什么时候？
questions.q_en: When is the exam?
questions.answer: Next week.

questions.q_zh: 他的同学告诉他什么？
questions.q_en: What did his classmate tell him?
questions.answer: Don't get too tired and go to bed earlier, because good health leads to good exam results.

passages.title: A New Bicycle
passages.text_zh: 我的旧自行车已经用了三年了，太旧了。上个星期我买了一个新的自行车。新自行车比旧的快，也比旧的好看。我骑着新自行车去上班，路上很多人看我的车。我觉得骑自行车比开车好，因为可以运动，对身体好。
passages.text_pinyin: Wǒ de jiù zìxíngchē yǐjīng yòng le sān nián le, tài jiù le. Shàng gè xīngqī wǒ mǎi le yí gè xīn de zìxíngchē. Xīn zìxíngchē bǐ jiù de kuài, yě bǐ jiù de hǎokàn. Wǒ qí zhe xīn zìxíngchē qù shàngbān, lù shang hěn duō rén kàn wǒ de chē. Wǒ juéde qí zìxíngchē bǐ kāi chē hǎo, yīnwèi kěyǐ yùndòng, duì shēntǐ hǎo.
passages.text_en: My old bicycle has been used for three years already, it's too old. Last week I bought a new bicycle. The new bicycle is faster than the old one and also better looking. I ride my new bicycle to work, and many people on the road look at my bike. I think riding a bicycle is better than driving because you can exercise, which is good for your health.

questions.q_zh: 旧自行车用了多长时间？
questions.q_en: How long has the old bicycle been used?
questions.answer: It has been used for three years.

questions.q_zh: 他为什么觉得骑自行车比开车好？
questions.q_en: Why does he think cycling is better than driving?
questions.answer: Because you can exercise, which is good for your health.

passages.title: Helping a Friend Move
passages.text_zh: 我的好朋友要搬到新家了。他让我星期六去帮助他。他的东西很多，我们从早上九点一直做到下午三点。虽然很累，可是我很高兴能帮助他。他的新家比旧家大，离他上班的地方也更近。晚上他请我吃饭，我们一起吃了很好吃的菜。
passages.text_pinyin: Wǒ de hǎo péngyou yào bān dào xīn jiā le. Tā ràng wǒ xīngqīliù qù bāngzhù tā. Tā de dōngxi hěn duō, wǒmen cóng zǎoshang jiǔ diǎn yìzhí zuò dào xiàwǔ sān diǎn. Suīrán hěn lèi, kěshì wǒ hěn gāoxìng néng bāngzhù tā. Tā de xīn jiā bǐ jiù jiā dà, lí tā shàngbān de dìfang yě gèng jìn. Wǎnshang tā qǐng wǒ chīfàn, wǒmen yìqǐ chī le hěn hǎochī de cài.
passages.text_en: My good friend is moving to a new home. He asked me to help him on Saturday. He has a lot of things, and we worked from nine in the morning until three in the afternoon. Although it was tiring, I was happy to help him. His new home is bigger than the old one and closer to where he works. In the evening he treated me to dinner, and we ate delicious food together.

questions.q_zh: 他们做了多长时间？
questions.q_en: How long did they work?
questions.answer: From nine in the morning until three in the afternoon.

questions.q_zh: 新家和旧家比，怎么样？
questions.q_en: How does the new home compare to the old one?
questions.answer: The new home is bigger and closer to his workplace.

passages.title: My Morning Routine
passages.text_zh: 我每天早上六点半起床。起床以后我马上去跑步，跑步是很好的运动。然后回家洗澡，吃早饭。我觉得早饭很重要，所以我一定要吃。我七点半就出门了，因为我不想迟到。我走路去公共汽车站，坐公共汽车去上班。
passages.text_pinyin: Wǒ měitiān zǎoshang liù diǎn bàn qǐchuáng. Qǐchuáng yǐhòu wǒ mǎshàng qù pǎobù, pǎobù shì hěn hǎo de yùndòng. Ránhòu huí jiā xǐzǎo, chī zǎofàn. Wǒ juéde zǎofàn hěn zhòngyào, suǒyǐ wǒ yídìng yào chī. Wǒ qī diǎn bàn jiù chūmén le, yīnwèi wǒ bù xiǎng chídào. Wǒ zǒulù qù gōnggòng qìchē zhàn, zuò gōnggòng qìchē qù shàngbān.
passages.text_en: I get up at six thirty every morning. After getting up I immediately go running. Running is great exercise. Then I go home, shower, and eat breakfast. I think breakfast is very important, so I always eat it. I leave the house at seven thirty because I don't want to be late. I walk to the bus stop and take the bus to work.

questions.q_zh: 他起床以后马上做什么？
questions.q_en: What does he do right after getting up?
questions.answer: He immediately goes running.

questions.q_zh: 他为什么七点半就出门了？
questions.q_en: Why does he leave the house at seven thirty?
questions.answer: Because he doesn't want to be late.

passages.title: My Sister's Eyes
passages.text_zh: 我姐姐的眼睛很大，很好看。但是她看电脑看得太多了，所以现在眼睛不太好。医生告诉她别看手机看太长时间。他还告诉她要多看远的地方，这样对眼睛好。姐姐觉得医生说得对，她现在每天都出去走路，看看远处的东西。
passages.text_pinyin: Wǒ jiějie de yǎnjing hěn dà, hěn hǎokàn. Dànshì tā kàn diànnǎo kàn de tài duō le, suǒyǐ xiànzài yǎnjing bú tài hǎo. Yīshēng gàosu tā bié kàn shǒujī kàn tài cháng shíjiān. Tā hái gàosu tā yào duō kàn yuǎn de dìfang, zhèyàng duì yǎnjing hǎo. Jiějie juéde yīshēng shuō de duì, tā xiànzài měitiān dōu chūqù zǒulù, kànkan yuǎnchù de dōngxi.
passages.text_en: My older sister has big, beautiful eyes. But she uses the computer too much, so now her eyes are not very good. The doctor told her not to look at her phone for too long. He also told her to look at faraway places more often, as that is good for the eyes. My sister thinks the doctor is right. She now goes out for walks every day and looks at things in the distance.

questions.q_zh: 姐姐的眼睛为什么不好了？
questions.q_en: Why are the sister's eyes not good anymore?
questions.answer: Because she uses the computer too much.

questions.q_zh: 医生让她做什么？
questions.q_en: What did the doctor tell her to do?
questions.answer: Don't look at the phone too long and look at faraway places more often.

passages.title: Weekend Plans
passages.text_zh: 这个周末我要和朋友一起去打篮球。我们准备早上九点在学校见面。打完篮球以后，我们可以去吃午饭。下午我还要帮妈妈买东西。晚上没有事情，我想在家看书或者看电影。希望这个周末的天气好。
passages.text_pinyin: Zhège zhōumò wǒ yào hé péngyou yìqǐ qù dǎ lánqiú. Wǒmen zhǔnbèi zǎoshang jiǔ diǎn zài xuéxiào jiànmiàn. Dǎ wán lánqiú yǐhòu, wǒmen kěyǐ qù chī wǔfàn. Xiàwǔ wǒ hái yào bāng māma mǎi dōngxi. Wǎnshang méiyǒu shìqing, wǒ xiǎng zài jiā kàn shū huòzhě kàn diànyǐng. Xīwàng zhège zhōumò de tiānqì hǎo.
passages.text_en: This weekend I'm going to play basketball with friends. We're planning to meet at nine in the morning at school. After playing basketball, we can go eat lunch. In the afternoon I still need to help my mom buy things. There's nothing to do in the evening, so I want to stay home and read or watch a movie. I hope the weather is good this weekend.

questions.q_zh: 他们准备在哪里见面？
questions.q_en: Where are they planning to meet?
questions.answer: At the school.

questions.q_zh: 他晚上想做什么？
questions.q_en: What does he want to do in the evening?
questions.answer: Stay home and read or watch a movie.

passages.title: My Brother's Wedding
passages.text_zh: 我哥哥下个月要结婚了。他和他的女朋友在一起已经三年了。我们全家人都很高兴。妈妈在准备很多事情，她很忙。我要帮忙买花和水果。哥哥告诉我他很快乐，因为找到了一个很好的人。我希望他们以后一直快乐。
passages.text_pinyin: Wǒ gēge xià gè yuè yào jiéhūn le. Tā hé tā de nǚpéngyou zài yìqǐ yǐjīng sān nián le. Wǒmen quán jiārén dōu hěn gāoxìng. Māma zài zhǔnbèi hěn duō shìqing, tā hěn máng. Wǒ yào bāngmáng mǎi huā hé shuǐguǒ. Gēge gàosu wǒ tā hěn kuàilè, yīnwèi zhǎo dào le yí gè hěn hǎo de rén. Wǒ xīwàng tāmen yǐhòu yìzhí kuàilè.
passages.text_en: My older brother is getting married next month. He and his girlfriend have been together for three years already. Our whole family is very happy. Mom is preparing many things and is very busy. I need to help buy flowers and fruit. My brother told me he is very happy because he found a wonderful person. I hope they will always be happy.

questions.q_zh: 哥哥什么时候结婚？
questions.q_en: When is the brother getting married?
questions.answer: Next month.

questions.q_zh: 他和女朋友在一起多长时间了？
questions.q_en: How long have he and his girlfriend been together?
questions.answer: They have been together for three years.

passages.title: Staying Healthy
passages.text_zh: 我爸爸以前身体不太好，因为他不运动，也吃得不好。去年医生告诉他要多运动。现在他每天早上跑步，晚上和妈妈一起走路。他已经瘦了五公斤了。他觉得运动以后身体好多了，睡觉也睡得好了。他告诉我运动很重要。
passages.text_pinyin: Wǒ bàba yǐqián shēntǐ bú tài hǎo, yīnwèi tā bù yùndòng, yě chī de bù hǎo. Qùnián yīshēng gàosu tā yào duō yùndòng. Xiànzài tā měitiān zǎoshang pǎobù, wǎnshang hé māma yìqǐ zǒulù. Tā yǐjīng shòu le wǔ gōngjīn le. Tā juéde yùndòng yǐhòu shēntǐ hǎo duō le, shuìjiào yě shuì de hǎo le. Tā gàosu wǒ yùndòng hěn zhòngyào.
passages.text_en: My dad's health wasn't very good before because he didn't exercise and didn't eat well. Last year the doctor told him to exercise more. Now he runs every morning and walks with mom every evening. He has already lost five kilograms. He feels much healthier after exercising, and sleeps better too. He told me exercise is very important.

questions.q_zh: 爸爸以前为什么身体不好？
questions.q_en: Why wasn't dad's health good before?
questions.answer: Because he didn't exercise and didn't eat well.

questions.q_zh: 爸爸现在每天做什么运动？
questions.q_en: What exercise does dad do every day now?
questions.answer: He runs in the morning and walks with mom in the evening.

passages.title: Buying New Clothes
passages.text_zh: 昨天我和妈妈一起去买衣服了。我想买一件红的，妈妈觉得白的比红的好看。我们看了很多，我找到了一件又好看又便宜的黑衣服。妈妈说这件衣服穿着很好看。她还给我买了一条短的裤子，因为夏天快要到了。我们买完就回家了。
passages.text_pinyin: Zuótiān wǒ hé māma yìqǐ qù mǎi yīfu le. Wǒ xiǎng mǎi yí jiàn hóng de, māma juéde bái de bǐ hóng de hǎokàn. Wǒmen kàn le hěn duō, wǒ zhǎo dào le yí jiàn yòu hǎokàn yòu piányi de hēi yīfu. Māma shuō zhè jiàn yīfu chuān zhe hěn hǎokàn. Tā hái gěi wǒ mǎi le yì tiáo duǎn de kùzi, yīnwèi xiàtiān kuài yào dào le. Wǒmen mǎi wán jiù huí jiā le.
passages.text_en: Yesterday I went shopping for clothes with mom. I wanted to buy a red one, but mom thought the white one looked better than the red one. We looked at many options. I found a black outfit that was both good-looking and cheap. Mom said this outfit looks great when worn. She also bought me a pair of short pants because summer is almost here. After we finished shopping we went home.

questions.q_zh: 他最后买了什么颜色的衣服？
questions.q_en: What color outfit did he end up buying?
questions.answer: He bought a black outfit.

questions.q_zh: 妈妈为什么给他买短裤子？
questions.q_en: Why did mom buy him short pants?
questions.answer: Because summer is almost here.

passages.title: Getting Lost
passages.text_zh: 昨天我去一个朋友家，但是找不到路了。我知道他家离学校不远，可是我不知道怎么走。我问了路上的一个人，他告诉我向左走，然后一直走就到了。我走了十分钟就找到了朋友的家。朋友说以后可以让他来接我。我觉得下次我一定不会再找不到了。
passages.text_pinyin: Zuótiān wǒ qù yí gè péngyou jiā, dànshì zhǎo bú dào lù le. Wǒ zhīdào tā jiā lí xuéxiào bù yuǎn, kěshì wǒ bù zhīdào zěnme zǒu. Wǒ wèn le lù shang de yí gè rén, tā gàosu wǒ xiàng zuǒ zǒu, ránhòu yìzhí zǒu jiù dào le. Wǒ zǒu le shí fēnzhōng jiù zhǎo dào le péngyou de jiā. Péngyou shuō yǐhòu kěyǐ ràng tā lái jiē wǒ. Wǒ juéde xià cì wǒ yídìng bú huì zài zhǎo bú dào le.
passages.text_en: Yesterday I went to a friend's house, but I couldn't find the way. I knew his house wasn't far from the school, but I didn't know how to get there. I asked someone on the road, and he told me to turn left and then keep walking straight. I walked for ten minutes and found my friend's house. My friend said he can come pick me up next time. I think I definitely won't get lost again.

questions.q_zh: 他怎么找到朋友家的？
questions.q_en: How did he find his friend's house?
questions.answer: He asked someone on the road who told him to turn left and walk straight.

questions.q_zh: 朋友说以后怎么办？
questions.q_en: What did the friend say about next time?
questions.answer: The friend said he can come pick him up.

passages.title: Learning to Dance
passages.text_zh: 我妹妹很喜欢跳舞。她从六岁就开始学跳舞了。她的老师教得很好，所以她跳得也很好。上个月学校有一个跳舞比赛，她得了第一名。虽然她每天都要练习，很累，可是她觉得跳舞让她很快乐。我认为她以后一定会跳得更好。
passages.text_pinyin: Wǒ mèimei hěn xǐhuan tiàowǔ. Tā cóng liù suì jiù kāishǐ xué tiàowǔ le. Tā de lǎoshī jiāo de hěn hǎo, suǒyǐ tā tiào de yě hěn hǎo. Shàng gè yuè xuéxiào yǒu yí gè tiàowǔ bǐsài, tā dé le dì yī míng. Suīrán tā měitiān dōu yào liànxí, hěn lèi, kěshì tā juéde tiàowǔ ràng tā hěn kuàilè. Wǒ rènwéi tā yǐhòu yídìng huì tiào de gèng hǎo.
passages.text_en: My younger sister really likes dancing. She started learning to dance when she was six years old. Her teacher teaches very well, so she dances well too. Last month the school had a dance competition and she won first place. Although she has to practice every day and it's tiring, she feels dancing makes her happy. I believe she will definitely dance even better in the future.

questions.q_zh: 妹妹什么时候开始学跳舞的？
questions.q_en: When did the younger sister start learning to dance?
questions.answer: She started learning to dance at age six.

questions.q_zh: 上个月的比赛她跳得怎么样？
questions.q_en: How did she do in last month's competition?
questions.answer: She won first place.

passages.title: Apartment Hunting
passages.text_zh: 我下个月要搬家，所以最近一直在找房子。我希望新房子离公司不太远，附近有地铁站。昨天我看了三套房子，第一套又小又贵，第二套虽然便宜但是环境不好。第三套差不多符合我的条件，房间里的家具也很新。房东把钥匙给了我，让我自己去看看。我觉得周围的邻居看起来都很友好。如果房租能便宜一点，我就马上签合同。
passages.text_pinyin: Wǒ xià ge yuè yào bānjiā, suǒyǐ zuìjìn yìzhí zài zhǎo fángzi. Wǒ xīwàng xīn fángzi lí gōngsī bú tài yuǎn, fùjìn yǒu dìtiě zhàn. Zuótiān wǒ kàn le sān tào fángzi, dì yī tào yòu xiǎo yòu guì, dì èr tào suīrán piányi dànshì huánjìng bù hǎo. Dì sān tào chàbuduō fúhé wǒ de tiáojiàn, fángjiān lǐ de jiājù yě hěn xīn. Fángdōng bǎ yàoshi gěi le wǒ, ràng wǒ zìjǐ qù kànkan. Wǒ juéde zhōuwéi de línjū kàn qǐlái dōu hěn yǒuhǎo. Rúguǒ fángzū néng piányi yìdiǎn, wǒ jiù mǎshàng qiān hétong.
passages.text_en: I need to move next month, so I've been looking for an apartment recently. I hope the new place isn't too far from my company and has a subway station nearby. Yesterday I looked at three apartments: the first was both small and expensive, the second was cheap but the environment was bad. The third mostly met my requirements, and the furniture in the rooms was quite new. The landlord gave me the key and let me go look on my own. I think the neighbors around all seem very friendly. If the rent can be a little cheaper, I'll sign the contract right away.

questions.q_zh: 第二套房子有什么问题？
questions.q_en: What was the problem with the second apartment?
questions.answer: 虽然便宜但是环境不好。

questions.q_zh: 他什么条件下会马上签合同？
questions.q_en: Under what condition would he sign the contract right away?
questions.answer: 如果房租能便宜一点。

passages.title: The Job Interview
passages.text_zh: 今天我去一家公司面试了。因为这是我第一次面试，所以我特别紧张。我先把简历交给了前台，然后在会议室等了十分钟。经理问了我很多问题，比如我的经验和将来的计划。虽然有些问题很难，但是我都回答得不错。经理说他们的工作条件很好，不但工资高，而且每年有二十天假期。对我来说，这是一个很好的机会。他让我下周一再来，我觉得很有希望。
passages.text_pinyin: Jīntiān wǒ qù yì jiā gōngsī miànshì le. Yīnwèi zhè shì wǒ dì yī cì miànshì, suǒyǐ wǒ tèbié jǐnzhāng. Wǒ xiān bǎ jiǎnlì jiāo gěi le qiántái, ránhòu zài huìyì shì děng le shí fēnzhōng. Jīnglǐ wèn le wǒ hěn duō wèntí, bǐrú wǒ de jīngyàn hé jiānglái de jìhuà. Suīrán yǒuxiē wèntí hěn nán, dànshì wǒ dōu huídá de búcuò. Jīnglǐ shuō tāmen de gōngzuò tiáojiàn hěn hǎo, búdàn gōngzī gāo, érqiě měi nián yǒu èrshí tiān jiàqī. Duì wǒ lái shuō, zhè shì yí ge hěn hǎo de jīhuì. Tā ràng wǒ xià zhōuyī zài lái, wǒ juéde hěn yǒu xīwàng.
passages.text_en: Today I went to interview at a company. Because this was my first interview, I was especially nervous. I first handed my resume to the front desk, then waited ten minutes in the meeting room. The manager asked me many questions, such as my experience and future plans. Although some questions were difficult, I answered them all pretty well. The manager said their working conditions are great — not only is the salary high, but there are also twenty vacation days per year. For me, this is a great opportunity. He told me to come back next Monday, and I feel very hopeful.

questions.q_zh: 经理问了他什么问题？
questions.q_en: What questions did the manager ask him?
questions.answer: 经理问了他的经验和将来的计划。

questions.q_zh: 这家公司的工作条件怎么样？
questions.q_en: What are the working conditions like at this company?
questions.answer: 不但工资高，而且每年有二十天假期。

passages.title: Learning to Cook
passages.text_zh: 以前我总是在外面吃饭，后来觉得越来越不健康。所以我决定学做饭。妈妈先教我做了一个简单的西红柿炒鸡蛋，然后又教了我做汤。刚开始的时候，我做得不太好，把盐放得太多了。但是我一直练习，现在做得越来越好了。除了中国菜以外，我还学了做日本菜。其实做饭没有我想的那么难，只要多练习就能做好。周末我打算请朋友来家里，给他们做几个菜。
passages.text_pinyin: Yǐqián wǒ zǒngshì zài wàimiàn chīfàn, hòulái juéde yuè lái yuè bú jiànkāng. Suǒyǐ wǒ juédìng xué zuòfàn. Māma xiān jiāo wǒ zuò le yí ge jiǎndān de xīhóngshì chǎo jīdàn, ránhòu yòu jiāo le wǒ zuò tāng. Gāng kāishǐ de shíhou, wǒ zuò de bú tài hǎo, bǎ yán fàng de tài duō le. Dànshì wǒ yìzhí liànxí, xiànzài zuò de yuè lái yuè hǎo le. Chúle Zhōngguó cài yǐwài, wǒ hái xué le zuò Rìběn cài. Qíshí zuòfàn méiyǒu wǒ xiǎng de nàme nán, zhǐyào duō liànxí jiù néng zuò hǎo. Zhōumò wǒ dǎsuàn qǐng péngyou lái jiālǐ, gěi tāmen zuò jǐ ge cài.
passages.text_en: I used to always eat out, but later I felt it was getting more and more unhealthy. So I decided to learn to cook. Mom first taught me to make a simple tomato scrambled eggs, then also taught me to make soup. At the beginning, I didn't cook very well and put in too much salt. But I kept practicing, and now I cook better and better. Besides Chinese food, I also learned to make Japanese food. Actually, cooking isn't as hard as I thought — as long as you practice more, you can do it well. This weekend I plan to invite friends over and cook a few dishes for them.

questions.q_zh: 他为什么决定学做饭？
questions.q_en: Why did he decide to learn to cook?
questions.answer: 因为他觉得总是在外面吃饭越来越不健康。

questions.q_zh: 除了中国菜以外，他还学了什么？
questions.q_en: Besides Chinese food, what else did he learn to make?
questions.answer: 他还学了做日本菜。

passages.title: Healthy Habits
passages.text_zh: 我的医生告诉我，我的身体越来越不好了，应该改变生活习惯。他给了我几个办法：先把工作时间减少一点，然后每天运动半个小时。其实我以前也想过要锻炼，但是总是太忙。现在我每天早上跑步，一边跑步一边听音乐。除了跑步以外，我周末还去游泳。虽然刚开始很累，但是现在我已经习惯了。我的身体比以前好多了，晚上也睡得更好了。只要坚持下去，身体就会越来越健康。
passages.text_pinyin: Wǒ de yīshēng gàosu wǒ, wǒ de shēntǐ yuè lái yuè bù hǎo le, yīnggāi gǎibiàn shēnghuó xíguàn. Tā gěi le wǒ jǐ ge bànfǎ: xiān bǎ gōngzuò shíjiān jiǎnshǎo yìdiǎn, ránhòu měi tiān yùndòng bàn ge xiǎoshí. Qíshí wǒ yǐqián yě xiǎng guò yào duànliàn, dànshì zǒngshì tài máng. Xiànzài wǒ měi tiān zǎoshang pǎobù, yìbiān pǎobù yìbiān tīng yīnyuè. Chúle pǎobù yǐwài, wǒ zhōumò hái qù yóuyǒng. Suīrán gāng kāishǐ hěn lèi, dànshì xiànzài wǒ yǐjīng xíguàn le. Wǒ de shēntǐ bǐ yǐqián hǎo duō le, wǎnshang yě shuì de gèng hǎo le. Zhǐyào jiānchí xiàqu, shēntǐ jiù huì yuè lái yuè jiànkāng.
passages.text_en: My doctor told me that my health was getting worse and worse, and I should change my lifestyle habits. He gave me a few solutions: first reduce my working hours a bit, then exercise half an hour every day. Actually I had thought about exercising before, but I was always too busy. Now I run every morning, listening to music while running. Besides running, I also go swimming on weekends. Although it was very tiring at first, I'm already used to it now. My body is much better than before, and I sleep better at night too. As long as I keep it up, my health will get better and better.

questions.q_zh: 医生给了他什么办法？
questions.q_en: What solutions did the doctor give him?
questions.answer: 先把工作时间减少一点，然后每天运动半个小时。

questions.q_zh: 他跑步的时候做什么？
questions.q_en: What does he do while running?
questions.answer: 他一边跑步一边听音乐。

passages.title: University Life
passages.text_zh: 我刚来大学的时候，对周围的环境很不习惯。因为我是第一次离开家，所以特别想家。但是我的室友对我很好，他们帮我把行李搬到了宿舍。除了上课以外，我们还一起去图书馆学习。大学的课程比高中难得多，我几乎每天都要学到很晚。虽然很辛苦，但是我觉得大学生活越来越有意思了。这里不但能学到很多知识，而且能认识很多新朋友。对我来说，这是一段很重要的经验。
passages.text_pinyin: Wǒ gāng lái dàxué de shíhou, duì zhōuwéi de huánjìng hěn bù xíguàn. Yīnwèi wǒ shì dì yī cì líkāi jiā, suǒyǐ tèbié xiǎng jiā. Dànshì wǒ de shìyǒu duì wǒ hěn hǎo, tāmen bāng wǒ bǎ xíngli bān dào le sùshè. Chúle shàngkè yǐwài, wǒmen hái yìqǐ qù túshūguǎn xuéxí. Dàxué de kèchéng bǐ gāozhōng nán de duō, wǒ jīhū měi tiān dōu yào xué dào hěn wǎn. Suīrán hěn xīnkǔ, dànshì wǒ juéde dàxué shēnghuó yuè lái yuè yǒu yìsi le. Zhèlǐ búdàn néng xué dào hěn duō zhīshi, érqiě néng rènshi hěn duō xīn péngyou. Duì wǒ lái shuō, zhè shì yí duàn hěn zhòngyào de jīngyàn.
passages.text_en: When I first came to university, I wasn't used to the surroundings at all. Because it was my first time away from home, I was especially homesick. But my roommates were very nice to me — they helped me carry my luggage to the dorm. Besides going to class, we also studied together in the library. University courses are much harder than high school, and I study until late almost every day. Although it's tough, I find university life more and more interesting. Here you can not only learn a lot of knowledge, but also meet many new friends. For me, this is a very important experience.

questions.q_zh: 他刚来大学的时候感觉怎么样？
questions.q_en: How did he feel when he first arrived at university?
questions.answer: 他对周围的环境很不习惯，特别想家。

questions.q_zh: 他觉得大学生活怎么样？
questions.q_en: What does he think of university life?
questions.answer: 他觉得大学生活越来越有意思，不但能学到知识，而且能认识新朋友。

passages.title: New Phone
passages.text_zh: 我的旧手机用了三年了，越来越慢。上周我终于决定买一个新的。我先在网上查了很多信息，然后去商店看了几个牌子。售货员给我介绍了一款又好看又便宜的手机。我把旧手机里的照片都存到了电脑上，然后把新手机设置好了。新手机不但速度快，而且拍照特别清楚。其实我不需要最贵的，只要能打电话、上网和拍照就够了。现在我每天一边坐地铁一边用手机看新闻，非常方便。
passages.text_pinyin: Wǒ de jiù shǒujī yòng le sān nián le, yuè lái yuè màn. Shàng zhōu wǒ zhōngyú juédìng mǎi yí ge xīn de. Wǒ xiān zài wǎng shàng chá le hěn duō xìnxī, ránhòu qù shāngdiàn kàn le jǐ ge páizi. Shòuhuòyuán gěi wǒ jièshào le yì kuǎn yòu hǎokàn yòu piányi de shǒujī. Wǒ bǎ jiù shǒujī lǐ de zhàopiàn dōu cún dào le diànnǎo shàng, ránhòu bǎ xīn shǒujī shèzhì hǎo le. Xīn shǒujī búdàn sùdù kuài, érqiě pāizhào tèbié qīngchu. Qíshí wǒ bù xūyào zuì guì de, zhǐyào néng dǎ diànhuà, shàngwǎng hé pāizhào jiù gòu le. Xiànzài wǒ měi tiān yìbiān zuò dìtiě yìbiān yòng shǒujī kàn xīnwén, fēicháng fāngbiàn.
passages.text_en: My old phone has been used for three years and has gotten slower and slower. Last week I finally decided to buy a new one. I first looked up a lot of information online, then went to the store to check out a few brands. The salesperson recommended a phone that was both good-looking and affordable. I saved all the photos from my old phone to my computer, then set up the new phone. The new phone is not only fast, but also takes especially clear photos. Actually I don't need the most expensive one — as long as it can make calls, go online, and take photos, that's enough. Now I read the news on my phone every day while riding the subway, which is very convenient.

questions.q_zh: 他为什么要买新手机？
questions.q_en: Why did he want to buy a new phone?
questions.answer: 因为他的旧手机用了三年了，越来越慢。

questions.q_zh: 他觉得手机需要什么功能就够了？
questions.q_en: What functions does he think are enough for a phone?
questions.answer: 只要能打电话、上网和拍照就够了。

passages.title: My Neighbor
passages.text_zh: 我家隔壁搬来了一位新邻居，是一个退休的老太太。她每天早上在附近的公园锻炼身体，一边走路一边唱歌。刚开始我觉得她有点儿奇怪，但是后来发现她其实很有意思。她以前是老师，教了三十多年的书。除了教书以外，她还喜欢种花。她把阳台上种满了各种花，周围的邻居都觉得很漂亮。有一天她突然敲我的门，把一盆花送给了我。她说邻居之间应该互相关心。因为她的关系，我们这一层的邻居现在越来越熟了。
passages.text_pinyin: Wǒ jiā gébì bān lái le yí wèi xīn línjū, shì yí ge tuìxiū de lǎo tàitai. Tā měi tiān zǎoshang zài fùjìn de gōngyuán duànliàn shēntǐ, yìbiān zǒulù yìbiān chànggē. Gāng kāishǐ wǒ juéde tā yǒudiǎnr qíguài, dànshì hòulái fāxiàn tā qíshí hěn yǒu yìsi. Tā yǐqián shì lǎoshī, jiāo le sānshí duō nián de shū. Chúle jiāoshū yǐwài, tā hái xǐhuan zhòng huā. Tā bǎ yángtái shàng zhòng mǎn le gè zhǒng huā, zhōuwéi de línjū dōu juéde hěn piàoliang. Yǒu yì tiān tā tūrán qiāo wǒ de mén, bǎ yì pén huā sòng gěi le wǒ. Tā shuō línjū zhījiān yīnggāi hùxiāng guānxīn. Yīnwèi tā de guānxi, wǒmen zhè yì céng de línjū xiànzài yuè lái yuè shú le.
passages.text_en: A new neighbor moved in next door — a retired old lady. She exercises in the nearby park every morning, singing while she walks. At first I thought she was a bit strange, but later I found she's actually very interesting. She used to be a teacher and taught for over thirty years. Besides teaching, she also likes growing flowers. She filled her balcony with all kinds of flowers, and the surrounding neighbors all think they're beautiful. One day she suddenly knocked on my door and gave me a pot of flowers. She said neighbors should care about each other. Because of her, the neighbors on our floor have gotten closer and closer.

questions.q_zh: 新邻居以前做什么工作？
questions.q_en: What did the new neighbor used to do for work?
questions.answer: 她以前是老师，教了三十多年的书。

questions.q_zh: 她怎么让邻居们变得更熟了？
questions.q_en: How did she help the neighbors become closer?
questions.answer: 她关心邻居，送花给他们，邻居之间越来越熟了。

passages.title: Four Seasons
passages.text_zh: 我住在北京，这里一年有四个季节，每个季节都不一样。春天的时候，天气越来越暖和，公园里的花都开了。夏天又热又湿，我差不多每天都要开空调。秋天是我最喜欢的季节，不但天气舒服，而且树叶的颜色特别漂亮。冬天很冷，但是如果下雪的话，周围的环境就变得很美。除了看风景以外，每个季节还有不同的活动。比如秋天可以去爬山，冬天可以去滑雪。对我来说，四个季节都有自己的好处。
passages.text_pinyin: Wǒ zhù zài Běijīng, zhèlǐ yì nián yǒu sì ge jìjié, měi ge jìjié dōu bù yíyàng. Chūntiān de shíhou, tiānqì yuè lái yuè nuǎnhuo, gōngyuán lǐ de huā dōu kāi le. Xiàtiān yòu rè yòu shī, wǒ chàbuduō měi tiān dōu yào kāi kōngtiáo. Qiūtiān shì wǒ zuì xǐhuan de jìjié, búdàn tiānqì shūfu, érqiě shùyè de yánsè tèbié piàoliang. Dōngtiān hěn lěng, dànshì rúguǒ xià xuě de huà, zhōuwéi de huánjìng jiù biàn de hěn měi. Chúle kàn fēngjǐng yǐwài, měi ge jìjié hái yǒu bùtóng de huódòng. Bǐrú qiūtiān kěyǐ qù páshān, dōngtiān kěyǐ qù huáxuě. Duì wǒ lái shuō, sì ge jìjié dōu yǒu zìjǐ de hǎochù.
passages.text_en: I live in Beijing, where there are four seasons in a year, each one different. In spring, the weather gets warmer and warmer, and the flowers in the parks all bloom. Summer is both hot and humid — I need to turn on the air conditioner almost every day. Autumn is my favorite season: not only is the weather comfortable, but the colors of the leaves are especially beautiful. Winter is very cold, but if it snows, the surroundings become very beautiful. Besides enjoying the scenery, there are different activities for each season. For example, you can go hiking in autumn and skiing in winter. For me, all four seasons have their own advantages.

questions.q_zh: 他最喜欢哪个季节？为什么？
questions.q_en: Which season does he like best? Why?
questions.answer: 他最喜欢秋天，因为不但天气舒服，而且树叶的颜色特别漂亮。

questions.q_zh: 夏天的天气怎么样？
questions.q_en: What is the weather like in summer?
questions.answer: 夏天又热又湿。

passages.title: Cultural Experience
passages.text_zh: 去年暑假我去了中国旅游，在那里有了很多文化体验。我先去了北京看长城，然后坐火车去了西安。西安的历史特别丰富，到处都能看到古老的建筑。我还学了写书法，虽然写得不太好，但是老师说只要多练习就能写好。被当地人邀请去吃饭是最让我高兴的事。他们不但给我做了很多好吃的菜，而且教我用筷子的正确方法。其实中国的文化比我想的丰富得多。这次经验让我对中国越来越感兴趣了。
passages.text_pinyin: Qùnián shǔjià wǒ qù le Zhōngguó lǚyóu, zài nàlǐ yǒu le hěn duō wénhuà tǐyàn. Wǒ xiān qù le Běijīng kàn Chángchéng, ránhòu zuò huǒchē qù le Xī'ān. Xī'ān de lìshǐ tèbié fēngfù, dàochù dōu néng kàn dào gǔlǎo de jiànzhù. Wǒ hái xué le xiě shūfǎ, suīrán xiě de bú tài hǎo, dànshì lǎoshī shuō zhǐyào duō liànxí jiù néng xiě hǎo. Bèi dāngdì rén yāoqǐng qù chīfàn shì zuì ràng wǒ gāoxìng de shì. Tāmen búdàn gěi wǒ zuò le hěn duō hǎochī de cài, érqiě jiāo wǒ yòng kuàizi de zhèngquè fāngfǎ. Qíshí Zhōngguó de wénhuà bǐ wǒ xiǎng de fēngfù de duō. Zhè cì jīngyàn ràng wǒ duì Zhōngguó yuè lái yuè gǎn xìngqù le.
passages.text_en: Last summer I traveled to China and had many cultural experiences there. I first went to Beijing to see the Great Wall, then took a train to Xi'an. Xi'an's history is especially rich — you can see ancient buildings everywhere. I also learned calligraphy. Although I didn't write very well, the teacher said as long as I practice more, I can write well. Being invited by locals to eat was the happiest thing for me. They not only made me a lot of delicious food, but also taught me the correct way to use chopsticks. Actually, Chinese culture is much richer than I thought. This experience has made me more and more interested in China.

questions.q_zh: 什么事让他最高兴？
questions.q_en: What made him the happiest?
questions.answer: 被当地人邀请去吃饭是最让他高兴的事。

questions.q_zh: 他先去了哪里，然后去了哪里？
questions.q_en: Where did he go first, and where did he go next?
questions.answer: 他先去了北京看长城，然后坐火车去了西安。

passages.title: Protecting the Environment
passages.text_zh: 最近几年，环境问题越来越严重了。我们城市的空气质量差不多每年都在变差。因为这个原因，很多人开始关心环境保护。我也改变了自己的习惯：我把开车上班改成了坐公交车，还把家里的灯都换成了省电的。除了这些以外，我每周还参加一次社区的环保活动。虽然一个人的力量很小，但是只要每个人都做一点，环境就能慢慢变好。其实保护环境不难，关键是要有好的习惯。我们不但要为自己想，而且要为将来的人着想。
passages.text_pinyin: Zuìjìn jǐ nián, huánjìng wèntí yuè lái yuè yánzhòng le. Wǒmen chéngshì de kōngqì zhìliàng chàbuduō měi nián dōu zài biàn chà. Yīnwèi zhège yuányīn, hěn duō rén kāishǐ guānxīn huánjìng bǎohù. Wǒ yě gǎibiàn le zìjǐ de xíguàn: wǒ bǎ kāichē shàngbān gǎi chéng le zuò gōngjiāo chē, hái bǎ jiālǐ de dēng dōu huàn chéng le shěngdiàn de. Chúle zhèxiē yǐwài, wǒ měi zhōu hái cānjiā yí cì shèqū de huánbǎo huódòng. Suīrán yí ge rén de lìliang hěn xiǎo, dànshì zhǐyào měi ge rén dōu zuò yìdiǎn, huánjìng jiù néng mànmàn biàn hǎo. Qíshí bǎohù huánjìng bù nán, guānjiàn shì yào yǒu hǎo de xíguàn. Wǒmen búdàn yào wèi zìjǐ xiǎng, érqiě yào wèi jiānglái de rén zhuóxiǎng.
passages.text_en: In recent years, environmental problems have gotten more and more serious. The air quality in our city has been getting worse almost every year. Because of this, many people have started caring about environmental protection. I also changed my own habits: I switched from driving to work to taking the bus, and replaced all the lights at home with energy-saving ones. Besides these, I also participate in a community environmental activity once a week. Although one person's power is small, as long as everyone does a little, the environment can slowly improve. Actually, protecting the environment isn't hard — the key is having good habits. We should not only think for ourselves, but also think for future generations.

questions.q_zh: 他做了哪些改变来保护环境？
questions.q_en: What changes did he make to protect the environment?
questions.answer: 他把开车改成了坐公交车，把灯换成了省电的，还参加环保活动。

questions.q_zh: 他觉得保护环境的关键是什么？
questions.q_en: What does he think is the key to protecting the environment?
questions.answer: 关键是要有好的习惯。

passages.title: Travel Planning
passages.text_zh: 下个月我和朋友打算去云南旅游。我们先在网上查了很多信息，然后做了一个详细的计划。我们打算先坐飞机到昆明，然后坐火车去大理。听说大理的风景又美又安静，是一个特别适合放松的地方。我已经把机票和酒店都订好了。除了看风景以外，我们还想尝一尝当地的特色菜。朋友建议我们一边旅游一边拍照，把美好的回忆都记录下来。虽然旅游要花不少钱，但是对我来说，经验比钱更重要。我特别期待这次旅行。
passages.text_pinyin: Xià ge yuè wǒ hé péngyou dǎsuàn qù Yúnnán lǚyóu. Wǒmen xiān zài wǎng shàng chá le hěn duō xìnxī, ránhòu zuò le yí ge xiángxì de jìhuà. Wǒmen dǎsuàn xiān zuò fēijī dào Kūnmíng, ránhòu zuò huǒchē qù Dàlǐ. Tīngshuō Dàlǐ de fēngjǐng yòu měi yòu ānjìng, shì yí ge tèbié shìhé fàngsōng de dìfang. Wǒ yǐjīng bǎ jīpiào hé jiǔdiàn dōu dìng hǎo le. Chúle kàn fēngjǐng yǐwài, wǒmen hái xiǎng cháng yi cháng dāngdì de tèsè cài. Péngyou jiànyì wǒmen yìbiān lǚyóu yìbiān pāizhào, bǎ měihǎo de huíyì dōu jìlù xiàlái. Suīrán lǚyóu yào huā bù shǎo qián, dànshì duì wǒ lái shuō, jīngyàn bǐ qián gèng zhòngyào. Wǒ tèbié qīdài zhè cì lǚxíng.
passages.text_en: Next month my friend and I plan to travel to Yunnan. We first looked up a lot of information online, then made a detailed plan. We plan to first fly to Kunming, then take a train to Dali. I've heard that Dali's scenery is both beautiful and peaceful, a place especially suited for relaxation. I've already booked the tickets and hotel. Besides seeing the scenery, we also want to try the local specialty dishes. My friend suggested we take photos while traveling, recording all the wonderful memories. Although traveling costs quite a bit of money, for me, experience is more important than money. I'm especially looking forward to this trip.

questions.q_zh: 他们怎么去大理？
questions.q_en: How are they getting to Dali?
questions.answer: 他们先坐飞机到昆明，然后坐火车去大理。

questions.q_zh: 对他来说，什么比钱更重要？
questions.q_en: For him, what is more important than money?
questions.answer: 经验比钱更重要。

passages.title: The Lost Wallet
passages.text_zh: 昨天我在超市买完东西以后，突然发现钱包不见了。我特别着急，马上把所有口袋都检查了一遍，但是没找到。我想可能是被人偷走了，也可能是自己不小心掉了。我先回超市去找，问了服务员有没有人捡到钱包。服务员说刚才有人把一个钱包交到了服务台。我跑过去一看，终于找到了！里面的钱和卡都还在。其实是我刚才结账的时候把钱包忘在了柜台上。我真应该改掉这个丢三落四的坏习惯。这件事给了我一个教训。
passages.text_pinyin: Zuótiān wǒ zài chāoshì mǎi wán dōngxi yǐhòu, tūrán fāxiàn qiánbāo bújiàn le. Wǒ tèbié zhāojí, mǎshàng bǎ suǒyǒu kǒudài dōu jiǎnchá le yí biàn, dànshì méi zhǎo dào. Wǒ xiǎng kěnéng shì bèi rén tōu zǒu le, yě kěnéng shì zìjǐ bù xiǎoxīn diào le. Wǒ xiān huí chāoshì qù zhǎo, wèn le fúwùyuán yǒu méiyǒu rén jiǎn dào qiánbāo. Fúwùyuán shuō gāngcái yǒu rén bǎ yí ge qiánbāo jiāo dào le fúwù tái. Wǒ pǎo guòqù yí kàn, zhōngyú zhǎo dào le! Lǐmiàn de qián hé kǎ dōu hái zài. Qíshí shì wǒ gāngcái jiézhàng de shíhou bǎ qiánbāo wàng zài le guìtái shàng. Wǒ zhēn yīnggāi gǎi diào zhège diūsānlàsì de huài xíguàn. Zhè jiàn shì gěi le wǒ yí ge jiàoxun.
passages.text_en: Yesterday after I finished shopping at the supermarket, I suddenly realized my wallet was missing. I was extremely anxious and immediately checked all my pockets, but couldn't find it. I thought it might have been stolen, or maybe I carelessly dropped it. I first went back to the supermarket to look and asked the staff if anyone had found a wallet. The staff member said someone had just turned in a wallet at the service desk. I ran over to look, and finally found it! The money and cards inside were all still there. Actually, I had left my wallet on the counter when I was paying earlier. I really should break this bad habit of being scatterbrained. This incident taught me a lesson.

questions.q_zh: 钱包是怎么找到的？
questions.q_en: How was the wallet found?
questions.answer: 有人把钱包交到了超市的服务台。

questions.q_zh: 钱包其实在哪里？
questions.q_en: Where was the wallet actually?
questions.answer: 他结账的时候把钱包忘在了柜台上。

passages.title: Raising a Cat
passages.text_zh: 半年前我从宠物店领养了一只小猫。刚带回家的时候，它对周围的环境很不习惯，一直躲在床底下。我先把猫粮和水放在它旁边，然后耐心地等它出来。差不多过了三天，它终于不害怕了。现在它越来越活泼，每天在家里跑来跑去。虽然养猫需要花很多时间，但是它给我的生活带来了很多快乐。它总是在我工作的时候跳到我的桌子上。有时候它把我的东西弄到地上，让我又好气又好笑。对我来说，它不但是宠物，而且是家人。
passages.text_pinyin: Bàn nián qián wǒ cóng chǒngwù diàn lǐngyǎng le yì zhī xiǎo māo. Gāng dài huíjiā de shíhou, tā duì zhōuwéi de huánjìng hěn bù xíguàn, yìzhí duǒ zài chuáng dǐxia. Wǒ xiān bǎ māo liáng hé shuǐ fàng zài tā pángbiān, ránhòu nàixīn de děng tā chūlái. Chàbuduō guò le sān tiān, tā zhōngyú bú hàipà le. Xiànzài tā yuè lái yuè huópō, měi tiān zài jiālǐ pǎo lái pǎo qù. Suīrán yǎng māo xūyào huā hěn duō shíjiān, dànshì tā gěi wǒ de shēnghuó dài lái le hěn duō kuàilè. Tā zǒngshì zài wǒ gōngzuò de shíhou tiào dào wǒ de zhuōzi shàng. Yǒu shíhou tā bǎ wǒ de dōngxi nòng dào dìshang, ràng wǒ yòu hǎo qì yòu hǎo xiào. Duì wǒ lái shuō, tā búdàn shì chǒngwù, érqiě shì jiārén.
passages.text_en: Half a year ago I adopted a kitten from a pet store. When I first brought it home, it wasn't used to the surroundings and kept hiding under the bed. I first put cat food and water next to it, then patiently waited for it to come out. After about three days, it finally wasn't scared anymore. Now it's more and more lively, running around the house every day. Although raising a cat takes a lot of time, it has brought a lot of happiness to my life. It always jumps onto my desk when I'm working. Sometimes it knocks my things onto the floor, making me both annoyed and amused. For me, it's not just a pet, but also family.

questions.q_zh: 小猫刚到家的时候怎么样？
questions.q_en: How was the kitten when it first arrived home?
questions.answer: 它对周围的环境很不习惯，一直躲在床底下。

questions.q_zh: 他觉得养猫怎么样？
questions.q_en: What does he think about raising a cat?
questions.answer: 虽然需要花很多时间，但是它给他的生活带来了很多快乐。

passages.title: Surprise Birthday Party
passages.text_zh: 上周六是我好朋友的生日，我们几个朋友一起给他准备了一个惊喜派对。我们先商量了一下，然后把任务分好了：小王负责买蛋糕，小李负责布置房间，我把音乐和节目都准备好了。我们骗他说要去一家餐厅吃饭，其实是把他带到了小李家。他一打开门就被吓了一跳，看到那么多人特别感动。除了蛋糕以外，我们还准备了礼物。虽然准备派对花了不少时间，但是看到他那么开心，我们觉得一切都值得。他说这是他收到过的最好的生日礼物。
passages.text_pinyin: Shàng zhōuliù shì wǒ hǎo péngyou de shēngrì, wǒmen jǐ ge péngyou yìqǐ gěi tā zhǔnbèi le yí ge jīngxǐ pàiduì. Wǒmen xiān shāngliang le yíxià, ránhòu bǎ rènwu fēn hǎo le: Xiǎo Wáng fùzé mǎi dàngāo, Xiǎo Lǐ fùzé bùzhì fángjiān, wǒ bǎ yīnyuè hé jiémù dōu zhǔnbèi hǎo le. Wǒmen piàn tā shuō yào qù yì jiā cāntīng chīfàn, qíshí shì bǎ tā dài dào le Xiǎo Lǐ jiā. Tā yì dǎkāi mén jiù bèi xià le yí tiào, kàn dào nàme duō rén tèbié gǎndòng. Chúle dàngāo yǐwài, wǒmen hái zhǔnbèi le lǐwù. Suīrán zhǔnbèi pàiduì huā le bù shǎo shíjiān, dànshì kàn dào tā nàme kāixīn, wǒmen juéde yíqiè dōu zhídé. Tā shuō zhè shì tā shōu dào guò de zuì hǎo de shēngrì lǐwù.
passages.text_en: Last Saturday was my good friend's birthday, and several of us prepared a surprise party for him. We first discussed it, then divided up the tasks: Xiao Wang was in charge of buying the cake, Xiao Li was in charge of decorating the room, and I prepared all the music and entertainment. We tricked him by saying we were going to a restaurant, but actually brought him to Xiao Li's house. The moment he opened the door he was startled, and seeing so many people he was very touched. Besides the cake, we also prepared gifts. Although preparing the party took a lot of time, seeing him so happy, we felt it was all worth it. He said this was the best birthday gift he had ever received.

questions.q_zh: 他们是怎么分任务的？
questions.q_en: How did they divide up the tasks?
questions.answer: 小王买蛋糕，小李布置房间，他准备音乐和节目。

questions.q_zh: 他打开门以后怎么样？
questions.q_en: What happened when he opened the door?
questions.answer: 他被吓了一跳，看到那么多人特别感动。

passages.title: The Marathon
passages.text_zh: 今年我给自己定了一个目标：跑一次马拉松。以前我几乎不运动，跑几分钟就累得不行了。但是我决定改变自己的生活，所以制定了一个训练计划。我每天先跑三公里，然后慢慢增加距离。刚开始特别辛苦，腿被跑得又酸又疼。朋友说我坚持不了，但是我一直没有放弃。经过半年的训练，我终于完成了第一次马拉松。虽然跑得很慢，但是我把全程都跑完了。这次经验告诉我，只要有好的计划，再加上坚持，什么事都能做到。
passages.text_pinyin: Jīnnián wǒ gěi zìjǐ dìng le yí ge mùbiāo: pǎo yí cì mǎlāsōng. Yǐqián wǒ jīhū bú yùndòng, pǎo jǐ fēnzhōng jiù lèi de bùxíng le. Dànshì wǒ juédìng gǎibiàn zìjǐ de shēnghuó, suǒyǐ zhìdìng le yí ge xùnliàn jìhuà. Wǒ měi tiān xiān pǎo sān gōnglǐ, ránhòu mànmàn zēngjiā jùlí. Gāng kāishǐ tèbié xīnkǔ, tuǐ bèi pǎo de yòu suān yòu téng. Péngyou shuō wǒ jiānchí bù liǎo, dànshì wǒ yìzhí méiyǒu fàngqì. Jīngguò bàn nián de xùnliàn, wǒ zhōngyú wánchéng le dì yī cì mǎlāsōng. Suīrán pǎo de hěn màn, dànshì wǒ bǎ quánchéng dōu pǎo wán le. Zhè cì jīngyàn gàosu wǒ, zhǐyào yǒu hǎo de jìhuà, zài jiāshàng jiānchí, shénme shì dōu néng zuò dào.
passages.text_en: This year I set a goal for myself: run a marathon. Before, I almost never exercised, and I'd be exhausted after running just a few minutes. But I decided to change my life, so I made a training plan. I first ran three kilometers each day, then gradually increased the distance. It was especially tough at the beginning — my legs were both sore and painful from running. Friends said I couldn't keep it up, but I never gave up. After half a year of training, I finally completed my first marathon. Although I ran very slowly, I finished the entire course. This experience told me that as long as you have a good plan plus persistence, you can accomplish anything.

questions.q_zh: 他以前的运动情况怎么样？
questions.q_en: What was his exercise situation like before?
questions.answer: 他以前几乎不运动，跑几分钟就累得不行了。

questions.q_zh: 这次经验告诉他什么？
questions.q_en: What did this experience teach him?
questions.answer: 只要有好的计划，再加上坚持，什么事都能做到。

passages.title: The New Restaurant
passages.text_zh: 我家附近新开了一家餐厅，听说又好吃又不贵。昨天晚上我和同事一起去尝了尝。餐厅的环境不错，服务员的态度也很好。我们先点了几个菜，然后一边吃一边聊天。其中一道鱼做得特别好吃，差不多是我吃过最好的。但是有一道菜被放了太多辣椒，辣得我受不了。虽然有些菜太辣了，但是整体来说还是很不错的。服务员建议我们下次来可以说不要太辣。除了菜以外，他们的甜点也很有特色。我打算把这家餐厅推荐给其他朋友。
passages.text_pinyin: Wǒ jiā fùjìn xīn kāi le yì jiā cāntīng, tīngshuō yòu hǎochī yòu bú guì. Zuótiān wǎnshang wǒ hé tóngshì yìqǐ qù cháng le cháng. Cāntīng de huánjìng búcuò, fúwùyuán de tàidu yě hěn hǎo. Wǒmen xiān diǎn le jǐ ge cài, ránhòu yìbiān chī yìbiān liáotiān. Qízhōng yí dào yú zuò de tèbié hǎochī, chàbuduō shì wǒ chī guò zuì hǎo de. Dànshì yǒu yí dào cài bèi fàng le tài duō làjiāo, là de wǒ shòu bù liǎo. Suīrán yǒuxiē cài tài là le, dànshì zhěngtǐ lái shuō háishi hěn búcuò de. Fúwùyuán jiànyì wǒmen xià cì lái kěyǐ shuō bú yào tài là. Chúle cài yǐwài, tāmen de tiándiǎn yě hěn yǒu tèsè. Wǒ dǎsuàn bǎ zhè jiā cāntīng tuījiàn gěi qítā péngyou.
passages.text_en: A new restaurant opened near my home, and I heard it's both delicious and affordable. Last night my colleague and I went to try it out. The restaurant's environment was nice, and the servers' attitude was very good. We first ordered a few dishes, then ate while chatting. One fish dish was especially delicious — probably the best I've ever had. But one dish had too much chili pepper added to it, so spicy I couldn't stand it. Although some dishes were too spicy, overall it was still very good. The server suggested we can ask for less spice next time. Besides the main dishes, their desserts are also quite unique. I plan to recommend this restaurant to other friends.

questions.q_zh: 那道鱼怎么样？
questions.q_en: How was the fish dish?
questions.answer: 那道鱼做得特别好吃，差不多是他吃过最好的。

questions.q_zh: 有一道菜有什么问题？
questions.q_en: What was the problem with one of the dishes?
questions.answer: 那道菜被放了太多辣椒，太辣了。

passages.title: Moving to a New City
passages.text_zh: 因为工作的关系，我去年搬到了上海。刚来的时候，我对这里的一切都不习惯。上海又大又忙，到处都是人。我先把住的地方找好了，然后开始熟悉周围的环境。除了工作以外，我还要学习本地的方言和文化。其实上海人很热情，邻居经常帮我的忙。我的同事也对我很好，不但教我工作上的事，而且带我去吃好吃的。现在我已经越来越喜欢这个城市了。虽然我有时候还是会想家，但是我觉得来上海是一个正确的决定。这里给了我很多新的机会。
passages.text_pinyin: Yīnwèi gōngzuò de guānxi, wǒ qùnián bān dào le Shànghǎi. Gāng lái de shíhou, wǒ duì zhèlǐ de yíqiè dōu bù xíguàn. Shànghǎi yòu dà yòu máng, dàochù dōu shì rén. Wǒ xiān bǎ zhù de dìfang zhǎo hǎo le, ránhòu kāishǐ shúxī zhōuwéi de huánjìng. Chúle gōngzuò yǐwài, wǒ hái yào xuéxí běndì de fāngyán hé wénhuà. Qíshí Shànghǎi rén hěn rèqíng, línjū jīngcháng bāng wǒ de máng. Wǒ de tóngshì yě duì wǒ hěn hǎo, búdàn jiāo wǒ gōngzuò shàng de shì, érqiě dài wǒ qù chī hǎochī de. Xiànzài wǒ yǐjīng yuè lái yuè xǐhuan zhège chéngshì le. Suīrán wǒ yǒu shíhou háishi huì xiǎng jiā, dànshì wǒ juéde lái Shànghǎi shì yí ge zhèngquè de juédìng. Zhèlǐ gěi le wǒ hěn duō xīn de jīhuì.
passages.text_en: Because of work, I moved to Shanghai last year. When I first arrived, I wasn't used to anything here. Shanghai is both big and busy, with people everywhere. I first found a place to live, then started getting familiar with the surroundings. Besides work, I also had to learn the local dialect and culture. Actually, Shanghai people are very warm — my neighbors often help me out. My colleagues are also very nice to me: they not only teach me work-related things, but also take me to eat good food. Now I like this city more and more. Although I sometimes still miss home, I think coming to Shanghai was a correct decision. This place has given me many new opportunities.

questions.q_zh: 他为什么搬到了上海？
questions.q_en: Why did he move to Shanghai?
questions.answer: 因为工作的关系。

questions.q_zh: 他的同事怎么帮助他？
questions.q_en: How do his colleagues help him?
questions.answer: 同事不但教他工作上的事，而且带他去吃好吃的。

passages.title: Online Shopping
passages.text_zh: 现在越来越多的人喜欢在网上购物。我妈妈以前总是去商店买东西，但是最近她也开始在网上买了。她觉得网上的东西不但种类多，而且价格比商店便宜。上周她在网上买了一件衣服，但是收到以后发现颜色和图片上的不一样。她想把衣服退回去，但是不知道怎么操作。我帮她把退货的流程都弄好了。其实网上购物虽然方便，但是也有一些问题。比如你没办法先试一试，只能看照片。对我妈妈来说，她还是更习惯去商店。不过她说只要多买几次就能习惯了。
passages.text_pinyin: Xiànzài yuè lái yuè duō de rén xǐhuan zài wǎng shàng gòuwù. Wǒ māma yǐqián zǒngshì qù shāngdiàn mǎi dōngxi, dànshì zuìjìn tā yě kāishǐ zài wǎng shàng mǎi le. Tā juéde wǎng shàng de dōngxi búdàn zhǒnglèi duō, érqiě jiàgé bǐ shāngdiàn piányi. Shàng zhōu tā zài wǎng shàng mǎi le yí jiàn yīfu, dànshì shōu dào yǐhòu fāxiàn yánsè hé túpiàn shàng de bù yíyàng. Tā xiǎng bǎ yīfu tuì huíqu, dànshì bù zhīdào zěnme cāozuò. Wǒ bāng tā bǎ tuìhuò de liúchéng dōu nòng hǎo le. Qíshí wǎng shàng gòuwù suīrán fāngbiàn, dànshì yě yǒu yìxiē wèntí. Bǐrú nǐ méi bànfǎ xiān shì yi shì, zhǐ néng kàn zhàopiàn. Duì wǒ māma lái shuō, tā háishi gèng xíguàn qù shāngdiàn. Búguò tā shuō zhǐyào duō mǎi jǐ cì jiù néng xíguàn le.
passages.text_en: Now more and more people like shopping online. My mom used to always go to stores to buy things, but recently she also started buying online. She thinks things online not only have more variety, but are also cheaper than in stores. Last week she bought a piece of clothing online, but after receiving it she found the color was different from the picture. She wanted to return the clothes, but didn't know how to do it. I helped her get the return process all sorted out. Actually, although online shopping is convenient, it also has some problems. For example, you can't try things on first — you can only look at photos. For my mom, she's still more used to going to stores. But she says as long as she buys a few more times, she'll get used to it.

questions.q_zh: 妈妈买的衣服有什么问题？
questions.q_en: What was the problem with the clothes mom bought?
questions.answer: 收到以后发现颜色和图片上的不一样。

questions.q_zh: 网上购物有什么缺点？
questions.q_en: What are the downsides of online shopping?
questions.answer: 没办法先试一试，只能看照片。

passages.title: A Business Trip
passages.text_zh: 上个月公司派我去上海出差。这是我第一次去上海，心里既兴奋又紧张。到了上海以后，我发现那里的交通非常方便，地铁几乎可以到任何地方。我住的酒店离客户的公司不远，走路大概十五分钟。会议进行得很顺利，客户对我们的方案非常满意。出差结束后，我还抽空去了外滩，那里的夜景真是太美了。
passages.text_pinyin: Shàng gè yuè gōngsī pài wǒ qù Shànghǎi chūchāi. Zhè shì wǒ dì yī cì qù Shànghǎi, xīnli jì xīngfèn yòu jǐnzhāng. Dàole Shànghǎi yǐhòu, wǒ fāxiàn nàlǐ de jiāotōng fēicháng fāngbiàn, dìtiě jīhū kěyǐ dào rènhé dìfang. Wǒ zhù de jiǔdiàn lí kèhù de gōngsī bù yuǎn, zǒulù dàgài shíwǔ fēnzhōng. Huìyì jìnxíng de hěn shùnlì, kèhù duì wǒmen de fāng'àn fēicháng mǎnyì. Chūchāi jiéshù hòu, wǒ hái chōukòng qùle Wàitān, nàlǐ de yèjǐng zhēnshi tài měi le.
passages.text_en: Last month the company sent me to Shanghai on a business trip. It was my first time in Shanghai, and I felt both excited and nervous. After arriving, I found that the transportation there is very convenient — the subway can take you almost anywhere. The hotel I stayed at wasn't far from the client's company, about a fifteen-minute walk. The meeting went very smoothly, and the client was very satisfied with our proposal. After the trip ended, I found time to visit the Bund — the night view there was really beautiful.

questions.q_zh: 他为什么去上海？
questions.q_en: Why did he go to Shanghai?
questions.answer: 公司派他去上海出差。

questions.q_zh: 客户对他们的方案怎么看？
questions.q_en: What did the client think of their proposal?
questions.answer: 客户对方案非常满意。

passages.title: The New Neighbor
passages.text_zh: 昨天楼上搬来了一位新邻居。他大概三十多岁，看起来很友好。他一个人搬了很多箱子，我主动上去帮忙。搬完以后，他请我进去坐坐，还给我倒了一杯茶。我们聊了很久，我发现他是一位记者，经常需要到各地采访。他说他以前住在广州，因为工作调动才搬到这里来。我觉得能有这样一位邻居真不错。
passages.text_pinyin: Zuótiān lóu shàng bānláile yí wèi xīn línjū. Tā dàgài sānshí duō suì, kàn qǐlái hěn yǒuhǎo. Tā yí gè rén bānle hěn duō xiāngzi, wǒ zhǔdòng shàngqù bāngmáng. Bānwán yǐhòu, tā qǐng wǒ jìnqù zuòzuo, hái gěi wǒ dàole yì bēi chá. Wǒmen liáole hěn jiǔ, wǒ fāxiàn tā shì yí wèi jìzhě, jīngcháng xūyào dào gèdì cǎifǎng. Tā shuō tā yǐqián zhù zài Guǎngzhōu, yīnwèi gōngzuò diàodòng cái bān dào zhèlǐ lái. Wǒ juéde néng yǒu zhèyàng yí wèi línjū zhēn búcuò.
passages.text_en: Yesterday a new neighbor moved in upstairs. He's probably in his thirties and seems very friendly. He was moving many boxes by himself, so I took the initiative to go help. After we finished moving, he invited me in to sit for a while and poured me a cup of tea. We chatted for a long time, and I found out he's a journalist who often needs to travel to different places for interviews. He said he used to live in Guangzhou and moved here because of a work transfer. I think it's really nice to have a neighbor like him.

questions.q_zh: 新邻居是做什么工作的？
questions.q_en: What does the new neighbor do for work?
questions.answer: 他是一位记者。

questions.q_zh: 他以前住在哪里？
questions.q_en: Where did he live before?
questions.answer: 他以前住在广州。

passages.title: Stuck in Traffic
passages.text_zh: 今天早上我遇到了严重的堵车。平时从家到公司只要半个小时，今天却花了一个半小时。原来是前面发生了一起交通事故，两辆车撞在了一起。警察很快就到了现场，但是路上的车太多了，根本走不动。我打电话跟老板解释了情况，他让我不用着急。到了公司以后，同事们都在讨论这件事。大家都觉得这个城市的交通问题越来越严重了。
passages.text_pinyin: Jīntiān zǎoshang wǒ yùdàole yánzhòng de dǔchē. Píngshí cóng jiā dào gōngsī zhǐ yào bàn gè xiǎoshí, jīntiān què huāle yí gè bàn xiǎoshí. Yuánlái shì qiánmiàn fāshēngle yì qǐ jiāotōng shìgù, liǎng liàng chē zhuàng zài le yìqǐ. Jǐngchá hěn kuài jiù dàole xiànchǎng, dànshì lù shàng de chē tài duō le, gēnběn zǒu bú dòng. Wǒ dǎ diànhuà gēn lǎobǎn jiěshìle qíngkuàng, tā ràng wǒ búyòng zháojí. Dàole gōngsī yǐhòu, tóngshìmen dōu zài tǎolùn zhè jiàn shì. Dàjiā dōu juéde zhège chéngshì de jiāotōng wèntí yuè lái yuè yánzhòng le.
passages.text_en: This morning I ran into a terrible traffic jam. Usually it only takes half an hour from home to the office, but today it took an hour and a half. It turned out there was a traffic accident ahead — two cars had crashed into each other. The police arrived at the scene quickly, but there were too many cars on the road and they couldn't move at all. I called my boss to explain the situation, and he told me not to worry. After arriving at the office, my colleagues were all discussing the incident. Everyone felt that this city's traffic problems are getting more and more serious.

questions.q_zh: 为什么今天堵车那么严重？
questions.q_en: Why was the traffic so bad today?
questions.answer: 前面发生了一起交通事故。

questions.q_zh: 老板听到情况后怎么说？
questions.q_en: What did the boss say after hearing the situation?
questions.answer: 老板让他不用着急。

passages.title: A Job Interview
passages.text_zh: 小李大学毕业后一直在找工作。上周他终于收到了一家大公司的面试通知。为了准备面试，他花了三天时间了解这家公司的情况，还让朋友帮他练习回答问题。面试那天，他穿了一身正式的衣服，提前半小时到了公司。面试官问了他很多问题，比如以前的实习经历和对未来的规划。小李回答得很自信，面试官看起来也很满意。三天后他收到了录用通知，他非常高兴。
passages.text_pinyin: Xiǎo Lǐ dàxué bìyè hòu yìzhí zài zhǎo gōngzuò. Shàng zhōu tā zhōngyú shōudàole yì jiā dà gōngsī de miànshì tōngzhī. Wèile zhǔnbèi miànshì, tā huāle sān tiān shíjiān liǎojiě zhè jiā gōngsī de qíngkuàng, hái ràng péngyou bāng tā liànxí huídá wèntí. Miànshì nà tiān, tā chuānle yì shēn zhèngshì de yīfu, tíqián bàn xiǎoshí dàole gōngsī. Miànshìguān wènle tā hěn duō wèntí, bǐrú yǐqián de shíxí jīnglì hé duì wèilái de guīhuà. Xiǎo Lǐ huídá de hěn zìxìn, miànshìguān kàn qǐlái yě hěn mǎnyì. Sān tiān hòu tā shōudàole lùyòng tōngzhī, tā fēicháng gāoxìng.
passages.text_en: After graduating from university, Xiao Li had been looking for a job. Last week he finally received an interview notice from a large company. To prepare for the interview, he spent three days learning about the company's background and had a friend help him practice answering questions. On the day of the interview, he wore formal clothes and arrived at the company half an hour early. The interviewer asked him many questions, such as his previous internship experience and future plans. Xiao Li answered confidently, and the interviewer seemed satisfied. Three days later he received a job offer, and he was very happy.

questions.q_zh: 小李怎么准备面试的？
questions.q_en: How did Xiao Li prepare for the interview?
questions.answer: 他花了三天了解公司的情况，还让朋友帮他练习回答问题。

questions.q_zh: 面试结果怎么样？
questions.q_en: What was the result of the interview?
questions.answer: 三天后他收到了录用通知。

passages.title: A Cooking Class
passages.text_zh: 为了学做中国菜，我报名参加了一个烹饪课。每个周六下午，我们跟一位经验丰富的厨师学做不同的菜。第一节课我们学的是宫保鸡丁，需要用到鸡肉、花生和辣椒。老师先给我们示范了一遍，然后让我们自己动手做。我切菜的速度太慢了，而且火候掌握得不好，最后做出来的味道不太对。不过老师鼓励我说，多练几次就会好的。
passages.text_pinyin: Wèile xué zuò Zhōngguó cài, wǒ bàomíng cānjiāle yí gè pēngrèn kè. Měi gè zhōuliù xiàwǔ, wǒmen gēn yí wèi jīngyàn fēngfù de chúshī xué zuò bùtóng de cài. Dì yī jié kè wǒmen xué de shì Gōngbǎo Jīdīng, xūyào yòng dào jīròu, huāshēng hé làjiāo. Lǎoshī xiān gěi wǒmen shìfànle yí biàn, ránhòu ràng wǒmen zìjǐ dòngshǒu zuò. Wǒ qiē cài de sùdù tài màn le, érqiě huǒhòu zhǎngwò de bù hǎo, zuìhòu zuò chūlái de wèidao bú tài duì. Búguò lǎoshī gǔlì wǒ shuō, duō liàn jǐ cì jiù huì hǎo de.
passages.text_en: To learn how to cook Chinese food, I signed up for a cooking class. Every Saturday afternoon, we learn to make different dishes with an experienced chef. Our first lesson was Kung Pao Chicken, which requires chicken, peanuts, and chili peppers. The teacher demonstrated once for us, then let us do it ourselves. I chopped the ingredients too slowly and didn't control the heat well, so the final taste wasn't quite right. But the teacher encouraged me, saying it would get better with more practice.

questions.q_zh: 第一节课学做什么菜？
questions.q_en: What dish did they learn in the first class?
questions.answer: 宫保鸡丁。

questions.q_zh: 他做菜遇到了什么问题？
questions.q_en: What problems did he have cooking?
questions.answer: 切菜的速度太慢了，而且火候掌握得不好。

passages.title: A Rainy Day
passages.text_zh: 今天突然下起了大雨，我出门的时候忘了带伞。走到地铁站的时候，我的衣服已经湿透了。在地铁上，旁边的一位女士递给我一包纸巾，我非常感谢她。到了公司以后，同事借给我一件干的外套。下午雨停了，太阳出来了，外面还出现了一道彩虹。大家都跑到窗户旁边拍照。虽然早上淋了雨，但是看到彩虹的时候，我的心情一下子好了起来。
passages.text_pinyin: Jīntiān tūrán xiàqǐle dà yǔ, wǒ chūmén de shíhou wàngle dài sǎn. Zǒu dào dìtiě zhàn de shíhou, wǒ de yīfu yǐjīng shī tòu le. Zài dìtiě shàng, pángbiān de yí wèi nǚshì dìgěi wǒ yì bāo zhǐjīn, wǒ fēicháng gǎnxiè tā. Dàole gōngsī yǐhòu, tóngshì jiègeǐ wǒ yí jiàn gān de wàitào. Xiàwǔ yǔ tíng le, tàiyáng chūlái le, wàimiàn hái chūxiànle yí dào cǎihóng. Dàjiā dōu pǎo dào chuānghù pángbiān pāizhào. Suīrán zǎoshang línle yǔ, dànshì kàn dào cǎihóng de shíhou, wǒ de xīnqíng yíxiàzi hǎole qǐlái.
passages.text_en: It suddenly started raining heavily today, and I forgot to bring an umbrella when I left home. By the time I reached the subway station, my clothes were soaked through.
