On the subway, a woman next to me handed me a pack of tissues, and I was very grateful to her. After arriving at the office, a colleague lent me a dry jacket. In the afternoon the rain stopped, the sun came out, and a rainbow appeared outside. Everyone ran to the windows to take photos. Although I got rained on in the morning, when I saw the rainbow, my mood immediately improved.

questions.q_zh: 在地铁上谁帮助了他？
questions.q_en: Who helped him on the subway?
questions.answer: 旁边的一位女士递给他一包纸巾。

questions.q_zh: 下午发生了什么让大家高兴的事？
questions.q_en: What happened in the afternoon that made everyone happy?
questions.answer: 雨停了，外面出现了一道彩虹。

passages.title: Going to the Gym
passages.text_zh: 最近我觉得身体越来越差，经常感到很累，所以决定开始锻炼身体。我在家附近找到了一家健身房，办了一张半年的会员卡。教练帮我制定了一个训练计划，每周去三次，每次大约一个小时。刚开始的时候非常辛苦，第二天全身都疼。坚持了一个月以后，我明显感觉到身体变好了，睡眠质量也提高了不少。现在去健身已经成了我生活中很重要的一部分。
passages.text_pinyin: Zuìjìn wǒ juéde shēntǐ yuè lái yuè chà, jīngcháng gǎndào hěn lèi, suǒyǐ juédìng kāishǐ duànliàn shēntǐ. Wǒ zài jiā fùjìn zhǎodàole yì jiā jiànshēnfáng, bànle yì zhāng bàn nián de huìyuán kǎ. Jiàoliàn bāng wǒ zhìdìngle yí gè xùnliàn jìhuà, měi zhōu qù sān cì, měi cì dàyuē yí gè xiǎoshí. Gāng kāishǐ de shíhou fēicháng xīnkǔ, dì èr tiān quánshēn dōu téng. Jiānchíle yí gè yuè yǐhòu, wǒ míngxiǎn gǎnjué dào shēntǐ biàn hǎo le, shuìmián zhìliàng yě tígāole bù shǎo. Xiànzài qù jiànshēn yǐjīng chéngle wǒ shēnghuó zhōng hěn zhòngyào de yí bùfen.
passages.text_en: Recently I felt my health was getting worse and I often felt tired, so I decided to start exercising. I found a gym near my home and got a six-month membership card. The trainer helped me create a workout plan — three times a week, about an hour each time. It was very tough at the beginning, and my whole body ached the next day. After persisting for a month, I clearly felt my body had improved, and my sleep quality had also gotten much better. Now going to the gym has become a very important part of my life.

questions.q_zh: 他为什么决定开始锻炼？
questions.q_en: Why did he decide to start exercising?
questions.answer: 因为他觉得身体越来越差，经常感到很累。

questions.q_zh: 坚持一个月以后有什么变化？
questions.q_en: What changed after persisting for a month?
questions.answer: 身体变好了，睡眠质量也提高了。

passages.title: A News Report
passages.text_zh: 昨天晚上看新闻的时候，我看到一条关于环保的报道。一位六十多岁的老人坚持在河边捡垃圾已经十年了。他说小时候这条河的水很清澈，但是后来工厂越来越多，河水变得很脏。从那以后他就开始清理河边的垃圾。刚开始只有他一个人，后来越来越多的志愿者加入了他的行动。现在河水比以前干净多了，还有鱼回来了。这条新闻让我非常感动。
passages.text_pinyin: Zuótiān wǎnshang kàn xīnwén de shíhou, wǒ kàndào yì tiáo guānyú huánbǎo de bàodào. Yí wèi liùshí duō suì de lǎorén jiānchí zài hé biān jiǎn lājī yǐjīng shí nián le. Tā shuō xiǎo shíhou zhè tiáo hé de shuǐ hěn qīngchè, dànshì hòulái gōngchǎng yuè lái yuè duō, héshuǐ biàn de hěn zāng. Cóng nà yǐhòu tā jiù kāishǐ qīnglǐ hé biān de lājī. Gāng kāishǐ zhǐ yǒu tā yí gè rén, hòulái yuè lái yuè duō de zhìyuànzhě jiārùle tā de xíngdòng. Xiànzài héshuǐ bǐ yǐqián gānjìng duō le, hái yǒu yú huílái le. Zhè tiáo xīnwén ràng wǒ fēicháng gǎndòng.
passages.text_en: While watching the news last night, I saw a report about environmental protection. A man in his sixties has been picking up trash by the river for ten years. He said when he was young, the water in this river was very clear, but later more and more factories appeared and the river became very dirty. Since then he started cleaning up the trash along the river. At first it was just him alone, but gradually more and more volunteers joined his effort. Now the river water is much cleaner than before, and fish have even come back. This news report really moved me.

questions.q_zh: 老人为什么开始清理河边垃圾？
questions.q_en: Why did the old man start cleaning up trash by the river?
questions.answer: 因为工厂越来越多，河水变得很脏。

questions.q_zh: 现在河水怎么样了？
questions.q_en: What is the river like now?
questions.answer: 河水比以前干净多了，还有鱼回来了。

passages.title: Lost Phone
passages.text_zh: 昨天下午我不小心把手机丢了。我记得最后一次用手机是在咖啡店，可能是走的时候忘在了桌子上。我马上跑回去找，但是已经不在了。服务员说没有看到。我心里非常着急，因为手机里有很多重要的信息和照片。回到家以后，我用电脑登录了手机的定位功能，发现手机在一家商场附近。我赶紧过去，最后在商场的服务台找到了，原来是有人捡到以后交给了工作人员。
passages.text_pinyin: Zuótiān xiàwǔ wǒ bù xiǎoxīn bǎ shǒujī diū le. Wǒ jìde zuìhòu yí cì yòng shǒujī shì zài kāfēi diàn, kěnéng shì zǒu de shíhou wàng zài le zhuōzi shàng. Wǒ mǎshàng pǎo huíqu zhǎo, dànshì yǐjīng bú zài le. Fúwùyuán shuō méiyǒu kàndào. Wǒ xīnli fēicháng zháojí, yīnwèi shǒujī lǐ yǒu hěn duō zhòngyào de xìnxī hé zhàopiàn. Huí dào jiā yǐhòu, wǒ yòng diànnǎo dēnglùle shǒujī de dìngwèi gōngnéng, fāxiàn shǒujī zài yì jiā shāngchǎng fùjìn. Wǒ gǎnjǐn guòqù, zuìhòu zài shāngchǎng de fúwù tái zhǎodào le, yuánlái shì yǒu rén jiǎn dào yǐhòu jiāogěile gōngzuò rényuán.
passages.text_en: Yesterday afternoon I accidentally lost my phone. I remembered the last time I used it was at a coffee shop — I might have left it on the table when I left. I immediately ran back to look, but it was already gone. The waiter said they hadn't seen it. I was very anxious because the phone had a lot of important information and photos. After getting home, I used my computer to log into the phone's location service and found it was near a shopping mall. I hurried over and finally found it at the mall's service desk — someone had picked it up and given it to the staff.

questions.q_zh: 他怎么找到手机的？
questions.q_en: How did he find his phone?
questions.answer: 他用电脑登录了手机的定位功能。

questions.q_zh: 手机最后在哪里？
questions.q_en: Where was the phone in the end?
questions.answer: 在商场的服务台，有人捡到后交给了工作人员。

passages.title: Online Classes
passages.text_zh: 最近因为天气不好，学校决定让学生在家上网课。刚开始大家觉得挺方便的，不用早起赶去学校，在家里穿着睡衣就能上课。但是上了几天以后，很多同学发现自己很难集中注意力。家里的环境跟教室不一样，总是会被其他事情吸引。老师也觉得跟学生互动不太方便，没办法看到每个人的表情。虽然网课有好处，但是大部分人还是觉得去学校上课效果更好。
passages.text_pinyin: Zuìjìn yīnwèi tiānqì bù hǎo, xuéxiào juédìng ràng xuéshēng zài jiā shàng wǎng kè. Gāng kāishǐ dàjiā juéde tǐng fāngbiàn de, búyòng zǎoqǐ gǎn qù xuéxiào, zài jiā lǐ chuānzhe shuìyī jiù néng shàng kè. Dànshì shàngle jǐ tiān yǐhòu, hěn duō tóngxué fāxiàn zìjǐ hěn nán jízhōng zhùyìlì. Jiā lǐ de huánjìng gēn jiàoshì bù yíyàng, zǒngshì huì bèi qítā shìqíng xīyǐn. Lǎoshī yě juéde gēn xuéshēng hùdòng bú tài fāngbiàn, méi bànfǎ kàn dào měi gè rén de biǎoqíng. Suīrán wǎng kè yǒu hǎochù, dànshì dà bùfen rén háishi juéde qù xuéxiào shàng kè xiàoguǒ gèng hǎo.
passages.text_en: Recently, due to bad weather, the school decided to have students take classes online from home. At first everyone thought it was quite convenient — no need to get up early to rush to school, and you could attend class at home in your pajamas. But after a few days, many students found it hard to concentrate. The home environment is different from the classroom, and there are always other things that distract you. Teachers also felt it wasn't convenient to interact with students, as they couldn't see everyone's expressions. Although online classes have advantages, most people still think going to school for class is more effective.

questions.q_zh: 为什么学校让学生在家上课？
questions.q_en: Why did the school have students study from home?
questions.answer: 因为天气不好。

questions.q_zh: 网课的主要问题是什么？
questions.q_en: What is the main problem with online classes?
questions.answer: 学生很难集中注意力，老师跟学生互动不方便。

passages.title: The Weekend Market
passages.text_zh: 每个周末，我家附近都会有一个露天市场。市场上卖各种各样的东西，有新鲜的水果蔬菜，有手工做的饰品，还有各地的小吃。我最喜欢的是一个卖煎饼的摊位，那里的煎饼又便宜又好吃。每次去我都会买两个。市场上的人很多，非常热闹。有的人在挑选商品，有的人在讨价还价。逛这个市场已经成了我周末最开心的事情之一。
passages.text_pinyin: Měi gè zhōumò, wǒ jiā fùjìn dōu huì yǒu yí gè lùtiān shìchǎng. Shìchǎng shàng mài gèzhǒng gèyàng de dōngxi, yǒu xīnxiān de shuǐguǒ shūcài, yǒu shǒugōng zuò de shìpǐn, hái yǒu gèdì de xiǎochī. Wǒ zuì xǐhuan de shì yí gè mài jiānbing de tānwèi, nàlǐ de jiānbing yòu piányi yòu hǎochī. Měi cì qù wǒ dōu huì mǎi liǎng gè. Shìchǎng shàng de rén hěn duō, fēicháng rènao. Yǒude rén zài tiāoxuǎn shāngpǐn, yǒude rén zài tǎojià huánjià. Guàng zhège shìchǎng yǐjīng chéngle wǒ zhōumò zuì kāixīn de shìqíng zhī yī.
passages.text_en: Every weekend there is an open-air market near my home. The market sells all kinds of things — fresh fruits and vegetables, handmade accessories, and snacks from different regions. My favorite is a stall that sells jianbing — the jianbing there is both cheap and delicious. Every time I go I buy two. There are many people at the market, and it's very lively. Some people are picking out goods, some are haggling over prices. Visiting this market has become one of the happiest things I do on weekends.

questions.q_zh: 市场上卖什么？
questions.q_en: What does the market sell?
questions.answer: 水果蔬菜、手工饰品和各地的小吃。

questions.q_zh: 他最喜欢什么摊位？
questions.q_en: What is his favorite stall?
questions.answer: 卖煎饼的摊位。

passages.title: Moving to a New Apartment
passages.text_zh: 下个月我要搬家了。新的公寓比现在住的大一些，而且离地铁站更近。虽然房租贵了一点，但是我觉得很值得。这几天我一直在收拾东西，发现家里有好多不需要的东西，比如旧衣服和过期的杂志。我决定把旧衣服捐出去，杂志就直接扔掉。搬家那天我打算请几个朋友来帮忙，搬完以后请他们吃一顿饭。希望在新家的生活能更方便、更舒适。
passages.text_pinyin: Xià gè yuè wǒ yào bānjiā le. Xīn de gōngyù bǐ xiànzài zhù de dà yìxiē, érqiě lí dìtiě zhàn gèng jìn. Suīrán fángzū guìle yìdiǎn, dànshì wǒ juéde hěn zhíde. Zhè jǐ tiān wǒ yìzhí zài shōushi dōngxi, fāxiàn jiā lǐ yǒu hǎo duō bù xūyào de dōngxi, bǐrú jiù yīfu hé guòqī de zázhì. Wǒ juédìng bǎ jiù yīfu juān chūqù, zázhì jiù zhíjiē rēng diào. Bānjiā nà tiān wǒ dǎsuàn qǐng jǐ gè péngyou lái bāngmáng, bānwán yǐhòu qǐng tāmen chī yí dùn fàn. Xīwàng zài xīn jiā de shēnghuó néng gèng fāngbiàn, gèng shūshì.
passages.text_en: I'm moving next month. The new apartment is a bit bigger than where I live now, and it's closer to the subway station. Although the rent is a little more expensive, I think it's worth it. These past few days I've been packing things up and found there are a lot of things I don't need, such as old clothes and expired magazines. I decided to donate the old clothes and just throw away the magazines. On moving day I plan to ask a few friends to come help, and treat them to a meal afterwards. I hope life in the new home will be more convenient and comfortable.

questions.q_zh: 新公寓有什么好处？
questions.q_en: What are the advantages of the new apartment?
questions.answer: 比现在住的大一些，而且离地铁站更近。

questions.q_zh: 他打算怎么处理旧衣服？
questions.q_en: What does he plan to do with the old clothes?
questions.answer: 把旧衣服捐出去。

passages.title: Childhood Memory
passages.text_zh: 小时候我最喜欢的地方是奶奶家。每年暑假，爸爸妈妈都会把我送到奶奶家住一个月。奶奶家在一个小村子里，旁边有一条小河。白天我和村里的孩子们一起在河边玩，抓小鱼小虾。晚上奶奶会给我讲故事，我听着听着就睡着了。奶奶做的饭特别好吃，尤其是她包的饺子。现在我长大了，工作很忙，很少有时间回去看奶奶。每次想起那段日子，心里都觉得特别温暖。
passages.text_pinyin: Xiǎo shíhou wǒ zuì xǐhuan de dìfang shì nǎinai jiā. Měi nián shǔjià, bàba māma dōu huì bǎ wǒ sòng dào nǎinai jiā zhù yí gè yuè. Nǎinai jiā zài yí gè xiǎo cūnzi lǐ, pángbiān yǒu yì tiáo xiǎo hé. Báitiān wǒ hé cūn lǐ de háizimen yìqǐ zài hé biān wán, zhuā xiǎo yú xiǎo xiā. Wǎnshang nǎinai huì gěi wǒ jiǎng gùshi, wǒ tīngzhe tīngzhe jiù shuìzháo le. Nǎinai zuò de fàn tèbié hǎochī, yóuqí shì tā bāo de jiǎozi. Xiànzài wǒ zhǎngdà le, gōngzuò hěn máng, hěn shǎo yǒu shíjiān huíqù kàn nǎinai. Měi cì xiǎngqǐ nà duàn rìzi, xīnli dōu juéde tèbié wēnnuǎn.
passages.text_en: When I was little, my favorite place was Grandma's house. Every summer vacation, my parents would send me to stay at Grandma's for a month. Grandma lived in a small village with a little river nearby. During the day I'd play by the river with the village kids, catching small fish and shrimp. At night Grandma would tell me stories, and I'd fall asleep listening. Grandma's cooking was especially delicious, particularly the dumplings she made. Now I've grown up and work is busy, so I rarely have time to go back and visit Grandma. Every time I think of those days, my heart feels especially warm.

questions.q_zh: 他小时候暑假去哪里？
questions.q_en: Where did he go during summer vacation as a child?
questions.answer: 他去奶奶家住一个月。

questions.q_zh: 奶奶做什么最好吃？
questions.q_en: What did Grandma cook best?
questions.answer: 她包的饺子。

passages.title: My Dog
passages.text_zh: 两年前我养了一只小狗，给它取名叫豆豆。刚来的时候，它很小很瘦，胆子也特别小，看到陌生人就躲起来。我每天带它出去散步，慢慢地它变得活泼了许多。现在豆豆已经长大了，非常聪明。我教它的很多动作它都学会了，比如握手和翻身。每天我下班回到家，它都会摇着尾巴跑过来迎接我。养狗虽然需要花时间和精力，但是它给我带来了很多快乐，我觉得完全值得。
passages.text_pinyin: Liǎng nián qián wǒ yǎngle yì zhī xiǎo gǒu, gěi tā qǔmíng jiào Dòudou. Gāng lái de shíhou, tā hěn xiǎo hěn shòu, dǎnzi yě tèbié xiǎo, kàndào mòshēng rén jiù duǒ qǐlái. Wǒ měitiān dài tā chūqù sànbù, mànmàn de tā biàn de huópō le xǔduō. Xiànzài Dòudou yǐjīng zhǎngdà le, fēicháng cōngmíng. Wǒ jiāo tā de hěn duō dòngzuò tā dōu xuéhuì le, bǐrú wòshǒu hé fānshēn. Měitiān wǒ xiàbān huí dào jiā, tā dōu huì yáozhe wěiba pǎo guòlái yíngjiē wǒ. Yǎng gǒu suīrán xūyào huā shíjiān hé jīnglì, dànshì tā gěi wǒ dàiláile hěn duō kuàilè, wǒ juéde wánquán zhíde.
passages.text_en: Two years ago I got a little dog and named it Doudou. When it first came, it was very small and thin, and also very timid — it would hide when it saw strangers. I took it out for walks every day, and gradually it became much more lively. Now Doudou has grown up and is very clever. It has learned many of the tricks I taught it, like shaking hands and rolling over. Every day when I get home from work, it runs over wagging its tail to greet me. Although raising a dog takes time and energy, it has brought me a lot of happiness, and I think it's completely worth it.

questions.q_zh: 豆豆刚来的时候是什么样的？
questions.q_en: What was Doudou like when it first came?
questions.answer: 很小很瘦，胆子特别小。

questions.q_zh: 豆豆学会了什么动作？
questions.q_en: What tricks has Doudou learned?
questions.answer: 握手和翻身。

passages.title: Photography Hobby
passages.text_zh: 去年我开始学摄影。一开始我只用手机拍照，后来觉得手机拍出来的效果不够好，就买了一台专业的相机。刚开始用的时候，我根本不会调整参数，拍出来的照片不是太暗就是太亮。后来我在网上看了很多教程，也参加了一个摄影班，技术慢慢提高了。现在我最喜欢拍风景和街上的人。上个月我把一些作品发到了网上，没想到得到了很多人的点赞和评论，这让我非常有成就感。
passages.text_pinyin: Qùnián wǒ kāishǐ xué shèyǐng. Yì kāishǐ wǒ zhǐ yòng shǒujī pāizhào, hòulái juéde shǒujī pāi chūlái de xiàoguǒ bú gòu hǎo, jiù mǎile yì tái zhuānyè de xiàngjī. Gāng kāishǐ yòng de shíhou, wǒ gēnběn bú huì tiáozhěng cānshù, pāi chūlái de zhàopiàn búshì tài àn jiùshì tài liàng. Hòulái wǒ zài wǎng shàng kànle hěn duō jiàochéng, yě cānjiāle yí gè shèyǐng bān, jìshù mànmàn tígāo le. Xiànzài wǒ zuì xǐhuan pāi fēngjǐng hé jiē shàng de rén. Shàng gè yuè wǒ bǎ yìxiē zuòpǐn fā dàole wǎng shàng, méi xiǎngdào dédàole hěn duō rén de diǎnzàn hé pínglùn, zhè ràng wǒ fēicháng yǒu chéngjiù gǎn.
passages.text_en: Last year I started learning photography. At first I only used my phone to take pictures, but later I felt the phone's results weren't good enough, so I bought a professional camera. When I first started using it, I had no idea how to adjust the settings — the photos came out either too dark or too bright. Later I watched many tutorials online and took a photography class, and my skills gradually improved. Now my favorite subjects are landscapes and people on the street. Last month I posted some of my work online, and I didn't expect to get so many likes and comments — it gave me a great sense of accomplishment.

questions.q_zh: 他为什么买了专业相机？
questions.q_en: Why did he buy a professional camera?
questions.answer: 因为觉得手机拍出来的效果不够好。

questions.q_zh: 他现在最喜欢拍什么？
questions.q_en: What does he like to photograph now?
questions.answer: 风景和街上的人。

passages.title: Academic Pressure
passages.text_zh: 近年来，中国学生面临的学业压力引起了社会的广泛关注。从小学开始，许多孩子除了完成学校的作业之外，还要参加各种各样的课外辅导班。家长们望子成龙，总是担心孩子输在起跑线上。然而，过度的学习压力不仅影响了孩子的身心健康，也削弱了他们对学习的兴趣和创造力。一些教育专家指出，培养孩子的综合素质远比追求考试分数更为重要。如何在学习成绩与身心发展之间找到平衡，是当前教育界需要认真思考的问题。
passages.text_pinyin: Jìn niánlái, Zhōngguó xuéshēng miànlín de xuéyè yālì yǐnqǐle shèhuì de guǎngfàn guānzhù. Cóng xiǎoxué kāishǐ, xǔduō háizi chúle wánchéng xuéxiào de zuòyè zhīwài, hái yào cānjiā gèzhǒng gèyàng de kèwài fǔdǎo bān. Jiāzhǎngmen wàng zǐ chéng lóng, zǒngshì dānxīn háizi shū zài qǐpǎo xiàn shàng. Rán'ér, guòdù de xuéxí yālì bùjǐn yǐngxiǎngle háizi de shēnxīn jiànkāng, yě xuēruòle tāmen duì xuéxí de xìngqù hé chuàngzàolì. Yìxiē jiàoyù zhuānjiā zhǐchū, péiyǎng háizi de zōnghé sùzhì yuǎn bǐ zhuīqiú kǎoshì fēnshù gèng wéi zhòngyào. Rúhé zài xuéxí chéngjī yǔ shēnxīn fāzhǎn zhī jiān zhǎodào pínghéng, shì dāngqián jiàoyùjiè xūyào rènzhēn sīkǎo de wèntí.
passages.text_en: In recent years, the academic pressure facing Chinese students has attracted widespread social attention. Starting from primary school, many children attend various extracurricular tutoring classes in addition to completing schoolwork. Parents eager for their children to succeed always worry about them falling behind at the starting line. However, excessive study pressure not only affects children's physical and mental health but also undermines their interest in learning and creativity. Some education experts point out that cultivating children's comprehensive qualities is far more important than pursuing exam scores. How to find a balance between academic achievement and physical-mental development is an issue that the current education sector needs to seriously consider.

questions.q_zh: 家长为什么让孩子参加课外辅导班？
questions.q_en: Why do parents send children to extracurricular tutoring?
questions.answer: 因为家长望子成龙，担心孩子输在起跑线上。

questions.q_zh: 教育专家认为什么更重要？
questions.q_en: What do education experts think is more important?
questions.answer: 培养孩子的综合素质远比追求考试分数更重要。

passages.title: Remote Work Culture
passages.text_zh: 随着互联网技术的飞速发展，远程办公逐渐成为一种新的工作模式。越来越多的公司允许员工在家办公，甚至有些公司完全取消了固定的办公场所。支持者认为，远程办公可以节省通勤时间，提高工作效率，同时让员工拥有更灵活的时间安排。然而，反对的声音也不少。有人担心在家办公会导致工作和生活的界限模糊，使人很难真正休息。此外，缺乏面对面的交流也可能影响团队合作和企业文化的建设。总的来说，远程办公有利有弊，关键在于如何合理安排。
passages.text_pinyin: Suízhe hùliánwǎng jìshù de fēisù fāzhǎn, yuǎnchéng bàngōng zhújiàn chéngwéi yì zhǒng xīn de gōngzuò móshì. Yuè lái yuè duō de gōngsī yǔnxǔ yuángōng zài jiā bàngōng, shènzhì yǒuxiē gōngsī wánquán qǔxiāole gùdìng de bàngōng chǎngsuǒ. Zhīchí zhě rènwéi, yuǎnchéng bàngōng kěyǐ jiéshěng tōngqín shíjiān, tígāo gōngzuò xiàolǜ, tóngshí ràng yuángōng yōngyǒu gèng línghuó de shíjiān ānpái. Rán'ér, fǎnduì de shēngyīn yě bù shǎo. Yǒu rén dānxīn zài jiā bàngōng huì dǎozhì gōngzuò hé shēnghuó de jièxiàn móhu, shǐ rén hěn nán zhēnzhèng xiūxi. Cǐwài, quēfá miànduìmiàn de jiāoliú yě kěnéng yǐngxiǎng tuánduì hézuò hé qǐyè wénhuà de jiànshè. Zǒng de lái shuō, yuǎnchéng bàngōng yǒulì yǒubì, guānjiàn zàiyú rúhé hélǐ ānpái.
passages.text_en: With the rapid development of internet technology, remote work has gradually become a new work model. More and more companies allow employees to work from home, and some have even completely eliminated fixed office spaces. Supporters believe remote work saves commuting time, improves efficiency, and gives employees more flexible schedules. However, there are also many opposing voices. Some worry that working from home blurs the boundary between work and life, making it hard to truly rest. Additionally, the lack of face-to-face communication may affect teamwork and corporate culture building. Overall, remote work has both advantages and disadvantages — the key is how to arrange it reasonably.

questions.q_zh: 远程办公的好处是什么？
questions.q_en: What are the benefits of remote work?
questions.answer: 节省通勤时间，提高工作效率，时间安排更灵活。

questions.q_zh: 反对者担心什么？
questions.q_en: What are opponents worried about?
questions.answer: 工作和生活的界限模糊，缺乏面对面交流影响团队合作。

passages.title: Food Safety Concerns
passages.text_zh: 食品安全一直是公众关心的热点话题。尽管政府出台了一系列严格的法规来保障食品质量，但食品安全事件仍然时有发生。一方面，部分不良商家为了降低成本、增加利润，在食品生产过程中使用劣质原料甚至有害添加剂。另一方面，消费者在购买食品时往往缺乏辨别能力，容易被低价所吸引。专家建议，除了加强监管力度之外，还应该提高消费者的食品安全意识。只有政府、企业和消费者共同努力，才能从根本上解决食品安全问题。
passages.text_pinyin: Shípǐn ānquán yìzhí shì gōngzhòng guānxīn de rèdiǎn huàtí. Jǐnguǎn zhèngfǔ chūtáile yí xìliè yángé de fǎguī lái bǎozhàng shípǐn zhìliàng, dàn shípǐn ānquán shìjiàn réngrán shí yǒu fāshēng. Yì fāngmiàn, bùfen bùliáng shāngjiā wèile jiàngdī chéngběn, zēngjiā lìrùn, zài shípǐn shēngchǎn guòchéng zhōng shǐyòng lièzhì yuánliào shènzhì yǒuhài tiānjiājì. Lìng yì fāngmiàn, xiāofèi zhě zài gòumǎi shípǐn shí wǎngwǎng quēfá biànbié nénglì, róngyì bèi dījià suǒ xīyǐn. Zhuānjiā jiànyì, chúle jiāqiáng jiānguǎn lìdù zhīwài, hái yīnggāi tígāo xiāofèi zhě de shípǐn ānquán yìshí. Zhǐyǒu zhèngfǔ, qǐyè hé xiāofèi zhě gòngtóng nǔlì, cái néng cóng gēnběn shàng jiějué shípǐn ānquán wèntí.
passages.text_en: Food safety has always been a hot topic of public concern. Although the government has introduced a series of strict regulations to ensure food quality, food safety incidents still occur from time to time. On one hand, some unscrupulous businesses use inferior raw materials or even harmful additives in food production to reduce costs and increase profits. On the other hand, consumers often lack the ability to distinguish quality when purchasing food and are easily attracted by low prices. Experts suggest that in addition to strengthening supervision, consumer awareness of food safety should also be raised. Only through the joint efforts of government, businesses, and consumers can food safety issues be fundamentally resolved.

questions.q_zh: 不良商家为什么使用劣质原料？
questions.q_en: Why do unscrupulous businesses use inferior materials?
questions.answer: 为了降低成本、增加利润。

questions.q_zh: 专家建议怎么解决食品安全问题？
questions.q_en: How do experts suggest solving food safety issues?
questions.answer: 加强监管力度，提高消费者的食品安全意识，政府、企业和消费者共同努力。

passages.title: The Generation Gap
passages.text_zh: 代沟问题在每个家庭中或多或少都存在。随着社会的快速变化，年轻一代和父母一代在价值观、生活方式和消费理念上产生了明显的差异。比如，许多年轻人倾向于追求个人自由和独立，而老一辈则更看重家庭责任和传统观念。在消费方面，年轻人习惯使用移动支付、网上购物，而一些老人对新技术感到困惑甚至排斥。然而，代沟并不意味着无法沟通。关键在于双方都要学会站在对方的角度思考问题，尊重彼此的选择。通过耐心的交流和相互理解，不同代际之间完全可以建立和谐的关系。
passages.text_pinyin: Dàigōu wèntí zài měi gè jiātíng zhōng huò duō huò shǎo dōu cúnzài. Suízhe shèhuì de kuàisù biànhuà, niánqīng yí dài hé fùmǔ yí dài zài jiàzhíguān, shēnghuó fāngshì hé xiāofèi lǐniàn shàng chǎnshēngle míngxiǎn de chāyì. Bǐrú, xǔduō niánqīng rén qīngxiàng yú zhuīqiú gèrén zìyóu hé dúlì, ér lǎo yí bèi zé gèng kànzhòng jiātíng zérèn hé chuántǒng guānniàn. Zài xiāofèi fāngmiàn, niánqīng rén xíguàn shǐyòng yídòng zhīfù, wǎng shàng gòuwù, ér yìxiē lǎorén duì xīn jìshù gǎndào kùnhuò shènzhì páichì. Rán'ér, dàigōu bìng bù yìwèizhe wúfǎ gōutōng. Guānjiàn zàiyú shuāngfāng dōu yào xuéhuì zhàn zài duìfāng de jiǎodù sīkǎo wèntí, zūnzhòng bǐcǐ de xuǎnzé. Tōngguò nàixīn de jiāoliú hé xiānghù lǐjiě, bùtóng dàijì zhī jiān wánquán kěyǐ jiànlì héxié de guānxì.
passages.text_en: The generation gap exists to some extent in every family. With rapid social changes, the younger generation and their parents have developed obvious differences in values, lifestyles, and consumer attitudes. For example, many young people tend to pursue personal freedom and independence, while the older generation places more emphasis on family responsibility and traditional values. In terms of consumption, young people are used to mobile payment and online shopping, while some elderly people feel confused or even resistant toward new technology. However, the generation gap doesn't mean communication is impossible. The key is that both sides learn to think from the other's perspective and respect each other's choices. Through patient communication and mutual understanding, harmonious relationships can absolutely be built between different generations.

questions.q_zh: 年轻人和老一辈在什么方面有差异？
questions.q_en: In what areas do young people and older generations differ?
questions.answer: 价值观、生活方式和消费理念方面有明显差异。

questions.q_zh: 怎样才能缩小代沟？
questions.q_en: How can the generation gap be narrowed?
questions.answer: 双方学会站在对方角度思考问题，尊重彼此选择，耐心交流和相互理解。

passages.title: City vs. Countryside
passages.text_zh: 近年来，关于在城市生活还是在农村生活的讨论越来越多。城市提供了更多的就业机会、更好的教育资源和更丰富的文化生活。然而，城市生活也伴随着高房价、严重的污染和巨大的竞争压力。相比之下，农村的生活节奏较慢，空气清新，人与人之间的关系更加亲密。但农村也面临着基础设施不完善、医疗条件有限等问题。有趣的是，越来越多在城市打拼多年的人选择回到农村创业，利用互联网发展电子商务。这种趋势不仅为农村带来了经济活力，也为城乡发展的平衡提供了新的思路。
passages.text_pinyin: Jìn niánlái, guānyú zài chéngshì shēnghuó háishi zài nóngcūn shēnghuó de tǎolùn yuè lái yuè duō. Chéngshì tígōngle gèng duō de jiùyè jīhuì, gèng hǎo de jiàoyù zīyuán hé gèng fēngfù de wénhuà shēnghuó. Rán'ér, chéngshì shēnghuó yě bànsuízhe gāo fángjià, yánzhòng de wūrǎn hé jùdà de jìngzhēng yālì. Xiāngbǐ zhī xià, nóngcūn de shēnghuó jiézòu jiào màn, kōngqì qīngxīn, rén yǔ rén zhī jiān de guānxì gèng jiā qīnmì. Dàn nóngcūn yě miànlínzhe jīchǔ shèshī bù wánshàn, yīliáo tiáojiàn yǒuxiàn děng wèntí. Yǒuqù de shì, yuè lái yuè duō zài chéngshì dǎpīn duō nián de rén xuǎnzé huí dào nóngcūn chuàngyè, lìyòng hùliánwǎng fāzhǎn diànzǐ shāngwù. Zhè zhǒng qūshì bùjǐn wèi nóngcūn dàiláile jīngjì huólì, yě wèi chéng xiāng fāzhǎn de pínghéng tígōngle xīn de sīlù.
passages.text_en: In recent years, the debate about living in the city versus the countryside has increased. Cities offer more employment opportunities, better educational resources, and richer cultural life. However, city life also comes with high housing prices, serious pollution, and enormous competitive pressure. In comparison, the pace of life in the countryside is slower, the air is fresh, and relationships between people are closer. But rural areas also face issues like inadequate infrastructure and limited medical facilities. Interestingly, more and more people who have worked hard in cities for years are choosing to return to the countryside to start businesses, using the internet to develop e-commerce. This trend not only brings economic vitality to rural areas but also offers new ideas for balanced urban-rural development.

questions.q_zh: 城市生活有什么缺点？
questions.q_en: What are the disadvantages of city life?
questions.answer: 高房价、严重的污染和巨大的竞争压力。

questions.q_zh: 回乡创业的人用什么方式发展经济？
questions.q_en: How do returnees to the countryside develop the economy?
questions.answer: 利用互联网发展电子商务。

passages.title: Traditional Chinese Medicine
passages.text_zh: 中医是中国传统文化的重要组成部分，已有几千年的历史。与西医不同，中医强调整体观念，认为人体是一个有机的整体，各个器官相互联系、相互影响。中医的治疗方法包括中药、针灸、推拿等，讲究辨证施治，即根据每个病人的具体情况制定个性化的治疗方案。近年来，中医在国际上受到了越来越多的关注，很多外国人开始学习和接受中医疗法。当然，也有人对中医的科学性提出质疑。不可否认的是，中医和西医各有优势，如何将两者更好地结合起来，是现代医学发展的一个重要方向。
passages.text_pinyin: Zhōngyī shì Zhōngguó chuántǒng wénhuà de zhòngyào zǔchéng bùfen, yǐ yǒu jǐ qiān nián de lìshǐ. Yǔ xīyī bùtóng, zhōngyī qiángdiào zhěngtǐ guānniàn, rènwéi réntǐ shì yí gè yǒujī de zhěngtǐ, gègè qìguān xiānghù liánxì, xiānghù yǐngxiǎng. Zhōngyī de zhìliáo fāngfǎ bāokuò zhōngyào, zhēnjiǔ, tuīná děng, jiǎngjiu biànzhèng shīzhì, jí gēnjù měi gè bìngrén de jùtǐ qíngkuàng zhìdìng gèxìnghuà de zhìliáo fāng'àn. Jìn niánlái, zhōngyī zài guójì shàng shòudàole yuè lái yuè duō de guānzhù, hěn duō wàiguó rén kāishǐ xuéxí hé jiēshòu zhōngyī liáofǎ. Dāngrán, yě yǒu rén duì zhōngyī de kēxuéxìng tíchū zhìyí. Bùkě fǒurèn de shì, zhōngyī hé xīyī gè yǒu yōushì, rúhé jiāng liǎng zhě gèng hǎo de jiéhé qǐlái, shì xiàndài yīxué fāzhǎn de yí gè zhòngyào fāngxiàng.
passages.text_en: Traditional Chinese Medicine (TCM) is an important part of Chinese traditional culture, with a history of thousands of years. Unlike Western medicine, TCM emphasizes a holistic concept, viewing the human body as an organic whole where all organs are interconnected and influence each other. TCM treatment methods include herbal medicine, acupuncture, massage, and more, emphasizing diagnosis and treatment based on syndrome differentiation — that is, creating personalized treatment plans based on each patient's specific condition. In recent years, TCM has received increasing international attention, with many foreigners beginning to study and accept TCM therapies. Of course, some people have also questioned the scientific nature of TCM. What cannot be denied is that TCM and Western medicine each have their advantages, and how to better integrate the two is an important direction for modern medical development.

questions.q_zh: 中医和西医有什么不同？
questions.q_en: How is TCM different from Western medicine?
questions.answer: 中医强调整体观念，认为人体是有机的整体，各器官相互联系。

questions.q_zh: 什么是辨证施治？
questions.q_en: What is syndrome differentiation treatment?
questions.answer: 根据每个病人的具体情况制定个性化的治疗方案。

passages.title: Social Media Impact
passages.text_zh: 社交媒体已经深刻地改变了人们的生活方式。通过微信、微博等平台，人们可以随时随地分享自己的生活、了解朋友的动态、获取最新的资讯。对于企业来说，社交媒体也是一个重要的营销渠道，能够以较低的成本接触到大量的潜在客户。然而，社交媒体也带来了一些负面影响。过度使用社交媒体可能导致人们在现实生活中变得孤立，沉迷于虚拟世界而忽略了身边真实的人际关系。此外，网络上大量未经核实的信息容易造成谣言的传播。因此，如何理性地使用社交媒体，值得每个人深思。
passages.text_pinyin: Shèjiāo méitǐ yǐjīng shēnkè de gǎibiànle rénmen de shēnghuó fāngshì. Tōngguò Wēixìn, Wēibó děng píngtái, rénmen kěyǐ suíshí suídì fēnxiǎng zìjǐ de shēnghuó, liǎojiě péngyou de dòngtài, huòqǔ zuìxīn de zīxùn. Duìyú qǐyè lái shuō, shèjiāo méitǐ yě shì yí gè zhòngyào de yíngxiāo qúdào, nénggòu yǐ jiào dī de chéngběn jiēchù dào dàliàng de qiánzài kèhù. Rán'ér, shèjiāo méitǐ yě dàiláile yìxiē fùmiàn yǐngxiǎng. Guòdù shǐyòng shèjiāo méitǐ kěnéng dǎozhì rénmen zài xiànshí shēnghuó zhōng biàn de gūlì, chénmí yú xūnǐ shìjiè ér hūlüèle shēnbiān zhēnshí de rénjì guānxì. Cǐwài, wǎngluò shàng dàliàng wèi jīng héshí de xìnxī róngyì zàochéng yáoyán de chuánbō. Yīncǐ, rúhé lǐxìng de shǐyòng shèjiāo méitǐ, zhíde měi gè rén shēnsī.
passages.text_en: Social media has profoundly changed people's lifestyles. Through platforms like WeChat and Weibo, people can share their lives, follow friends' updates, and access the latest information anytime and anywhere. For businesses, social media is also an important marketing channel that can reach a large number of potential customers at relatively low cost. However, social media has also brought some negative effects. Excessive use of social media may cause people to become isolated in real life, immersed in the virtual world while neglecting real interpersonal relationships around them. Additionally, the large amount of unverified information online easily leads to the spread of rumors. Therefore, how to use social media rationally is something worth careful reflection for everyone.

questions.q_zh: 社交媒体对企业有什么好处？
questions.q_en: What are the benefits of social media for businesses?
questions.answer: 是重要的营销渠道，能以较低成本接触到大量潜在客户。

questions.q_zh: 过度使用社交媒体有什么问题？
questions.q_en: What problems arise from excessive social media use?
questions.answer: 可能导致人们在现实生活中变得孤立，忽略真实的人际关系。

passages.title: Young Entrepreneurs
passages.text_zh: 近年来，年轻人创业在中国越来越普遍。政府出台了一系列鼓励创业的政策，包括提供创业贷款、减免税收和建设创业园区。许多大学毕业生不再满足于按部就班地找一份稳定的工作，而是选择自己创业。他们往往充满激情和创造力，善于利用新技术和新理念来开拓市场。然而，创业之路并非一帆风顺。统计数据显示，大部分初创企业在成立后的两年内就会失败。缺乏经验、资金不足和市场竞争激烈是年轻创业者面临的主要挑战。因此，在追求梦想的同时，做好充分的准备和风险评估至关重要。
passages.text_pinyin: Jìn niánlái, niánqīng rén chuàngyè zài Zhōngguó yuè lái yuè pǔbiàn. Zhèngfǔ chūtáile yí xìliè gǔlì chuàngyè de zhèngcè, bāokuò tígōng chuàngyè dàikuǎn, jiǎnmiǎn shuìshōu hé jiànshè chuàngyè yuánqū. Xǔduō dàxué bìyèshēng bú zài mǎnzú yú àn bù jiù bān de zhǎo yí fèn wěndìng de gōngzuò, érshì xuǎnzé zìjǐ chuàngyè. Tāmen wǎngwǎng chōngmǎn jīqíng hé chuàngzàolì, shànyú lìyòng xīn jìshù hé xīn lǐniàn lái kāituò shìchǎng. Rán'ér, chuàngyè zhī lù bìngfēi yìfān fēngshùn. Tǒngjì shùjù xiǎnshì, dà bùfen chūchuàng qǐyè zài chénglì hòu de liǎng nián nèi jiù huì shībài. Quēfá jīngyàn, zījīn bùzú hé shìchǎng jìngzhēng jīliè shì niánqīng chuàngyè zhě miànlín de zhǔyào tiǎozhàn. Yīncǐ, zài zhuīqiú mèngxiǎng de tóngshí, zuòhǎo chōngfèn de zhǔnbèi hé fēngxiǎn pínggū zhìguān zhòngyào.
passages.text_en: In recent years, entrepreneurship among young people has become increasingly common in China. The government has introduced a series of policies to encourage startups, including providing business loans, tax reductions, and building startup parks. Many university graduates are no longer content to follow the conventional path of finding a stable job, choosing instead to start their own businesses. They are often full of passion and creativity, skilled at using new technology and ideas to explore markets. However, the road to entrepreneurship is not smooth sailing. Statistics show that most startups fail within two years of being established. Lack of experience, insufficient funding, and intense market competition are the main challenges young entrepreneurs face. Therefore, while pursuing dreams, thorough preparation and risk assessment are crucial.

questions.q_zh: 政府出台了哪些鼓励创业的政策？
questions.q_en: What policies has the government introduced to encourage entrepreneurship?
questions.answer: 提供创业贷款、减免税收和建设创业园区。

questions.q_zh: 年轻创业者面临哪些挑战？
questions.q_en: What challenges do young entrepreneurs face?
questions.answer: 缺乏经验、资金不足和市场竞争激烈。

passages.title: Aging Society
passages.text_zh: 中国正在加速进入老龄化社会。根据最新的统计数据，六十岁以上的老年人口已经超过了总人口的百分之十八。人口老龄化给社会带来了诸多挑战，包括劳动力不足、养老金压力增大以及医疗保障体系的负担加重。为了应对这些挑战，政府采取了延迟退休、鼓励生育等措施。同时，养老产业也迎来了巨大的发展机遇。智能养老设备、社区养老服务和老年教育等领域正在快速发展。专家认为，解决老龄化问题需要全社会的参与，不仅是政府的责任，也需要家庭和社会各界的共同支持。
passages.text_pinyin: Zhōngguó zhèngzài jiāsù jìnrù lǎolínghuà shèhuì. Gēnjù zuìxīn de tǒngjì shùjù, liùshí suì yǐshàng de lǎonián rénkǒu yǐjīng chāoguòle zǒng rénkǒu de bǎi fēn zhī shíbā. Rénkǒu lǎolínghuà gěi shèhuì dàiláile zhūduō tiǎozhàn, bāokuò láodònglì bùzú, yǎnglǎo jīn yālì zēngdà yǐjí yīliáo bǎozhàng tǐxì de fùdān jiāzhòng. Wèile yìngduì zhèxiē tiǎozhàn, zhèngfǔ cǎiqǔle yánchí tuìxiū, gǔlì shēngyù děng cuòshī. Tóngshí, yǎnglǎo chǎnyè yě yínláile jùdà de fāzhǎn jīyù. Zhìnéng yǎnglǎo shèbèi, shèqū yǎnglǎo fúwù hé lǎonián jiàoyù děng lǐngyù zhèngzài kuàisù fāzhǎn. Zhuānjiā rènwéi, jiějué lǎolínghuà wèntí xūyào quán shèhuì de cānyù, bùjǐn shì zhèngfǔ de zérèn, yě xūyào jiātíng hé shèhuì gèjiè de gòngtóng zhīchí.
passages.text_en: China is rapidly entering an aging society. According to the latest statistics, the elderly population aged sixty and above has already exceeded eighteen percent of the total population. Population aging brings numerous challenges to society, including insufficient labor force, increased pension pressure, and heavier burdens on the healthcare system. To address these challenges, the government has implemented measures such as delaying retirement and encouraging childbirth. Meanwhile, the elderly care industry has also welcomed tremendous development opportunities. Smart elderly care devices, community elderly services, and senior education are rapidly developing. Experts believe that solving aging issues requires participation from all of society — it is not only the government's responsibility but also needs the joint support of families and all sectors of society.

questions.q_zh: 人口老龄化带来了哪些挑战？
questions.q_en: What challenges does population aging bring?
questions.answer: 劳动力不足、养老金压力增大、医疗保障体系负担加重。

questions.q_zh: 养老产业有哪些新的发展领域？
questions.q_en: What new areas are developing in the elderly care industry?
questions.answer: 智能养老设备、社区养老服务和老年教育。

passages.title: Travel and Cultural Understanding
passages.text_zh: 越来越多的中国人选择出国旅游，这不仅丰富了他们的生活经历，也促进了跨文化交流。旅行让人们有机会亲身体验不同国家的风俗习惯、饮食文化和社会制度。许多旅行者在国外的经历改变了他们对世界的看法，使他们变得更加开放和包容。然而，跨文化旅行也面临着一些挑战，比如语言障碍、文化误解甚至偏见。一些旅行者在国外的不文明行为也引发了社会讨论。因此，在出国旅行之前，了解目的地国家的文化背景和基本礼仪是十分必要的。旅行不仅是为了放松身心，更是一种自我提升和文化理解的过程。
passages.text_pinyin: Yuè lái yuè duō de Zhōngguó rén xuǎnzé chūguó lǚyóu, zhè bùjǐn fēngfùle tāmen de shēnghuó jīnglì, yě cùjìnle kuà wénhuà jiāoliú. Lǚxíng ràng rénmen yǒu jīhuì qīnshēn tǐyàn bùtóng guójiā de fēngsú xíguàn, yǐnshí wénhuà hé shèhuì zhìdù. Xǔduō lǚxíng zhě zài guówài de jīnglì gǎibiànle tāmen duì shìjiè de kànfǎ, shǐ tāmen biàn de gèng jiā kāifàng hé bāoróng. Rán'ér, kuà wénhuà lǚxíng yě miànlínzhe yìxiē tiǎozhàn, bǐrú yǔyán zhàng'ài, wénhuà wùjiě shènzhì piānjiàn. Yìxiē lǚxíng zhě zài guówài de bù wénmíng xíngwéi yě yǐnfāle shèhuì tǎolùn. Yīncǐ, zài chūguó lǚxíng zhīqián, liǎojiě mùdìdì guójiā de wénhuà bèijǐng hé jīběn lǐyí shì shífēn bìyào de. Lǚxíng bùjǐn shì wèile fàngsōng shēnxīn, gèng shì yì zhǒng zìwǒ tíshēng hé wénhuà lǐjiě de guòchéng.
passages.text_en: More and more Chinese people are choosing to travel abroad, which not only enriches their life experiences but also promotes cross-cultural exchange. Travel gives people the opportunity to personally experience the customs, food culture, and social systems of different countries. Many travelers' experiences abroad have changed their view of the world, making them more open and inclusive. However, cross-cultural travel also faces challenges such as language barriers, cultural misunderstandings, and even prejudice. Some travelers' uncivilized behavior abroad has also sparked social discussion. Therefore, before traveling abroad, understanding the cultural background and basic etiquette of the destination country is quite necessary. Travel is not just about relaxation — it is also a process of self-improvement and cultural understanding.

questions.q_zh: 出国旅行有什么好处？
questions.q_en: What are the benefits of traveling abroad?
questions.answer: 丰富生活经历，促进跨文化交流，使人更加开放和包容。

questions.q_zh: 出国前应该做什么准备？
questions.q_en: What preparation should be made before going abroad?
questions.answer: 了解目的地国家的文化背景和基本礼仪。

passages.title: Environmental Protection Responsibility
passages.text_zh: 全球气候变化已经成为人类面临的最严峻的挑战之一。温室气体排放导致全球气温持续升高，极端天气事件频繁发生，海平面不断上升。中国作为世界上最大的发展中国家，在环境保护方面承担着重要的责任。近年来，中国在新能源开发、碳排放控制和绿色交通等方面取得了显著的进展。越来越多的城市开始推广电动汽车和公共自行车，许多工厂也在努力减少污染物的排放。然而，环境保护不仅仅是政府和企业的事情，每个人都应该从日常生活做起，减少浪费，节约资源，为保护地球贡献自己的力量。
passages.text_pinyin: Quánqiú qìhòu biànhuà yǐjīng chéngwéi rénlèi miànlín de zuì yánjùn de tiǎozhàn zhī yī. Wēnshì qìtǐ páifàng dǎozhì quánqiú qìwēn chíxù shēnggāo, jíduān tiānqì shìjiàn pínfán fāshēng, hǎipíngmiàn bùduàn shàngshēng. Zhōngguó zuòwéi shìjiè shàng zuìdà de fāzhǎnzhōng guójiā, zài huánjìng bǎohù fāngmiàn chéngdānzhe zhòngyào de zérèn. Jìn niánlái, Zhōngguó zài xīn néngyuán kāifā, tàn páifàng kòngzhì hé lǜsè jiāotōng děng fāngmiàn qǔdéle xiǎnzhù de jìnzhǎn. Yuè lái yuè duō de chéngshì kāishǐ tuīguǎng diàndòng qìchē hé gōnggòng zìxíngchē, xǔduō gōngchǎng yě zài nǔlì jiǎnshǎo wūrǎnwù de páifàng. Rán'ér, huánjìng bǎohù bùjǐn jǐn shì zhèngfǔ hé qǐyè de shìqíng, měi gè rén dōu yīnggāi cóng rìcháng shēnghuó zuòqǐ, jiǎnshǎo làngfèi, jiéyuē zīyuán, wèi bǎohù dìqiú gòngxiàn zìjǐ de lìliàng.
passages.text_en: Global climate change has become one of the most severe challenges facing humanity. Greenhouse gas emissions have caused global temperatures to continuously rise, extreme weather events to occur frequently, and sea levels to keep rising. As the world's largest developing country, China bears significant responsibility in environmental protection. In recent years, China has made remarkable progress in new energy development, carbon emission control, and green transportation. More and more cities are promoting electric vehicles and public bicycles, and many factories are working to reduce pollutant emissions. However, environmental protection is not just the business of government and enterprises — everyone should start from daily life, reduce waste, conserve resources, and contribute their own strength to protecting the earth.

questions.q_zh: 中国在环保方面取得了哪些进展？
questions.q_en: What progress has China made in environmental protection?
questions.answer: 在新能源开发、碳排放控制和绿色交通方面取得了显著进展。

questions.q_zh: 个人应该怎样保护环境？
questions.q_en: How should individuals protect the environment?
questions.answer: 从日常生活做起，减少浪费，节约资源。

passages.title: Artificial Intelligence in Daily Life
passages.text_zh: 人工智能技术正在以前所未有的速度渗透到我们的日常生活中。从智能手机上的语音助手到自动驾驶汽车，从智能家居系统到医疗诊断辅助工具，人工智能的应用范围越来越广。在教育领域，人工智能可以根据每个学生的学习进度和特点提供个性化的学习方案。在医疗领域，人工智能已经能够辅助医生进行影像分析和疾病预测。然而，随着人工智能技术的不断进步，人们也开始担忧它可能带来的负面影响，比如大规模的失业和隐私泄露等问题。如何在享受技术便利的同时防范潜在的风险，是我们需要共同面对的课题。
passages.text_pinyin: Réngōng zhìnéng jìshù zhèngzài yǐ qián suǒ wèi yǒu de sùdù shèntòu dào wǒmen de rìcháng shēnghuó zhōng. Cóng zhìnéng shǒujī shàng de yǔyīn zhùshǒu dào zìdòng jiàshǐ qìchē, cóng zhìnéng jiājū xìtǒng dào yīliáo zhěnduàn fǔzhù gōngjù, réngōng zhìnéng de yìngyòng fànwéi yuè lái yuè guǎng. Zài jiàoyù lǐngyù, réngōng zhìnéng kěyǐ gēnjù měi gè xuéshēng de xuéxí jìndù hé tèdiǎn tígōng gèxìnghuà de xuéxí fāng'àn. Zài yīliáo lǐngyù, réngōng zhìnéng yǐjīng nénggòu fǔzhù yīshēng jìnxíng yǐngxiàng fēnxī hé jíbìng yùcè. Rán'ér, suízhe réngōng zhìnéng jìshù de bùduàn jìnbù, rénmen yě kāishǐ dānyōu tā kěnéng dàilái de fùmiàn yǐngxiǎng, bǐrú dà guīmó de shīyè hé yǐnsī xièlòu děng wèntí. Rúhé zài xiǎngshòu jìshù biànlì de tóngshí fángfàn qiánzài de fēngxiǎn, shì wǒmen xūyào gòngtóng miànduì de kètí.
passages.text_en: Artificial intelligence technology is penetrating our daily lives at an unprecedented pace. From voice assistants on smartphones to self-driving cars, from smart home systems to medical diagnostic tools, the range of AI applications is growing ever wider. In education, AI can provide personalized learning plans based on each student's progress and characteristics. In healthcare, AI can already assist doctors with image analysis and disease prediction. However, as AI technology continues to advance, people have also begun to worry about potential negative impacts, such as large-scale unemployment and privacy breaches. How to enjoy technological convenience while guarding against potential risks is a challenge we all need to face together.

questions.q_zh: 人工智能在教育领域有什么应用？
questions.q_en: How is AI applied in education?
questions.answer: 可以根据每个学生的学习进度和特点提供个性化的学习方案。

questions.q_zh: 人们担心人工智能会带来哪些问题？
questions.q_en: What problems are people worried AI might cause?
questions.answer: 大规模的失业和隐私泄露等问题。

passages.title: Changing Reading Habits
passages.text_zh: 随着电子设备的普及，人们的阅读习惯发生了巨大的变化。传统的纸质书籍正在逐渐被电子书和有声书所取代。许多人已经习惯了在手机或平板电脑上阅读，因为这样更加便携，而且可以随时随地获取海量的书籍资源。然而，也有不少人坚持认为纸质书有着无法替代的优势。翻页的触感、书本的气味以及在书页上做笔记的体验，都是电子书无法提供的。此外，研究表明，长时间盯着屏幕阅读会对视力造成损害。实际上，无论选择哪种方式，最重要的是培养持续阅读的习惯。在信息爆炸的时代，保持深度阅读的能力尤为重要。
passages.text_pinyin: Suízhe diànzǐ shèbèi de pǔjí, rénmen de yuèdú xíguàn fāshēngle jùdà de biànhuà. Chuántǒng de zhǐzhì shūjí zhèngzài zhújiàn bèi diànzǐ shū hé yǒushēng shū suǒ qǔdài. Xǔduō rén yǐjīng xíguànle zài shǒujī huò píngbǎn diànnǎo shàng yuèdú, yīnwèi zhèyàng gèng jiā biànxié, érqiě kěyǐ suíshí suídì huòqǔ hǎiliàng de shūjí zīyuán. Rán'ér, yě yǒu bù shǎo rén jiānchí rènwéi zhǐzhì shū yǒuzhe wúfǎ tìdài de yōushì. Fānyè de chùgǎn, shūběn de qìwèi yǐjí zài shūyè shàng zuò bǐjì de tǐyàn, dōu shì diànzǐ shū wúfǎ tígōng de. Cǐwài, yánjiū biǎomíng, cháng shíjiān dīngzhe píngmù yuèdú huì duì shìlì zàochéng sǔnhài. Shíjì shàng, wúlùn xuǎnzé nǎ zhǒng fāngshì, zuì zhòngyào de shì péiyǎng chíxù yuèdú de xíguàn. Zài xìnxī bàozhà de shídài, bǎochí shēndù yuèdú de nénglì yóu wéi zhòngyào.
passages.text_en: With the proliferation of electronic devices, people's reading habits have undergone tremendous changes. Traditional paper books are gradually being replaced by e-books and audiobooks. Many people are already used to reading on phones or tablets because it is more portable and allows instant access to vast book resources. However, quite a few people insist that paper books have irreplaceable advantages. The tactile sensation of turning pages, the smell of books, and the experience of taking notes on pages are things e-books cannot provide. Moreover, research shows that staring at a screen for extended periods can damage eyesight. In reality, regardless of which method you choose, the most important thing is to cultivate a habit of continuous reading. In an era of information explosion, maintaining the ability for deep reading is particularly important.

questions.q_zh: 纸质书有什么优势？
questions.q_en: What advantages do paper books have?
questions.answer: 翻页的触感、书本的气味以及在书页上做笔记的体验。

questions.q_zh: 作者认为最重要的是什么？
questions.q_en: What does the author think is most important?
questions.answer: 培养持续阅读的习惯，保持深度阅读的能力。

passages.title: Volunteering Experience
passages.text_zh: 大学期间，我参加了一个支教项目，到西部山区的一所小学当了三个月的志愿者教师。那里的条件比我想象的还要艰苦，教室里只有一块黑板和几张破旧的课桌，教学设备严重不足。但是孩子们求知的眼神深深打动了我。他们虽然没有城市孩子那样丰富的学习资源，但是学习的热情和毅力令人敬佩。在那三个月里，我不仅教授了知识，也从孩子们身上学到了很多。这段经历让我重新审视了教育的意义，也坚定了我投身教育事业的决心。回到大学后，我经常向同学们讲述那里的故事，呼吁更多人关注农村教育问题。
passages.text_pinyin: Dàxué qījiān, wǒ cānjiāle yí gè zhījiào xiàngmù, dào xībù shānqū de yì suǒ xiǎoxué dāngle sān gè yuè de zhìyuànzhě jiàoshī. Nàlǐ de tiáojiàn bǐ wǒ xiǎngxiàng de hái yào jiānkǔ, jiàoshì lǐ zhǐ yǒu yí kuài hēibǎn hé jǐ zhāng pòjiù de kèzhuō, jiàoxué shèbèi yánzhòng bùzú. Dànshì háizimen qiúzhī de yǎnshén shēnshēn dǎdòngle wǒ. Tāmen suīrán méiyǒu chéngshì háizi nàyàng fēngfù de xuéxí zīyuán, dànshì xuéxí de rèqíng hé yìlì lìng rén jìngpèi. Zài nà sān gè yuè lǐ, wǒ bùjǐn jiàoshòule zhīshi, yě cóng háizimen shēnshang xuédàole hěn duō. Zhè duàn jīnglì ràng wǒ chóngxīn shěnshìle jiàoyù de yìyì, yě jiāndìngle wǒ tóushēn jiàoyù shìyè de juéxīn. Huí dào dàxué hòu, wǒ jīngcháng xiàng tóngxuémen jiǎngshù nàlǐ de gùshi, hūyù gèng duō rén guānzhù nóngcūn jiàoyù wèntí.
passages.text_en: During university, I joined a teaching support program and served as a volunteer teacher for three months at a primary school in a mountainous area in western China. The conditions there were even harsher than I had imagined — the classroom had only a blackboard and a few worn-out desks, with severely inadequate teaching equipment. But the children's eager eyes deeply moved me. Although they didn't have the rich learning resources of city children, their passion and perseverance for learning were admirable. During those three months, I not only taught knowledge but also learned a great deal from the children. This experience made me re-examine the meaning of education and strengthened my determination to dedicate myself to the field of education. After returning to university, I often shared stories from there with my classmates, calling for more people to pay attention to rural education issues.

questions.q_zh: 山区学校的条件怎么样？
questions.q_en: What were the conditions like at the mountain school?
questions.answer: 教室里只有一块黑板和几张破旧的课桌，教学设备严重不足。

questions.q_zh: 这段经历对他有什么影响？
questions.q_en: What impact did this experience have on him?
questions.answer: 让他重新审视教育的意义，坚定了投身教育事业的决心。

questions.q_zh: 回到大学后他做了什么？
questions.q_en: What did he do after returning to university?
questions.answer: 向同学们讲述那里的故事，呼吁更多人关注农村教育问题。

passages.title: Public Transportation Development
passages.text_zh: 中国的公共交通系统在过去二十年里取得了惊人的发展。高铁网络已经覆盖了全国大部分城市，从北京到上海只需四个半小时。城市内部的地铁系统也在不断扩展，北京、上海等大城市的地铁线路超过了二十条。共享单车和网约车的出现更是解决了出行的最后一公里问题。然而，快速发展也带来了一些问题。高峰时段地铁拥挤不堪，乘客的出行体验需要进一步改善。此外，如何实现城市交通的可持续发展，减少碳排放，是城市规划者面临的重大课题。一些城市已经开始探索无人驾驶公交车和氢燃料电池车等新型交通工具。
passages.text_pinyin: Zhōngguó de gōnggòng jiāotōng xìtǒng zài guòqù èrshí nián lǐ qǔdéle jīngrén de fāzhǎn. Gāotiě wǎngluò yǐjīng fùgàile quánguó dà bùfen chéngshì, cóng Běijīng dào Shànghǎi zhǐ xū sì gè bàn xiǎoshí. Chéngshì nèibù de dìtiě xìtǒng yě zài bùduàn kuòzhǎn, Běijīng, Shànghǎi děng dà chéngshì de dìtiě xiànlù chāoguòle èrshí tiáo. Gòngxiǎng dānchē hé wǎngyuē chē de chūxiàn gèng shì jiějuéle chūxíng de zuìhòu yì gōnglǐ wèntí. Rán'ér, kuàisù fāzhǎn yě dàiláile yìxiē wèntí. Gāofēng shíduàn dìtiě yōngjǐ bùkān, chéngkè de chūxíng tǐyàn xūyào jìnyíbù gǎishàn. Cǐwài, rúhé shíxiàn chéngshì jiāotōng de kě chíxù fāzhǎn, jiǎnshǎo tàn páifàng, shì chéngshì guīhuà zhě miànlín de zhòngdà kètí. Yìxiē chéngshì yǐjīng kāishǐ tànsuǒ wúrén jiàshǐ gōngjiāo chē hé qīng ránliào diànchí chē děng xīnxíng jiāotōng gōngjù.
passages.text_en: China's public transportation system has achieved remarkable development over the past twenty years. The high-speed rail network now covers most cities nationwide, with the journey from Beijing to Shanghai taking just four and a half hours. Urban metro systems are also continuously expanding, with major cities like Beijing and Shanghai having over twenty metro lines. The emergence of shared bicycles and ride-hailing services has further solved the last-mile problem. However, rapid development has also brought some issues. During peak hours the metro is unbearably crowded, and the passenger experience needs further improvement. Additionally, how to achieve sustainable urban transportation development and reduce carbon emissions is a major challenge for city planners. Some cities have already begun exploring new transportation options such as autonomous buses and hydrogen fuel cell vehicles.

questions.q_zh: 从北京到上海坐高铁需要多长时间？
questions.q_en: How long does it take by high-speed rail from Beijing to Shanghai?
questions.answer: 只需四个半小时。

questions.q_zh: 城市交通面临什么挑战？
questions.q_en: What challenges does urban transportation face?
questions.answer: 高峰时段拥挤，需要实现可持续发展和减少碳排放。

passages.title: On Loneliness
passages.text_zh: 孤独是人类最普遍、最深刻的情感体验之一。在现代社会的喧嚣之中，人们往往被各种社交活动和信息流所包围，表面上看似热闘非凡，内心深处却常常感到一种难以言说的空虚与孤寂。哲学家叔本华曾说过，人生就像一只钟摆，在痛苦和无聊之间来回摆动。而孤独恰恰是连接这两个极端的桥梁。值得注意的是，孤独与独处并不等同。独处是一种主动的选择，是与自我对话、沉淀思考的宝贵时光；而孤独则是一种被动的感受，是渴望被理解却无法得到回应的失落。真正的智者能够将孤独转化为独处的力量，在静默中找到内心的平衡与安宁。正如鲁迅所言，当我沉默的时候，我觉得很充实。
passages.text_pinyin: Gūdú shì rénlèi zuì pǔbiàn, zuì shēnkè de qínggǎn tǐyàn zhī yī. Zài xiàndài shèhuì de xuānxiāo zhī zhōng, rénmen wǎngwǎng bèi gèzhǒng shèjiāo huódòng hé xìnxī liú suǒ bāowéi, biǎomiàn shàng kànsì rènao fēifán, nèixīn shēnchù què chángcháng gǎndào yì zhǒng nányǐ yánshuō de kōngxū yǔ gūjì. Zhéxuéjiā Shūběnhuá céng shuōguò, rénshēng jiù xiàng yì zhī zhōngbǎi, zài tòngkǔ hé wúliáo zhī jiān láihuí bǎidòng. Ér gūdú qiàqià shì liánjiē zhè liǎng gè jíduān de qiáoliáng. Zhíde zhùyì de shì, gūdú yǔ dúchǔ bìng bù děngtóng. Dúchǔ shì yì zhǒng zhǔdòng de xuǎnzé, shì yǔ zìwǒ duìhuà, chéndiàn sīkǎo de bǎoguì shíguāng; ér gūdú zé shì yì zhǒng bèidòng de gǎnshòu, shì kěwàng bèi lǐjiě què wúfǎ dédào huíyìng de shīluò. Zhēnzhèng de zhìzhě nénggòu jiāng gūdú zhuǎnhuà wéi dúchǔ de lìliàng, zài jìngmò zhōng zhǎodào nèixīn de pínghéng yǔ ānníng. Zhèngrú Lǔ Xùn suǒ yán, dāng wǒ chénmò de shíhou, wǒ juéde hěn chōngshí.
passages.text_en: Loneliness is one of the most universal and profound emotional experiences of humankind. Amid the clamor of modern society, people are often surrounded by various social activities and information flows — seemingly bustling on the surface, yet deep inside often feeling an inexpressible emptiness and solitude. The philosopher Schopenhauer once said that life is like a pendulum, swinging back and forth between suffering and boredom. And loneliness happens to be the bridge connecting these two extremes. It is worth noting that loneliness and solitude are not the same. Solitude is an active choice — precious time for self-dialogue and thoughtful reflection; loneliness, on the other hand, is a passive feeling — the disappointment of yearning to be understood but receiving no response. True wise people can transform loneliness into the power of solitude, finding inner balance and peace in silence. As Lu Xun said, when I am silent, I feel fulfilled.

questions.q_zh: 孤独与独处有什么区别？
questions.q_en: What is the difference between loneliness and solitude?
questions.answer: 独处是主动的选择，与自我对话的宝贵时光；孤独是被动的感受，渴望被理解却无法得到回应。

questions.q_zh: 叔本华怎样比喻人生？
questions.q_en: How did Schopenhauer describe life metaphorically?
questions.answer: 人生就像一只钟摆，在痛苦和无聊之间来回摆动。

passages.title: Preserving Cultural Heritage
passages.text_zh: 在全球化浪潮的冲击下，许多国家和地区的传统文化正面临着前所未有的挑战。语言的消亡、传统技艺的失传、古建筑的拆除，这些现象无不令人痛心。文化遗产不仅承载着一个民族的集体记忆，更是人类文明多样性的珍贵体现。联合国教科文组织将文化遗产分为物质文化遗产和非物质文化遗产两大类，前者包括历史建筑、考古遗址等有形遗产，后者涵盖口述传统、表演艺术、社会习俗等无形遗产。近年来，中国在文化遗产保护方面投入了大量资源。数字化技术的运用使得许多濒临消失的文化形式得以记录和保存。然而，保护工作绝非一蹴而就，它需要政府的政策支持、学术界的深入研究以及普通民众的积极参与。唯有全社会形成合力，才能让珍贵的文化遗产世代相传。
passages.text_pinyin: Zài quánqiúhuà làngcháo de chōngjī xià, xǔduō guójiā hé dìqū de chuántǒng wénhuà zhèng miànlínzhe qián suǒ wèi yǒu de tiǎozhàn. Yǔyán de xiāowáng, chuántǒng jìyì de shīchuán, gǔ jiànzhù de chāichú, zhèxiē xiànxiàng wú bù lìng rén tòngxīn. Wénhuà yíchǎn bùjǐn chéngzàizhe yí gè mínzú de jítǐ jìyì, gèng shì rénlèi wénmíng duōyàngxìng de zhēnguì tǐxiàn. Liánhéguó jiàokēwén zǔzhī jiāng wénhuà yíchǎn fēn wéi wùzhì wénhuà yíchǎn hé fēi wùzhì wénhuà yíchǎn liǎng dà lèi, qiánzhě bāokuò lìshǐ jiànzhù, kǎogǔ yízhǐ děng yǒuxíng yíchǎn, hòuzhě hángài kǒushù chuántǒng, biǎoyǎn yìshù, shèhuì xísú děng wúxíng yíchǎn. Jìn niánlái, Zhōngguó zài wénhuà yíchǎn bǎohù fāngmiàn tóurùle dàliàng zīyuán. Shùzìhuà jìshù de yùnyòng shǐde xǔduō bīnlín xiāoshī de wénhuà xíngshì déyǐ jìlù hé bǎocún. Rán'ér, bǎohù gōngzuò jué fēi yícù ér jiù, tā xūyào zhèngfǔ de zhèngcè zhīchí, xuéshùjiè de shēnrù yánjiū yǐjí pǔtōng mínzhòng de jījí cānyù. Wéi yǒu quán shèhuì xíngchéng hélì, cái néng ràng zhēnguì de wénhuà yíchǎn shìdài xiāngchuán.
passages.text_en: Under the impact of globalization, the traditional cultures of many countries and regions are facing unprecedented challenges. The extinction of languages, the loss of traditional crafts, the demolition of ancient buildings — these phenomena are all heartbreaking. Cultural heritage not only carries a nation's collective memory but is also a precious manifestation of the diversity of human civilization. UNESCO divides cultural heritage into two major categories: tangible and intangible. The former includes historical buildings, archaeological sites, and other physical heritage; the latter encompasses oral traditions, performing arts, social customs, and other non-physical heritage. In recent years, China has invested significant resources in cultural heritage protection. The application of digital technology has enabled many endangered cultural forms to be documented and preserved. However, preservation work is by no means accomplished overnight — it requires government policy support, in-depth academic research, and active public participation. Only when all of society joins forces can precious cultural heritage be passed down through generations.

questions.q_zh: 文化遗产分为哪两大类？
questions.q_en: What are the two major categories of cultural heritage?
questions.answer: 物质文化遗产和非物质文化遗产。

questions.q_zh: 数字化技术在文化保护中起什么作用？
questions.q_en: What role does digital technology play in cultural preservation?
questions.answer: 使许多濒临消失的文化形式得以记录和保存。

questions.q_zh: 文化遗产保护需要哪些方面的参与？
questions.q_en: What kinds of participation does cultural heritage protection need?
questions.answer: 政府的政策支持、学术界的深入研究以及普通民众的积极参与。

passages.title: Urbanization and Its Challenges
passages.text_zh: 中国的城镇化进程在过去几十年间取得了举世瞩目的成就。数以亿计的农村人口涌入城市，城镇化率从改革开放初期的不足百分之二十飙升至如今的百分之六十以上。这一进程极大地推动了经济增长和社会发展，使得数亿人摆脱了贫困，享受到了更好的教育、医疗和就业机会。然而，快速城镇化也催生了一系列棘手的社会问题。大量农村剩余劳动力进城后面临着户籍制度的壁垒，在住房、教育和社会保障等方面难以享受与城市居民同等的权利。与此同时，城市的无序扩张导致了交通拥堵、环境污染和生态破坏等问题。如何推进以人为本的新型城镇化，实现经济发展与社会公平的统一，是当前中国面临的重大课题。
passages.text_pinyin: Zhōngguó de chéngzhènhuà jìnchéng zài guòqù jǐ shí nián jiān qǔdéle jǔshì zhǔmù de chéngjiù. Shù yǐ yì jì de nóngcūn rénkǒu yǒngrù chéngshì, chéngzhènhuà lǜ cóng gǎigé kāifàng chūqī de bùzú bǎi fēn zhī èrshí biāoshēng zhì rújīn de bǎi fēn zhī liùshí yǐshàng. Zhè yī jìnchéng jídà de tuīdòngle jīngjì zēngzhǎng hé shèhuì fāzhǎn, shǐde shù yì rén bǎituōle pínkùn, xiǎngshòu dàole gèng hǎo de jiàoyù, yīliáo hé jiùyè jīhuì. Rán'ér, kuàisù chéngzhènhuà yě cuīshēngle yí xìliè jíshǒu de shèhuì wèntí. Dàliàng nóngcūn shèngyú láodònglì jìnchéng hòu miànlínzhe hùjí zhìdù de bìlěi, zài zhùfáng, jiàoyù hé shèhuì bǎozhàng děng fāngmiàn nányǐ xiǎngshòu yǔ chéngshì jūmín tóngděng de quánlì. Yǔ cǐ tóngshí, chéngshì de wúxù kuòzhāng dǎozhìle jiāotōng yōngdǔ, huánjìng wūrǎn hé shēngtài pòhuài děng wèntí. Rúhé tuījìn yǐ rén wéi běn de xīnxíng chéngzhènhuà, shíxiàn jīngjì fāzhǎn yǔ shèhuì gōngpíng de tǒngyī, shì dāngqián Zhōngguó miànlín de zhòngdà kètí.
passages.text_en: China's urbanization process has achieved world-renowned accomplishments over the past several decades. Hundreds of millions of rural residents have poured into cities, with the urbanization rate soaring from less than twenty percent at the beginning of reform and opening up to over sixty percent today. This process has greatly driven economic growth and social development, lifting hundreds of millions out of poverty and providing them with better education, healthcare, and employment opportunities. However, rapid urbanization has also spawned a series of thorny social problems. Large numbers of surplus rural laborers face barriers from the household registration system after moving to cities, making it difficult to enjoy equal rights to housing, education, and social security as urban residents. Meanwhile, disorderly urban expansion has led to traffic congestion, environmental pollution, and ecological destruction. How to advance people-centered new urbanization and achieve unity between economic development and social equity is a major challenge currently facing China.

questions.q_zh: 中国城镇化率有什么变化？
questions.q_en: How has China's urbanization rate changed?
questions.answer: 从改革开放初期的不足百分之二十飙升至百分之六十以上。

questions.q_zh: 农村人口进城后面临什么困难？
questions.q_en: What difficulties do rural migrants face in cities?
questions.answer: 面临户籍制度壁垒，在住房、教育和社会保障方面难以享受同等权利。

passages.title: Contemporary Chinese Art
passages.text_zh: 当代中国艺术的发展历程折射出中国社会数十年来的深刻变革。从上世纪八十年代的先锋艺术运动到如今活跃于国际舞台的当代艺术家，中国艺术经历了从模仿到创新的艰难蜕变。早期的中国当代艺术深受西方现代主义的影响，许多艺术家试图通过借鉴西方的表现手法来打破传统的束缚。然而，随着时间的推移，越来越多的艺术家开始反思这种单向的文化输入，转而从中国传统美学和当代社会现实中汲取灵感。他们的作品既有对全球化浪潮的批判性思考，也有对民族身份认同的深入探索。如今，中国当代艺术已经在国际市场上占据了一席之地，但关于其是否过度商业化、是否丧失了批判精神的争论从未停止。艺术的价值究竟应该由市场来衡量还是由作品本身的思想深度来定义，依然是一个值得深思的问题。
passages.text_pinyin: Dāngdài Zhōngguó yìshù de fāzhǎn lìchéng zhéshè chū Zhōngguó shèhuì shù shí nián lái de shēnkè biàngé. Cóng shàng shìjì bāshí niándài de xiānfēng yìshù yùndòng dào rújīn huóyuè yú guójì wǔtái de dāngdài yìshùjiā, Zhōngguó yìshù jīnglìle cóng mófǎng dào chuàngxīn de jiānnán tuìbiàn. Zǎoqī de Zhōngguó dāngdài yìshù shēn shòu xīfāng xiàndài zhǔyì de yǐngxiǎng, xǔduō yìshùjiā shìtú tōngguò jièjiàn xīfāng de biǎoxiàn shǒufǎ lái dǎpò chuántǒng de shùfù. Rán'ér, suízhe shíjiān de tuīyí, yuè lái yuè duō de yìshùjiā kāishǐ fǎnsī zhè zhǒng dānxiàng de wénhuà shūrù, zhuǎn'ér cóng Zhōngguó chuántǒng měixué hé dāngdài shèhuì xiànshí zhōng jíqǔ línggǎn. Tāmen de zuòpǐn jì yǒu duì quánqiúhuà làngcháo de pīpànxìng sīkǎo, yě yǒu duì mínzú shēnfèn rèntóng de shēnrù tànsuǒ. Rújīn, Zhōngguó dāngdài yìshù yǐjīng zài guójì shìchǎng shàng zhànjùle yìxízhīdì, dàn guānyú qí shìfǒu guòdù shāngyèhuà, shìfǒu sàngshīle pīpàn jīngshén de zhēnglùn cóng wèi tíngzhǐ. Yìshù de jiàzhí jiūjìng yīnggāi yóu shìchǎng lái héngliáng háishi yóu zuòpǐn běnshēn de sīxiǎng shēndù lái dìngyì, yīrán shì yí gè zhíde shēnsī de wèntí.
passages.text_en: The development trajectory of contemporary Chinese art reflects the profound transformation of Chinese society over several decades. From the avant-garde art movement of the 1980s to contemporary artists now active on the international stage, Chinese art has undergone a difficult metamorphosis from imitation to innovation. Early Chinese contemporary art was deeply influenced by Western modernism, with many artists attempting to break free from traditional constraints by drawing on Western methods of expression. However, over time, more and more artists began to reflect on this one-directional cultural import, turning instead to Chinese traditional aesthetics and contemporary social reality for inspiration. Their works contain both critical reflections on globalization and in-depth explorations of national identity. Today, Chinese contemporary art has secured a place in the international market, but debates about whether it has become overly commercialized or lost its critical spirit have never ceased. Whether the value of art should be measured by the market or defined by the intellectual depth of the work itself remains a question worthy of deep contemplation.

questions.q_zh: 早期中国当代艺术受什么影响？
questions.q_en: What influenced early Chinese contemporary art?
questions.answer: 深受西方现代主义的影响。

questions.q_zh: 后来艺术家的创作方向发生了什么变化？
questions.q_en: How did artists' creative direction change later?
questions.answer: 开始从中国传统美学和当代社会现实中汲取灵感。

passages.title: Education Reform Debate
passages.text_zh: 素质教育与应试教育之间的矛盾一直是中国教育改革的核心议题。应试教育体制下，分数成为衡量学生能力的唯一标准，导致学生和家长过分注重考试成绩而忽视了综合能力的培养。虽然高考制度在一定程度上保障了教育的公平性，为来自不同社会阶层的学生提供了相对平等的竞争平台，但其弊端也日益凸显。过度竞争不仅造成了学生身心健康问题的蔓延，还在一定程度上抑制了创新思维的发展。近年来，政府出台了一系列教育改革措施，包括减轻课业负担、推进多元化评价体系和加强职业教育等。然而，改革的推进面临着来自社会各方的阻力。许多家长担心减负政策会降低子女的竞争力，而部分教师也对新的教学模式感到不适应。如何在保障公平的前提下激发学生的创造潜能，是教育改革必须攻克的难关。
passages.text_pinyin: Sùzhì jiàoyù yǔ yìngshì jiàoyù zhī jiān de máodùn yìzhí shì Zhōngguó jiàoyù gǎigé de héxīn yìtí. Yìngshì jiàoyù tǐzhì xià, fēnshù chéngwéi héngliáng xuéshēng nénglì de wéiyī biāozhǔn, dǎozhì xuéshēng hé jiāzhǎng guòfèn zhùzhòng kǎoshì chéngjī ér hūshìle zōnghé nénglì de péiyǎng. Suīrán gāokǎo zhìdù zài yídìng chéngdù shàng bǎozhàngle jiàoyù de gōngpíngxìng, wèi lái zì bùtóng shèhuì jiēcéng de xuéshēng tígōngle xiāngduì píngděng de jìngzhēng píngtái, dàn qí bìduān yě rìyì tūxiǎn. Guòdù jìngzhēng bùjǐn zàochéngle xuéshēng shēnxīn jiànkāng wèntí de mànyán, hái zài yídìng chéngdù shàng yìzhìle chuàngxīn sīwéi de fāzhǎn. Jìn niánlái, zhèngfǔ chūtáile yí xìliè jiàoyù gǎigé cuòshī, bāokuò jiǎnqīng kèyè fùdān, tuījìn duōyuánhuà píngjià tǐxì hé jiāqiáng zhíyè jiàoyù děng. Rán'ér, gǎigé de tuījìn miànlínzhe lái zì shèhuì gè fāng de zǔlì. Xǔduō jiāzhǎng dānxīn jiǎnfù zhèngcè huì jiàngdī zǐnǚ de jìngzhēnglì, ér bùfen jiàoshī yě duì xīn de jiàoxué móshì gǎndào bù shìyìng. Rúhé zài bǎozhàng gōngpíng de qiántí xià jīfā xuéshēng de chuàngzào qiánnéng, shì jiàoyù gǎigé bìxū gōngkè de nánguān.
passages.text_en: The contradiction between quality education and exam-oriented education has always been the core issue of China's education reform. Under the exam-oriented system, scores became the sole standard for measuring student ability, leading students and parents to overemphasize test results while neglecting the development of comprehensive abilities. Although the college entrance examination system ensures educational fairness to a certain extent, providing a relatively equal competitive platform for students from different social strata, its drawbacks have become increasingly apparent. Excessive competition has not only caused the spread of physical and mental health problems among students but has also inhibited the development of innovative thinking to some degree. In recent years, the government has introduced a series of education reform measures, including reducing academic burdens, advancing diversified evaluation systems, and strengthening vocational education. However, reform progress faces resistance from all sectors of society. Many parents worry that burden-reduction policies will weaken their children's competitiveness, while some teachers also find it difficult to adapt to new teaching models. How to stimulate students' creative potential while ensuring fairness is a challenge that education reform must overcome.

questions.q_zh: 应试教育的主要弊端是什么？
questions.q_en: What are the main drawbacks of exam-oriented education?
questions.answer: 分数成为唯一标准，造成学生身心健康问题，抑制创新思维发展。

questions.q_zh: 教育改革面临什么阻力？
questions.q_en: What resistance does education reform face?
questions.answer: 家长担心减负会降低竞争力，部分教师对新教学模式不适应。

passages.title: Language Extinction Crisis
passages.text_zh: 语言是人类文明最重要的载体之一，每一种语言都蕴含着独特的世界观和认知方式。然而，全球化的推进和主流语言的强势扩张正在加速少数民族语言的消亡。语言学家估计，目前世界上现存的约七千种语言中，有近一半将在本世纪末消失。每一种语言的消亡都意味着人类失去了一种理解世界的独特视角。中国是一个多民族、多语言的国家，拥有丰富的语言多样性。然而，在推广普通话的进程中，许多方言和少数民族语言的使用范围正在急剧缩小。年轻一代在接受标准化教育后，往往不再使用祖辈的母语。一些语言学家呼吁在推广通用语言的同时，也要重视保护语言多样性。他们提出了诸如双语教育、语言档案建设和社区语言复兴等保护策略。语言多样性的保护不仅是学术问题，更关乎人类文化遗产的传承与文明的可持续发展。
passages.text_pinyin: Yǔyán shì rénlèi wénmíng zuì zhòngyào de zàitǐ zhī yī, měi yì zhǒng yǔyán dōu yùnhánzhe dútè de shìjièguān hé rènzhī fāngshì. Rán'ér, quánqiúhuà de tuījìn hé zhǔliú yǔyán de qiángshì kuòzhāng zhèngzài jiāsù shǎoshù mínzú yǔyán de xiāowáng. Yǔyánxuéjiā gūjì, mùqián shìjiè shàng xiàncún de yuē qī qiān zhǒng yǔyán zhōng, yǒu jìn yíbàn jiāng zài běn shìjì mò xiāoshī. Měi yì zhǒng yǔyán de xiāowáng dōu yìwèizhe rénlèi shīqùle yì zhǒng lǐjiě shìjiè de dútè shìjiǎo. Zhōngguó shì yí gè duō mínzú, duō yǔyán de guójiā, yōngyǒu fēngfù de yǔyán duōyàngxìng. Rán'ér, zài tuīguǎng Pǔtōnghuà de jìnchéng zhōng, xǔduō fāngyán hé shǎoshù mínzú yǔyán de shǐyòng fànwéi zhèngzài jíjù suōxiǎo. Niánqīng yí dài zài jiēshòu biāozhǔnhuà jiàoyù hòu, wǎngwǎng bú zài shǐyòng zǔbèi de mǔyǔ. Yìxiē yǔyánxuéjiā hūyù zài tuīguǎng tōngyòng yǔyán de tóngshí, yě yào zhòngshì bǎohù yǔyán duōyàngxìng. Tāmen tíchūle zhūrú shuāngyǔ jiàoyù, yǔyán dàng'àn jiànshè hé shèqū yǔyán fùxīng děng bǎohù cèlüè. Yǔyán duōyàngxìng de bǎohù bùjǐn shì xuéshù wèntí, gèng guānhū rénlèi wénhuà yíchǎn de chuánchéng yǔ wénmíng de kě chíxù fāzhǎn.
passages.text_en: Language is one of the most important vehicles of human civilization, with each language containing a unique worldview and mode of cognition. However, the advancement of globalization and the aggressive expansion of dominant languages are accelerating the extinction of minority languages. Linguists estimate that of the approximately seven thousand languages currently existing in the world, nearly half will disappear by the end of this century. The extinction of each language means humanity loses a unique perspective for understanding the world. China is a multi-ethnic, multilingual country with rich linguistic diversity. However, in the process of promoting Mandarin, the usage scope of many dialects and minority languages is shrinking dramatically. The younger generation, after receiving standardized education, often no longer uses their grandparents' mother tongue. Some linguists call for protecting linguistic diversity while promoting a common language. They have proposed preservation strategies such as bilingual education, language archive construction, and community language revitalization. The protection of linguistic diversity is not merely an academic issue — it concerns the inheritance of human cultural heritage and the sustainable development of civilization.

questions.q_zh: 语言学家估计有多少语言可能消失？
questions.q_en: How many languages do linguists estimate may disappear?
questions.answer: 现存约七千种语言中有近一半将在本世纪末消失。

questions.q_zh: 提出了哪些语言保护策略？
questions.q_en: What language preservation strategies have been proposed?
questions.answer: 双语教育、语言档案建设和社区语言复兴。

passages.title: Income Inequality Analysis
passages.text_zh: 收入不平等是全球范围内普遍存在的社会现象，其根源错综复杂，涉及经济结构、政策制度和历史因素等多个层面。在中国，改革开放以来的经济高速增长虽然使整体国民收入大幅提升，但贫富差距也随之拉大。城乡之间、区域之间以及不同行业之间的收入差异尤为突出。东部沿海地区凭借区位优势和开放政策率先发展，而中西部地区则相对滞后。此外，教育资源的不均衡分配也在一定程度上加剧了社会阶层的固化。为缩小收入差距，政府采取了扶贫攻坚、区域协调发展和税收调节等一系列举措，并取得了显著成效。然而，要从根本上解决收入不平等问题，还需要进一步完善社会保障体系、促进教育公平以及打破阻碍社会流动的制度性障碍。唯有如此，经济发展的成果才能真正惠及全体国民。
passages.text_pinyin: Shōurù bù píngděng shì quánqiú fànwéi nèi pǔbiàn cúnzài de shèhuì xiànxiàng, qí gēnyuán cuòzōng fùzá, shèjí jīngjì jiégòu, zhèngcè zhìdù hé lìshǐ yīnsù děng duō gè céngmiàn. Zài Zhōngguó, gǎigé kāifàng yǐlái de jīngjì gāosù zēngzhǎng suīrán shǐ zhěngtǐ guómín shōurù dàfú tíshēng, dàn pínfù chājù yě suízhī lā dà. Chéngxiāng zhī jiān, qūyù zhī jiān yǐjí bùtóng hángyè zhī jiān de shōurù chāyì yóu wéi tūchū. Dōngbù yánhǎi dìqū píngjiè qūwèi yōushì hé kāifàng zhèngcè shuàixiān fāzhǎn, ér zhōng xībù dìqū zé xiāngduì zhìhòu. Cǐwài, jiàoyù zīyuán de bù jūnhéng fēnpèi yě zài yídìng chéngdù shàng jiājùle shèhuì jiēcéng de gùhuà. Wèi suōxiǎo shōurù chājù, zhèngfǔ cǎiqǔle fúpín gōngjiān, qūyù xiétiáo fāzhǎn hé shuìshōu tiáojié děng yí xìliè jǔcuò, bìng qǔdéle xiǎnzhù chéngxiào. Rán'ér, yào cóng gēnběn shàng jiějué shōurù bù píngděng wèntí, hái xūyào jìnyíbù wánshàn shèhuì bǎozhàng tǐxì, cùjìn jiàoyù gōngpíng yǐjí dǎpò zǔ'ài shèhuì liúdòng de zhìdùxìng zhàng'ài. Wéi yǒu rúcǐ, jīngjì fāzhǎn de chéngguǒ cái néng zhēnzhèng huìjí quántǐ guómín.
passages.text_en: Income inequality is a widespread social phenomenon on a global scale, with complex roots involving multiple dimensions including economic structure, policy systems, and historical factors. In China, although the rapid economic growth since reform and opening up has significantly raised overall national income, the wealth gap has also widened. Income disparities between urban and rural areas, between regions, and between different industries are particularly pronounced. Eastern coastal areas developed first by leveraging their geographical advantages and open policies, while central and western regions lagged relatively behind. Moreover, the unequal distribution of educational resources has to some extent intensified social stratification. To narrow the income gap, the government has implemented a series of measures including targeted poverty alleviation, coordinated regional development, and tax regulation, achieving notable results. However, to fundamentally solve income inequality, further improvements to the social security system, promotion of educational equity, and removal of institutional barriers to social mobility are still needed. Only then can the fruits of economic development truly benefit all citizens.

questions.q_zh: 中国收入差距主要体现在哪些方面？
questions.q_en: In what aspects is China's income gap mainly reflected?
questions.answer: 城乡之间、区域之间以及不同行业之间。

questions.q_zh: 根本解决收入不平等还需要什么？
questions.q_en: What is still needed to fundamentally solve income inequality?
questions.answer: 完善社会保障体系、促进教育公平、打破阻碍社会流动的制度性障碍。

passages.title: Philosophy of Chinese Cuisine
passages.text_zh: 中国饮食文化博大精深，其背后蕴含着深厚的哲学思想。自古以来，中国人就将饮食提升到了哲学和美学的高度。孔子提出的"食不厌精，脍不厌细"体现了对饮食品质的极致追求；而道家的"药食同源"理念则强调了饮食与养生的密切关系。中国烹饪讲究色、香、味、形、器的和谐统一，追求的不仅是味觉上的满足，更是一种综合性的审美体验。不同地区的菜系各具特色，从川菜的麻辣到粤菜的清淡，从鲁菜的厚重到淮扬菜的精致，反映了不同地理环境和文化传统对饮食风格的深刻影响。在全球化的今天，中国饮食文化正在经历前所未有的变革。西方快餐文化的冲击、食品工业化的推进以及年轻人饮食观念的变化，都在重塑着中国人的餐桌。如何在接纳新事物的同时守护传统饮食文化的精髓，是一个需要认真对待的课题。
passages.text_pinyin: Zhōngguó yǐnshí wénhuà bódà jīngshēn, qí bèihòu yùnhánzhe shēnhòu de zhéxué sīxiǎng. Zìgǔ yǐlái, Zhōngguó rén jiù jiāng yǐnshí tíshēng dàole zhéxué hé měixué de gāodù. Kǒngzǐ tíchū de 'shí bù yàn jīng, kuài bù yàn xì' tǐxiànle duì yǐnshí pǐnzhì de jízhì zhuīqiú; ér Dàojiā de 'yào shí tóngyuán' lǐniàn zé qiángdiàole yǐnshí yǔ yǎngshēng de mìqiè guānxì. Zhōngguó pēngrèn jiǎngjiu sè, xiāng, wèi, xíng, qì de héxié tǒngyī, zhuīqiú de bùjǐn shì wèijué shàng de mǎnzú, gèng shì yì zhǒng zōnghéxìng de shěnměi tǐyàn. Bùtóng dìqū de càixì gè jù tèsè, cóng Chuāncài de málà dào Yuècài de qīngdàn, cóng Lǔcài de hòuzhòng dào Huáiyángcài de jīngzhì, fǎnyìngle bùtóng dìlǐ huánjìng hé wénhuà chuántǒng duì yǐnshí fēnggé de shēnkè yǐngxiǎng. Zài quánqiúhuà de jīntiān, Zhōngguó yǐnshí wénhuà zhèngzài jīnglì qián suǒ wèi yǒu de biàngé. Xīfāng kuàicān wénhuà de chōngjī, shípǐn gōngyèhuà de tuījìn yǐjí niánqīng rén yǐnshí guānniàn de biànhuà, dōu zài chóngxù zhe Zhōngguó rén de cānzhuō. Rúhé zài jiēnà xīn shìwù de tóngshí shǒuhù chuántǒng yǐnshí wénhuà de jīngsuǐ, shì yí gè xūyào rènzhēn duìdài de kètí.
passages.text_en: Chinese food culture is vast and profound, underpinned by deep philosophical thought. Since ancient times, the Chinese have elevated food to the level of philosophy and aesthetics. Confucius's dictum that 'one should not tire of fine grain and finely minced meat' reflects the ultimate pursuit of food quality, while the Taoist concept of 'medicine and food share the same origin' emphasizes the close relationship between diet and health cultivation. Chinese cooking pursues the harmonious unity of color, aroma, taste, shape, and vessel — seeking not merely gustatory satisfaction but a comprehensive aesthetic experience. Different regional cuisines each have their own characteristics: from the numbing spiciness of Sichuan cuisine to the light flavors of Cantonese cuisine, from the robust quality of Shandong cuisine to the refinement of Huaiyang cuisine — reflecting the profound influence of different geographical environments and cultural traditions on culinary styles. In today's globalized world, Chinese food culture is undergoing unprecedented transformation. The impact of Western fast-food culture, the advancement of food industrialization, and changes in young people's dietary attitudes are all reshaping the Chinese table. How to protect the essence of traditional food culture while embracing new things is a topic that deserves serious attention.

questions.q_zh: 中国烹饪讲究什么？
questions.q_en: What does Chinese cooking emphasize?
questions.answer: 色、香、味、形、器的和谐统一。

questions.q_zh: 中国饮食文化面临哪些变革？
questions.q_en: What changes is Chinese food culture facing?
questions.answer: 西方快餐文化的冲击、食品工业化的推进和年轻人饮食观念的变化。

passages.title: Privacy in the Digital Age
passages.text_zh: 数字技术的迅猛发展在极大便利人类生活的同时，也对个人隐私权构成了严峻的威胁。大数据和人工智能技术的广泛应用使得海量个人信息被收集、存储和分析。从网上购物记录到社交媒体发言，从出行轨迹到健康数据，个人的一举一动都可能被数字化记录。这些数据一旦被滥用或泄露，后果不堪设想。近年来，个人信息泄露事件屡见不鲜，从大型互联网公司的数据安全漏洞到电信诈骗中的精准信息获取，无不暴露出数据保护的严峻现实。为应对这一挑战，各国纷纷出台了数据保护相关法律法规。中国的《个人信息保护法》于近年正式实施，标志着中国在个人信息保护领域迈出了重要一步。然而，法律的制定只是第一步，如何确保其有效执行、平衡数据利用与隐私保护之间的关系，仍然任重道远。在数字化不可逆转的趋势下，构建一个既能促进技术创新又能保障公民隐私的制度框架，是摆在全人类面前的共同课题。
passages.text_pinyin: Shùzì jìshù de xùnměng fāzhǎn zài jídà biànlì rénlèi shēnghuó de tóngshí, yě duì gèrén yǐnsīquán gòuchéngle yánjùn de wēixié. Dà shùjù hé réngōng zhìnéng jìshù de guǎngfàn yìngyòng shǐde hǎiliàng gèrén xìnxī bèi shōují, cúnchú hé fēnxī. Cóng wǎng shàng gòuwù jìlù dào shèjiāo méitǐ fāyán, cóng chūxíng guǐjì dào jiànkāng shùjù, gèrén de yìjǔ yídòng dōu kěnéng bèi shùzìhuà jìlù. Zhèxiē shùjù yídàn bèi lànyòng huò xièlòu, hòuguǒ bùkān shèxiǎng. Jìn niánlái, gèrén xìnxī xièlòu shìjiàn lǚ jiàn bù xiān, cóng dàxíng hùliánwǎng gōngsī de shùjù ānquán lòudòng dào diànxìn zhàpiàn zhōng de jīngzhǔn xìnxī huòqǔ, wú bù bàolù chū shùjù bǎohù de yánjùn xiànshí. Wèi yìngduì zhè yī tiǎozhàn, gèguó fēnfēn chūtáile shùjù bǎohù xiāngguān fǎlǜ fǎguī. Zhōngguó de Gèrén Xìnxī Bǎohù Fǎ yú jìn nián zhèngshì shíshī, biāozhìzhe Zhōngguó zài gèrén xìnxī bǎohù lǐngyù màichūle zhòngyào yí bù. Rán'ér, fǎlǜ de zhìdìng zhǐ shì dì yī bù, rúhé quèbǎo qí yǒuxiào zhíxíng, pínghéng shùjù lìyòng yǔ yǐnsī bǎohù zhī jiān de guānxì, réngrán rèn zhòng dào yuǎn. Zài shùzìhuà bùkě nìzhuǎn de qūshì xià, gòujiàn yí gè jì néng cùjìn jìshù chuàngxīn yòu néng bǎozhàng gōngmín yǐnsī de zhìdù kuàngjià, shì bǎi zài quán rénlèi miànqián de gòngtóng kètí.
passages.text_en: The rapid development of digital technology, while greatly facilitating human life, also poses severe threats to personal privacy rights. The widespread application of big data and AI technology enables massive amounts of personal information to be collected, stored, and analyzed. From online shopping records to social media posts, from travel trajectories to health data, every individual action may be digitally recorded. Once this data is misused or leaked, the consequences are unimaginable. In recent years, personal information breaches have been commonplace, from data security vulnerabilities at major internet companies to the precise information acquisition in telecom fraud — all exposing the harsh reality of data protection. To address this challenge, countries around the world have introduced data protection laws and regulations. China's Personal Information Protection Law was officially implemented in recent years, marking an important step in the field of personal information protection. However, legislation is only the first step; how to ensure its effective enforcement and balance the relationship between data utilization and privacy protection remains a long and arduous task. Under the irreversible trend of digitalization, building an institutional framework that both promotes technological innovation and protects citizens' privacy is a shared challenge facing all of humanity.

questions.q_zh: 个人信息泄露有哪些表现？
questions.q_en: How does personal information leakage manifest?
questions.answer: 互联网公司的数据安全漏洞和电信诈骗中的精准信息获取。

questions.q_zh: 数字时代的核心挑战是什么？
questions.q_en: What is the core challenge of the digital age?
questions.answer: 构建既能促进技术创新又能保障公民隐私的制度框架。

passages.title: Mental Health Awareness
passages.text_zh: 长期以来，心理健康问题在中国社会一直处于被忽视甚至被污名化的境地。许多人将心理疾病与"意志薄弱"或"精神异常"画等号，导致患者羞于求助、讳疾忌医。然而，随着社会压力的不断增加和人们认知水平的提高，心理健康逐渐受到了更多的关注。世界卫生组织的数据显示，抑郁症已成为全球疾病负担的第二大原因。在中国，约有五千万人受到抑郁症的困扰，但就诊率极低。这一现状与社会文化因素密不可分——在注重"面子"的文化背景下，承认自己有心理问题被视为一种软弱的表现。可喜的是，近年来各方力量都在积极推动心理健康意识的普及。学校开始配备心理辅导员，企业引入了员工心理援助计划，媒体也在努力消除公众对心理疾病的偏见。尽管如此，要真正建立起覆盖全民的心理健康服务体系，还需要在专业人才培养、服务体系建设和社会观念转变等方面付出持续的努力。
passages.text_pinyin: Chángqī yǐlái, xīnlǐ jiànkāng wèntí zài Zhōngguó shèhuì yìzhí chùyú bèi hūshì shènzhì bèi wūmínghuà de jìngdì. Xǔduō rén jiāng xīnlǐ jíbìng yǔ 'yìzhì bóruò' huò 'jīngshén yìcháng' huà děnghào, dǎozhì huànzhě xiū yú qiúzhù, huìjí jìyī. Rán'ér, suízhe shèhuì yālì de bùduàn zēngjiā hé rénmen rènzhī shuǐpíng de tígāo, xīnlǐ jiànkāng zhújiàn shòudàole gèng duō de guānzhù. Shìjiè Wèishēng Zǔzhī de shùjù xiǎnshì, yìyùzhèng yǐ chéngwéi quánqiú jíbìng fùdān de dì èr dà yuányīn. Zài Zhōngguó, yuē yǒu wǔ qiān wàn rén shòudào yìyùzhèng de kùnrǎo, dàn jiùzhěn lǜ jí dī. Zhè yī xiànzhuàng yǔ shèhuì wénhuà yīnsù mì bùkě fēn—zài zhùzhòng 'miànzi' de wénhuà bèijǐng xià, chéngrèn zìjǐ yǒu xīnlǐ wèntí bèi shì wéi yì zhǒng ruǎnruò de biǎoxiàn. Kěxǐ de shì, jìn niánlái gè fāng lìliàng dōu zài jījí tuīdòng xīnlǐ jiànkāng yìshí de pǔjí. Xuéxiào kāishǐ pèibèi xīnlǐ fǔdǎo yuán, qǐyè yǐnrùle yuángōng xīnlǐ yuánzhù jìhuà, méitǐ yě zài nǔlì xiāochú gōngzhòng duì xīnlǐ jíbìng de piānjiàn. Jǐnguǎn rúcǐ, yào zhēnzhèng jiànlì qǐ fùgài quánmín de xīnlǐ jiànkāng fúwù tǐxì, hái xūyào zài zhuānyè réncái péiyǎng, fúwù tǐxì jiànshè hé shèhuì guānniàn zhuǎnbiàn děng fāngmiàn fùchū chíxù de nǔlì.
passages.text_en: For a long time, mental health issues in Chinese society have been in a state of neglect and even stigmatization. Many people equate mental illness with 'weak willpower' or 'mental abnormality,' causing patients to be ashamed to seek help and avoid medical treatment. However, with increasing social pressure and rising awareness, mental health has gradually received more attention. WHO data shows that depression has become the second leading cause of global disease burden. In China, approximately fifty million people suffer from depression, yet the consultation rate is extremely low. This situation is inseparable from sociocultural factors — in a culture that values 'face,' admitting to having psychological problems is seen as a sign of weakness. Encouragingly, in recent years various forces have been actively promoting mental health awareness. Schools have begun staffing psychological counselors, companies have introduced employee psychological assistance programs, and media is working to eliminate public prejudice against mental illness. Nevertheless, to truly establish a mental health service system covering the entire population still requires sustained efforts in professional talent development, service system construction, and changing societal attitudes.

questions.q_zh: 为什么中国抑郁症就诊率极低？
questions.q_en: Why is the depression consultation rate in China extremely low?
questions.answer: 在注重面子的文化背景下，承认心理问题被视为软弱的表现，患者羞于求助。

questions.q_zh: 近年来推动心理健康的措施有哪些？
questions.q_en: What measures have been taken to promote mental health recently?
questions.answer: 学校配备心理辅导员、企业引入员工心理援助计划、媒体努力消除偏见。

passages.title: Global Water Crisis
passages.text_zh: 水资源匮乏是二十一世纪人类面临的最严峻的环境挑战之一。尽管地球表面约百分之七十被水覆盖，但可供人类直接利用的淡水资源仅占全球水资源总量的百分之二点五左右，且分布极不均衡。随着人口增长、工业化进程加快和气候变化加剧，全球淡水需求持续攀升，而水资源的供给能力却在下降。联合国估计，到本世纪中叶，全球将有近五十亿人面临不同程度的水资源短缺。中国虽然拥有丰富的水资源总量，但人均水资源占有量仅为世界平均水平的四分之一，属于严重缺水国家之列。南水北调等大型水利工程在一定程度上缓解了北方地区的用水紧张状况，但从长远来看，节约用水、提高水资源利用效率和保护水生态环境才是解决水危机的根本之策。每一个人都应该认识到，水不仅是一种自然资源，更是维系人类文明存续的生命之源。
passages.text_pinyin: Shuǐ zīyuán kuìfá shì èrshíyī shìjì rénlèi miànlín de zuì yánjùn de huánjìng tiǎozhàn zhī yī. Jǐnguǎn dìqiú biǎomiàn yuē bǎi fēn zhī qīshí bèi shuǐ fùgài, dàn kě gōng rénlèi zhíjiē lìyòng de dànshuǐ zīyuán jǐn zhàn quánqiú shuǐ zīyuán zǒngliàng de bǎi fēn zhī èr diǎn wǔ zuǒyòu, qiě fēnbù jí bù jūnhéng. Suízhe rénkǒu zēngzhǎng, gōngyèhuà jìnchéng jiākuài hé qìhòu biànhuà jiājù, quánqiú dànshuǐ xūqiú chíxù pānshēng, ér shuǐ zīyuán de gōngjǐ nénglì què zài xiàjiàng. Liánhéguó gūjì, dào běn shìjì zhōngyè, quánqiú jiāng yǒu jìn wǔshí yì rén miànlín bùtóng chéngdù de shuǐ zīyuán duǎnquē. Zhōngguó suīrán yōngyǒu fēngfù de shuǐ zīyuán zǒngliàng, dàn rénjūn shuǐ zīyuán zhànyǒu liàng jǐn wéi shìjiè píngjūn shuǐpíng de sì fēn zhī yī, shǔyú yánzhòng quēshuǐ guójiā zhī liè. Nánshuǐ běidiào děng dàxíng shuǐlì gōngchéng zài yídìng chéngdù shàng huǎnjiěle běifāng dìqū de yòngshuǐ jǐnzhāng zhuàngkuàng, dàn cóng chángyuǎn lái kàn, jiéyuē yòngshuǐ, tígāo shuǐ zīyuán lìyòng xiàolǜ hé bǎohù shuǐ shēngtài huánjìng cái shì jiějué shuǐ wēijī de gēnběn zhī cè. Měi yí gè rén dōu yīnggāi rènshí dào, shuǐ bùjǐn shì yì zhǒng zìrán zīyuán, gèng shì wéixì rénlèi wénmíng cúnxù de shēngmìng zhī yuán.
passages.text_en: Water scarcity is one of the most severe environmental challenges facing humanity in the twenty-first century. Although approximately seventy percent of the Earth's surface is covered by water, freshwater directly available for human use accounts for only about two point five percent of total global water resources, and is extremely unevenly distributed. With population growth, accelerating industrialization, and worsening climate change, global freshwater demand continues to climb while supply capacity is declining.
