The United Nations estimates that by mid-century, nearly five billion people worldwide will face varying degrees of water scarcity. Although China possesses abundant total water resources, its per capita water resource share is only one quarter of the world average, placing it among seriously water-scarce nations. Large-scale water projects like the South-to-North Water Diversion have alleviated water stress in northern regions to some extent, but in the long run, conserving water, improving water resource utilization efficiency, and protecting aquatic ecosystems are the fundamental strategies for solving the water crisis. Everyone should recognize that water is not merely a natural resource — it is the source of life sustaining the continuation of human civilization.

questions.q_zh: 全球可利用的淡水资源占多少？
questions.q_en: What percentage of global water is usable freshwater?
questions.answer: 仅占全球水资源总量的百分之二点五左右。

questions.q_zh: 解决水危机的根本方法是什么？
questions.q_en: What are the fundamental solutions to the water crisis?
questions.answer: 节约用水、提高水资源利用效率和保护水生态环境。

passages.title: The New Silk Road
passages.text_zh: 古代丝绸之路曾是连接东西方文明的重要通道，承载着贸易往来和文化交流的使命。如今，"一带一路"倡议赋予了这条古老通道以全新的时代内涵。该倡议自提出以来，已有超过一百五十个国家和地区参与合作，涵盖了基础设施建设、产业投资、金融合作和人文交流等多个领域。支持者认为，"一带一路"为发展中国家提供了急需的基础设施投资，促进了区域经济一体化，为全球经济治理提供了新的方案。然而，该倡议也面临着一些质疑和挑战。部分西方国家对其背后的战略意图表示担忧，一些参与国也面临着债务可持续性的问题。此外，项目实施过程中的环境影响评估、劳工权益保障和当地社区利益协调等问题也引发了广泛讨论。不可否认的是，在一个日益多极化的世界中，任何大规模的国际合作倡议都必须在效率与公平、发展与可持续之间找到恰当的平衡点。
passages.text_pinyin: Gǔdài Sīchóu zhī Lù céng shì liánjiē dōngxīfāng wénmíng de zhòngyào tōngdào, chéngzàizhe màoyì wǎnglái hé wénhuà jiāoliú de shǐmìng. Rújīn, 'Yídài Yílù' chàngyì fùyǔle zhè tiáo gǔlǎo tōngdào yǐ quánxīn de shídài nèihán. Gāi chàngyì zì tíchū yǐlái, yǐ yǒu chāoguò yìbǎi wǔshí gè guójiā hé dìqū cānyù hézuò, hángàile jīchǔ shèshī jiànshè, chǎnyè tóuzī, jīnróng hézuò hé rénwén jiāoliú děng duō gè lǐngyù. Zhīchí zhě rènwéi, 'Yídài Yílù' wèi fāzhǎnzhōng guójiā tígōngle jí xū de jīchǔ shèshī tóuzī, cùjìnle qūyù jīngjì yìtǐhuà, wèi quánqiú jīngjì zhìlǐ tígōngle xīn de fāng'àn. Rán'ér, gāi chàngyì yě miànlínzhe yìxiē zhìyí hé tiǎozhàn. Bùfen xīfāng guójiā duì qí bèihòu de zhànlüè yìtú biǎoshì dānyōu, yìxiē cānyù guó yě miànlínzhe zhàiwù kě chíxùxìng de wèntí. Cǐwài, xiàngmù shíshī guòchéng zhōng de huánjìng yǐngxiǎng pínggū, láogōng quányì bǎozhàng hé dāngdì shèqū lìyì xiétiáo děng wèntí yě yǐnfāle guǎngfàn tǎolùn. Bùkě fǒurèn de shì, zài yí gè rìyì duōjíhuà de shìjiè zhōng, rènhé dà guīmó de guójì hézuò chàngyì dōu bìxū zài xiàolǜ yǔ gōngpíng, fāzhǎn yǔ kě chíxù zhī jiān zhǎodào qiàdàng de pínghéng diǎn.
passages.text_en: The ancient Silk Road was once an important corridor connecting Eastern and Western civilizations, carrying the mission of trade and cultural exchange. Today, the Belt and Road Initiative has given this ancient corridor an entirely new contemporary significance. Since its proposal, over one hundred and fifty countries and regions have participated in cooperation, spanning infrastructure construction, industrial investment, financial cooperation, and cultural exchange. Supporters believe the BRI provides developing countries with urgently needed infrastructure investment, promotes regional economic integration, and offers new solutions for global economic governance. However, the initiative also faces questions and challenges. Some Western countries express concern about the strategic intentions behind it, and some participating nations face issues of debt sustainability. Additionally, environmental impact assessments, labor rights protections, and local community interest coordination during project implementation have sparked widespread discussion. Undeniably, in an increasingly multipolar world, any large-scale international cooperation initiative must find an appropriate balance between efficiency and fairness, development and sustainability.

questions.q_zh: "一带一路"倡议涵盖了哪些领域？
questions.q_en: What areas does the BRI cover?
questions.answer: 基础设施建设、产业投资、金融合作和人文交流。

questions.q_zh: 该倡议面临哪些质疑？
questions.q_en: What questions does the initiative face?
questions.answer: 西方国家对战略意图的担忧、债务可持续性、环境影响和劳工权益等问题。

passages.title: Classical Poetry in Modern Life
passages.text_zh: 中国古典诗词是中华文化最璀璨的明珠之一，其影响力穿越千年，至今仍然深深扎根于中国人的精神世界之中。从李白的豪放洒脱到杜甫的沉郁顿挫，从苏轼的旷达豁然到李清照的细腻婉约，古诗词以其凝练的语言和深邃的意境，表达了人类永恒的情感和对生命的深沉思考。近年来，随着传统文化复兴热潮的兴起，古诗词重新进入了大众视野。电视节目《中国诗词大会》的热播引发了全民诵读古诗的风潮，各类诗词主题的文创产品也广受欢迎。然而，也有学者指出，当下对古诗词的消费往往停留在浅层的审美愉悦上，缺乏对诗词背后历史语境和思想内涵的深入理解。真正传承古诗词文化，不应只是机械地背诵和引用，而应该将其精神融入当代生活，在快节奏的现代社会中找到一片诗意的栖息之地。
passages.text_pinyin: Zhōngguó gǔdiǎn shīcí shì Zhōnghuá wénhuà zuì cuǐcàn de míngzhū zhī yī, qí yǐngxiǎnglì chuānyuè qiān nián, zhìjīn réngrán shēnshēn zhāgēn yú Zhōngguó rén de jīngshén shìjiè zhī zhōng. Cóng Lǐ Bái de háofàng sǎtuō dào Dù Fǔ de chényù dùncuò, cóng Sū Shì de kuàngdá huòrán dào Lǐ Qīngzhào de xìnì wǎnyuē, gǔ shīcí yǐ qí nínglián de yǔyán hé shēnsuì de yìjìng, biǎodále rénlèi yǒnghéng de qínggǎn hé duì shēngmìng de shēnchén sīkǎo. Jìn niánlái, suízhe chuántǒng wénhuà fùxīng rècháo de xīngqǐ, gǔ shīcí chóngxīn jìnrùle dàzhòng shìyě. Diànshì jiémù Zhōngguó Shīcí Dàhuì de rèbō yǐnfāle quánmín sòngdú gǔshī de fēngcháo, gèlèi shīcí zhǔtí de wénchuàng chǎnpǐn yě guǎng shòu huānyíng. Rán'ér, yě yǒu xuézhě zhǐchū, dāngxià duì gǔ shīcí de xiāofèi wǎngwǎng tíngliú zài qiǎncéng de shěnměi yúyuè shàng, quēfá duì shīcí bèihòu lìshǐ yǔjìng hé sīxiǎng nèihán de shēnrù lǐjiě. Zhēnzhèng chuánchéng gǔ shīcí wénhuà, bù yīng zhǐ shì jīxiè de bèisòng hé yǐnyòng, ér yīnggāi jiāng qí jīngshén róngrù dāngdài shēnghuó, zài kuài jiézòu de xiàndài shèhuì zhōng zhǎodào yí piàn shīyì de qīxī zhī dì.
passages.text_en: Classical Chinese poetry is one of the most brilliant jewels of Chinese culture, its influence spanning millennia and still deeply rooted in the spiritual world of the Chinese people today. From Li Bai's uninhibited boldness to Du Fu's profound gravitas, from Su Shi's broadminded serenity to Li Qingzhao's delicate elegance, classical poetry expresses humanity's eternal emotions and deep contemplation of life through its concise language and profound artistic conception. In recent years, with the rise of the traditional culture revival movement, classical poetry has re-entered the public eye. The popularity of the TV show 'Chinese Poetry Conference' sparked a nationwide trend of reciting classical poetry, and various poetry-themed cultural products have also been widely welcomed. However, some scholars point out that current consumption of classical poetry often remains at the level of superficial aesthetic pleasure, lacking deep understanding of the historical context and intellectual depth behind the poems. Truly inheriting classical poetry culture should not be mere mechanical memorization and citation, but rather integrating its spirit into contemporary life, finding a poetic resting place amid the fast pace of modern society.

questions.q_zh: 文章提到了哪些著名诗人？
questions.q_en: Which famous poets does the passage mention?
questions.answer: 李白、杜甫、苏轼、李清照。

questions.q_zh: 学者对当下古诗词消费有什么批评？
questions.q_en: What criticism do scholars have of current poetry consumption?
questions.answer: 往往停留在浅层的审美愉悦上，缺乏对诗词背后历史语境和思想内涵的深入理解。

passages.title: Governance Models Compared
passages.text_zh: 当代政治学领域中，关于不同治理模式优劣的探讨始终是一个充满争议的话题。西方民主制度长期以来被其倡导者视为人类政治文明的最终归宿，然而近年来，伴随着部分西方国家社会撕裂的加剧、民粹主义的抬头以及治理效能的下降，这种"历史终结论"受到了越来越多的质疑。与此同时，以中国为代表的发展中大国在经济建设和社会治理方面取得的显著成就，为国际社会提供了另一种值得关注的发展范式。然而，将不同治理模式简单地进行优劣对比，本身就存在方法论上的缺陷。每一种政治制度都根植于特定的历史文化土壤之中，脱离具体国情进行抽象比较难免流于肤浅。更为务实的态度是，承认治理模式的多样性，尊重各国根据自身实际情况选择发展道路的权利，同时在交流与互鉴中不断完善自身的治理体系。
passages.text_pinyin: Dāngdài zhèngzhìxué lǐngyù zhōng, guānyú bùtóng zhìlǐ móshì yōuliè de tàntǎo shǐzhōng shì yí gè chōngmǎn zhēngyì de huàtí. Xīfāng mínzhǔ zhìdù chángqī yǐlái bèi qí chàngdǎo zhě shì wéi rénlèi zhèngzhì wénmíng de zuìzhōng guīsù, rán'ér jìn niánlái, bànsuízhe bùfen xīfāng guójiā shèhuì sīliè de jiājù, mínsuì zhǔyì de táitóu yǐjí zhìlǐ xiàonéng de xiàjiàng, zhè zhǒng 'lìshǐ zhōngjié lùn' shòudàole yuè lái yuè duō de zhìyí. Yǔ cǐ tóngshí, yǐ Zhōngguó wéi dàibiǎo de fāzhǎnzhōng dàguó zài jīngjì jiànshè hé shèhuì zhìlǐ fāngmiàn qǔdé de xiǎnzhù chéngjiù, wèi guójì shèhuì tígōngle lìng yì zhǒng zhíde guānzhù de fāzhǎn fànshì. Rán'ér, jiāng bùtóng zhìlǐ móshì jiǎndān de jìnxíng yōuliè duìbǐ, běnshēn jiù cúnzài fāngfǎlùn shàng de quēxiàn. Měi yì zhǒng zhèngzhì zhìdù dōu gēnzhí yú tèdìng de lìshǐ wénhuà tǔrǎng zhī zhōng, tuōlí jùtǐ guóqíng jìnxíng chōuxiàng bǐjiào nánmiǎn liú yú fūqiǎn. Gèng wéi wùshí de tàidù shì, chéngrèn zhìlǐ móshì de duōyàngxìng, zūnzhòng gèguó gēnjù zìshēn shíjì qíngkuàng xuǎnzé fāzhǎn dàolù de quánlì, tóngshí zài jiāoliú yǔ hùjiàn zhōng bùduàn wánshàn zìshēn de zhìlǐ tǐxì.
passages.text_en: In the field of contemporary political science, the discussion about the merits and shortcomings of different governance models has always been a contentious topic. Western democratic systems have long been regarded by their advocates as the ultimate destination of human political civilization. However, in recent years, with the intensification of social polarization in some Western countries, the rise of populism, and declining governance efficacy, this 'end of history' thesis has faced increasing questioning. Meanwhile, the remarkable achievements of large developing countries, represented by China, in economic construction and social governance have provided the international community with another development paradigm worthy of attention. However, simply comparing different governance models as superior or inferior itself has methodological flaws. Every political system is rooted in specific historical and cultural soil; abstract comparisons divorced from specific national conditions inevitably become superficial. A more pragmatic attitude is to acknowledge the diversity of governance models, respect every nation's right to choose its development path according to its own circumstances, and continuously improve one's own governance system through exchange and mutual learning.

questions.q_zh: 为什么"历史终结论"受到了质疑？
questions.q_en: Why has the 'end of history' thesis been questioned?
questions.answer: 因为部分西方国家社会撕裂加剧、民粹主义抬头和治理效能下降。

questions.q_zh: 作者认为对待不同治理模式应持什么态度？
questions.q_en: What attitude does the author think we should have toward different governance models?
questions.answer: 承认多样性，尊重各国选择发展道路的权利，在交流互鉴中完善自身治理体系。

passages.title: Quantum Computing Frontiers
passages.text_zh: 量子计算被广泛认为是下一代信息技术革命的核心驱动力。与经典计算机利用比特（即0或1）进行运算不同，量子计算机利用量子比特的叠加态和纠缠态，在理论上能够以指数级的速度提升特定类型问题的计算能力。这意味着一些目前需要超级计算机运算数百年才能解决的问题，量子计算机可能在数分钟内就能给出答案。在密码学领域，量子计算的突破将使现有的加密体系面临根本性的威胁；在药物研发方面，量子模拟技术有望大幅加速分子结构的分析过程；而在人工智能领域，量子机器学习算法可能带来性能上的飞跃。然而，量子计算技术的实际应用仍然面临诸多技术瓶颈。量子退相干、错误率居高不下以及量子比特数量有限等问题亟待攻克。中美两国在这一领域的竞争日趋激烈，双方都投入了大量的人力和物力资源。可以预见的是，谁能率先在量子计算领域取得突破，谁就将在未来的科技竞争中占据战略制高点。
passages.text_pinyin: Liàngzǐ jìsuàn bèi guǎngfàn rènwéi shì xià yí dài xìnxī jìshù gémìng de héxīn qūdònglì. Yǔ jīngdiǎn jìsuànjī lìyòng bǐtè (jí líng huò yī) jìnxíng yùnsuàn bùtóng, liàngzǐ jìsuànjī lìyòng liàngzǐ bǐtè de diéjiā tài hé jiūchán tài, zài lǐlùn shàng nénggòu yǐ zhǐshùjí de sùdù tíshēng tèdìng lèixíng wèntí de jìsuàn nénglì. Zhè yìwèizhe yìxiē mùqián xūyào chāojí jìsuànjī yùnsuàn shù bǎi nián cái néng jiějué de wèntí, liàngzǐ jìsuànjī kěnéng zài shù fēnzhōng nèi jiù néng gěichū dá'àn. Zài mìmǎxué lǐngyù, liàngzǐ jìsuàn de tūpò jiāng shǐ xiànyǒu de jiāmì tǐxì miànlín gēnběnxìng de wēixié; zài yàowù yánfā fāngmiàn, liàngzǐ mónǐ jìshù yǒuwàng dàfú jiāsù fēnzǐ jiégòu de fēnxī guòchéng; ér zài réngōng zhìnéng lǐngyù, liàngzǐ jīqì xuéxí suànfǎ kěnéng dàilái xìngnéng shàng de fēiyuè. Rán'ér, liàngzǐ jìsuàn jìshù de shíjì yìngyòng réngrán miànlín zhūduō jìshù píngjǐng. Liàngzǐ tuì xiānggān, cuòwù lǜ jūgāo bùxià yǐjí liàngzǐ bǐtè shùliàng yǒuxiàn děng wèntí jídài gōngkè. Zhōng Měi liǎng guó zài zhè yī lǐngyù de jìngzhēng rìqū jīliè, shuāngfāng dōu tóurùle dàliàng de rénlì hé wùlì zīyuán. Kěyǐ yùjiàn de shì, shéi néng shuàixiān zài liàngzǐ jìsuàn lǐngyù qǔdé tūpò, shéi jiù jiāng zài wèilái de kējì jìngzhēng zhōng zhànjù zhànlüè zhìgāo diǎn.
passages.text_en: Quantum computing is widely regarded as the core driving force of the next information technology revolution. Unlike classical computers that use bits (either 0 or 1) for computation, quantum computers utilize the superposition and entanglement states of quantum bits, theoretically capable of exponentially improving computational power for certain types of problems. This means some problems that currently require supercomputers to calculate for hundreds of years could potentially be answered by quantum computers in minutes. In the field of cryptography, breakthroughs in quantum computing will pose fundamental threats to existing encryption systems; in drug development, quantum simulation technology is expected to greatly accelerate molecular structure analysis; and in artificial intelligence, quantum machine learning algorithms may bring performance leaps. However, the practical application of quantum computing technology still faces numerous technical bottlenecks. Problems such as quantum decoherence, persistently high error rates, and limited qubit numbers urgently need to be overcome. Competition between China and the United States in this field is becoming increasingly intense, with both sides investing massive human and material resources. It is foreseeable that whoever achieves breakthroughs in quantum computing first will hold the strategic high ground in future technological competition.

questions.q_zh: 量子计算机与经典计算机的核心区别是什么？
questions.q_en: What is the core difference between quantum and classical computers?
questions.answer: 量子计算机利用量子比特的叠加态和纠缠态，而不是经典的0或1比特。

questions.q_zh: 量子计算面临哪些技术瓶颈？
questions.q_en: What technical bottlenecks does quantum computing face?
questions.answer: 量子退相干、错误率居高不下以及量子比特数量有限。

passages.title: Bioethics in the Gene Editing Era
passages.title_zh: 基因编辑时代的生命伦理
passages.text_zh: 基因编辑技术的飞速发展，尤其是CRISPR-Cas9系统的问世，为人类攻克遗传疾病带来了前所未有的希望，但同时也引发了深刻的伦理争议。从技术层面而言，基因编辑可以精准地修改人体DNA中的特定基因片段，从而有望从根源上治疗镰刀型细胞贫血症、囊性纤维化等遗传性疾病。然而，当这项技术被应用于人类生殖细胞或胚胎时，其伦理维度就变得异常复杂。对生殖细胞的基因修改将遗传给后代，其长期效应目前尚无法准确预估。更为棘手的是，基因编辑技术可能被用于"增强"人类的自然特征——例如提高智商、改善外貌等非治疗性目的，这将引发关于"设计婴儿"的严重伦理担忧。2018年中国科学家贺建奎宣布世界首例基因编辑婴儿诞生的事件，在国际科学界引起了轩然大波，也凸显了建立健全生命伦理监管框架的紧迫性。如何在推动科学进步的同时守住伦理底线，如何平衡个体利益与人类整体福祉，是我们这个时代必须直面的深层困境。
passages.text_pinyin: Jīyīn biānjí jìshù de fēisù fāzhǎn, yóuqí shì CRISPR-Cas9 xìtǒng de wènshì, wèi rénlèi gōngkè yíchuán jíbìng dàiláile qián suǒ wèi yǒu de xīwàng, dàn tóngshí yě yǐnfāle shēnkè de lúnlǐ zhēngyì. Cóng jìshù céngmiàn ér yán, jīyīn biānjí kěyǐ jīngzhǔn de xiūgǎi réntǐ DNA zhōng de tèdìng jīyīn piànduàn, cóng'ér yǒuwàng cóng gēnyuán shàng zhìliáo liándāoxíng xìbāo pínxuèzhèng, nángxìng xiānwéihuà děng yíchuánxìng jíbìng. Rán'ér, dāng zhè xiàng jìshù bèi yìngyòng yú rénlèi shēngzhí xìbāo huò pēitāi shí, qí lúnlǐ wéidù jiù biàn de yìcháng fùzá. Duì shēngzhí xìbāo de jīyīn xiūgǎi jiāng yíchuán gěi hòudài, qí chángqī xiàoyìng mùqián shàng wúfǎ zhǔnquè yùgū. Gèng wéi jíshǒu de shì, jīyīn biānjí jìshù kěnéng bèi yòng yú 'zēngqiáng' rénlèi de zìrán tèzhēng—lìrú tígāo zhìshāng, gǎishàn wàimào děng fēi zhìliáoxìng mùdì, zhè jiāng yǐnfā guānyú 'shèjì yīng'ér' de yánzhòng lúnlǐ dānyōu. 2018 nián Zhōngguó kēxuéjiā Hè Jiànkuí xuānbù shìjiè shǒulì jīyīn biānjí yīng'ér dànshēng de shìjiàn, zài guójì kēxuéjiè yǐnqǐle xuānrán dàbō, yě tūxiǎnle jiànlì jiànquán shēngmìng lúnlǐ jiānguǎn kuàngjià de jǐnpòxìng. Rúhé zài tuīdòng kēxué jìnbù de tóngshí shǒuzhù lúnlǐ dǐxiàn, rúhé pínghéng gètǐ lìyì yǔ rénlèi zhěngtǐ fúzhǐ, shì wǒmen zhège shídài bìxū zhímiàn de shēncéng kùnjìng.
passages.text_en: The rapid development of gene editing technology, especially the advent of the CRISPR-Cas9 system, has brought unprecedented hope for conquering genetic diseases, but has also triggered profound ethical controversies. From a technical standpoint, gene editing can precisely modify specific gene segments in human DNA, potentially curing hereditary diseases such as sickle cell anemia and cystic fibrosis at their root. However, when this technology is applied to human reproductive cells or embryos, its ethical dimensions become extraordinarily complex. Genetic modifications to reproductive cells will be inherited by offspring, and the long-term effects currently cannot be accurately predicted. Even more thorny is that gene editing technology could be used to 'enhance' natural human characteristics — such as increasing IQ or improving appearance for non-therapeutic purposes — which would raise serious ethical concerns about 'designer babies.' The 2018 announcement by Chinese scientist He Jiankui of the world's first gene-edited babies caused an uproar in the international scientific community and highlighted the urgency of establishing a sound bioethics regulatory framework. How to maintain ethical boundaries while advancing scientific progress, and how to balance individual interests with the overall wellbeing of humanity, are deep dilemmas our era must confront.

questions.q_zh: 基因编辑技术应用于生殖细胞有什么伦理问题？
questions.q_en: What ethical issues arise from applying gene editing to reproductive cells?
questions.answer: 修改将遗传给后代，长期效应无法预估，可能被用于非治疗性的"增强"目的。

questions.q_zh: 贺建奎事件为什么引起轩然大波？
questions.q_en: Why did the He Jiankui incident cause an uproar?
questions.answer: 他宣布了世界首例基因编辑婴儿的诞生，凸显了建立生命伦理监管框架的紧迫性。

passages.title: Climate Policy and Economic Development
passages.text_zh: 气候变化治理与经济发展之间的张力一直是国际气候谈判中的核心矛盾。发达国家在工业化进程中累积了大量的碳排放，理应承担更大的减排责任；而发展中国家则主张，不应以限制碳排放为由阻碍其经济发展和消除贫困的正当诉求。这一分歧在《巴黎协定》的框架下虽有所缓解，但远未得到根本解决。碳中和目标的提出为全球气候治理注入了新的动力，各国纷纷制定了雄心勃勃的减排时间表。然而，从承诺到实践之间存在着巨大的鸿沟。可再生能源的技术成本虽在持续下降，但化石能源在全球能源结构中仍占据主导地位。能源转型不仅涉及技术革新，更牵涉到产业重构、就业转移和社会公平等深层次问题。对于煤炭依赖度高的发展中国家而言，过于激进的去碳化进程可能引发能源安全风险和社会动荡。因此，建立一个既能有效应对气候变化、又能保障公平发展权利的全球治理机制，需要各方展现更大的政治智慧与妥协精神。
passages.text_pinyin: Qìhòu biànhuà zhìlǐ yǔ jīngjì fāzhǎn zhī jiān de zhānglì yìzhí shì guójì qìhòu tánpàn zhōng de héxīn máodùn. Fādá guójiā zài gōngyèhuà jìnchéng zhōng lěijīle dàliàng de tàn páifàng, lǐ yīng chéngdān gèng dà de jiǎnpái zérèn; ér fāzhǎnzhōng guójiā zé zhǔzhāng, bù yīng yǐ xiànzhì tàn páifàng wéi yóu zǔ'ài qí jīngjì fāzhǎn hé xiāochú pínkùn de zhèngdàng sùqiú. Zhè yī fēnqí zài Bālí Xiédìng de kuàngjià xià suī yǒu suǒ huǎnjiě, dàn yuǎn wèi dédào gēnběn jiějué. Tàn zhōnghé mùbiāo de tíchū wèi quánqiú qìhòu zhìlǐ zhùrùle xīn de dònglì, gèguó fēnfēn zhìdìngle xióngxīn bóbó de jiǎnpái shíjiān biǎo. Rán'ér, cóng chéngnuò dào shíjiàn zhī jiān cúnzàizhe jùdà de hónggōu. Kě zàishēng néngyuán de jìshù chéngběn suī zài chíxù xiàjiàng, dàn huàshí néngyuán zài quánqiú néngyuán jiégòu zhōng réng zhànjù zhǔdǎo dìwèi. Néngyuán zhuǎnxíng bùjǐn shèjí jìshù géxīn, gèng qiānshè dào chǎnyè chónggòu, jiùyè zhuǎnyí hé shèhuì gōngpíng děng shēn céngcì wèntí. Duìyú méitàn yīlàidù gāo de fāzhǎnzhōng guójiā ér yán, guòyú jījìn de qù tànhuà jìnchéng kěnéng yǐnfā néngyuán ānquán fēngxiǎn hé shèhuì dòngdàng. Yīncǐ, jiànlì yí gè jì néng yǒuxiào yìngduì qìhòu biànhuà, yòu néng bǎozhàng gōngpíng fāzhǎn quánlì de quánqiú zhìlǐ jīzhì, xūyào gè fāng zhǎnxiàn gèng dà de zhèngzhì zhìhuì yǔ tuǒxié jīngshén.
passages.text_en: The tension between climate change governance and economic development has always been the core contradiction in international climate negotiations. Developed countries accumulated massive carbon emissions during industrialization and should bear greater emission reduction responsibilities, while developing countries argue that limiting carbon emissions should not be used to impede their legitimate demands for economic development and poverty elimination. This divergence has been somewhat eased under the Paris Agreement framework but is far from fundamentally resolved. The proposal of carbon neutrality goals has injected new momentum into global climate governance, with countries formulating ambitious emission reduction timelines. However, an enormous gulf exists between promises and practice. Although renewable energy technology costs continue to decline, fossil fuels still dominate the global energy structure. Energy transition involves not only technological innovation but also deep-level issues such as industrial restructuring, employment transfer, and social equity. For developing countries highly dependent on coal, an overly aggressive decarbonization process could trigger energy security risks and social instability. Therefore, establishing a global governance mechanism that both effectively addresses climate change and safeguards fair development rights requires all parties to demonstrate greater political wisdom and a spirit of compromise.

questions.q_zh: 发达国家和发展中国家在气候问题上的核心分歧是什么？
questions.q_en: What is the core disagreement between developed and developing countries on climate?
questions.answer: 发达国家应承担更大减排责任，发展中国家认为不应以限制碳排放阻碍经济发展。

questions.q_zh: 能源转型面临哪些深层次问题？
questions.q_en: What deep-level issues does energy transition face?
questions.answer: 产业重构、就业转移、社会公平以及能源安全风险。

passages.title: Urbanization and Cultural Identity
passages.text_zh: 在城市化高歌猛进的时代背景下，文化认同的危机正在悄然蔓延。当千篇一律的高楼大厦取代了各具特色的传统街区，当标准化的消费文化淹没了地方性的文化表达，城市的面貌日趋雷同，居住其中的人们也逐渐丧失了对"家"的归属感。社会学家将这种现象称为"去地方化"——即城市在追求现代化的过程中失去了其独特的文化根基和地域特征。这一问题在中国的城市化进程中表现得尤为突出。大规模的旧城改造虽然改善了居民的居住条件，但也在不经意间摧毁了承载着几代人记忆的历史空间。老胡同的消失、方言的衰落、邻里关系的疏离，这些看似微小的变化实际上构成了一种深层的文化断裂。值得欣慰的是，近年来越来越多的城市规划者开始意识到这一问题的严重性，试图在城市更新中保留历史文化的元素。成都的宽窄巷子、北京的南锣鼓巷等项目便是在商业开发与文化保护之间寻求平衡的有益尝试。然而，如何避免这类项目沦为商业化的"文化表演"，如何让文化传承真正融入居民的日常生活，仍然是城市治理者面临的严峻考验。
passages.text_pinyin: Zài chéngshìhuà gāogē měngjìn de shídài bèijǐng xià, wénhuà rèntóng de wēijī zhèngzài qiǎorán mànyán. Dāng qiānpiān yílǜ de gāolóu dàshà qǔdàile gè jù tèsè de chuántǒng jiēqū, dāng biāozhǔnhuà de xiāofèi wénhuà yānmòle dìfāngxìng de wénhuà biǎodá, chéngshì de miànmào rìqū léitóng, jūzhù qí zhōng de rénmen yě zhújiàn sàngshīle duì 'jiā' de guīshǔ gǎn. Shèhuìxuéjiā jiāng zhè zhǒng xiànxiàng chēng wéi 'qù dìfānghuà'—jí chéngshì zài zhuīqiú xiàndàihuà de guòchéng zhōng shīqùle qí dútè de wénhuà gēnjī hé dìyù tèzhēng. Zhè yī wèntí zài Zhōngguó de chéngshìhuà jìnchéng zhōng biǎoxiàn de yóu wéi tūchū. Dà guīmó de jiù chéng gǎizào suīrán gǎishànle jūmín de jūzhù tiáojiàn, dàn yě zài bù jīngyì jiān cuīhuǐle chéngzàizhe jǐ dài rén jìyì de lìshǐ kōngjiān. Lǎo hútòng de xiāoshī, fāngyán de shuāiluò, línlǐ guānxì de shūlí, zhèxiē kànsì wēixiǎo de biànhuà shíjì shàng gòuchéngle yì zhǒng shēncéng de wénhuà duànliè. Zhíde xīnwèi de shì, jìn niánlái yuè lái yuè duō de chéngshì guīhuà zhě kāishǐ yìshí dào zhè yī wèntí de yánzhòngxìng, shìtú zài chéngshì gēngxīn zhōng bǎoliú lìshǐ wénhuà de yuánsù. Chéngdū de Kuān Zhǎi Xiàngzi, Běijīng de Nánluó Gǔxiàng děng xiàngmù biàn shì zài shāngyè kāifā yǔ wénhuà bǎohù zhī jiān xúnqiú pínghéng de yǒuyì chángshì. Rán'ér, rúhé bìmiǎn zhè lèi xiàngmù lún wéi shāngyèhuà de 'wénhuà biǎoyǎn', rúhé ràng wénhuà chuánchéng zhēnzhèng róngrù jūmín de rìcháng shēnghuó, réngrán shì chéngshì zhìlǐ zhě miànlín de yánjùn kǎoyàn.
passages.text_en: Against the backdrop of urbanization advancing at full speed, a crisis of cultural identity is quietly spreading. When uniform high-rises replace traditional neighborhoods with distinctive character, when standardized consumer culture drowns out local cultural expression, cities increasingly look alike and their inhabitants gradually lose their sense of belonging to 'home.' Sociologists call this phenomenon 'de-localization' — cities losing their unique cultural foundations and regional characteristics in the pursuit of modernization. This problem is particularly prominent in China's urbanization process. Large-scale old city renovation, while improving residents' living conditions, has inadvertently destroyed historical spaces carrying the memories of several generations. The disappearance of old hutongs, the decline of dialects, the distancing of neighborhood relationships — these seemingly small changes actually constitute a profound cultural rupture. It is gratifying that in recent years more and more urban planners have begun to recognize the severity of this problem, attempting to preserve historical and cultural elements in urban renewal. Projects like Chengdu's Wide and Narrow Alleys and Beijing's Nanluoguxiang represent beneficial attempts to seek balance between commercial development and cultural preservation. However, how to prevent such projects from becoming commercialized 'cultural performances,' and how to truly integrate cultural heritage into residents' daily lives, remains a severe test for urban administrators.

questions.q_zh: 什么是"去地方化"现象？
questions.q_en: What is the 'de-localization' phenomenon?
questions.answer: 城市在追求现代化的过程中失去了其独特的文化根基和地域特征。

questions.q_zh: 旧城改造带来了哪些文化方面的负面影响？
questions.q_en: What negative cultural impacts has old city renovation brought?
questions.answer: 摧毁了承载几代人记忆的历史空间，导致老胡同消失、方言衰落、邻里关系疏离。

questions.q_zh: 文章提到了哪些保护文化的尝试？
questions.q_en: What cultural preservation attempts does the passage mention?
questions.answer: 成都的宽窄巷子和北京的南锣鼓巷。

passages.title: Ethical Dimensions of AI Decision-Making
passages.title_zh: 人工智能决策的伦理维度
passages.text_zh: 随着人工智能在司法、医疗、金融等高风险领域的应用日益普遍，算法决策的公正性和透明度已经成为一个亟待解决的伦理难题。机器学习模型在训练过程中可能继承甚至放大训练数据中存在的偏见，从而导致歧视性的决策结果。例如，在招聘领域，如果训练数据反映了过去的性别偏见，算法可能会系统性地排斥女性候选人；在刑事司法领域，风险评估算法被发现对少数族裔存在不公平的偏见。更令人忧虑的是，许多深度学习模型的决策过程犹如一个"黑箱"，即便是开发者也难以完全解释其做出特定决策的依据。这种不透明性严重削弱了算法决策的可问责性，也使得受到不公正对待的个体难以有效地行使申诉权利。为应对这些挑战，学术界提出了"可解释人工智能"的研究方向，旨在开发既高效又透明的算法模型。同时，多国政府和国际组织也在积极制定人工智能治理准则，力图在技术创新与伦理约束之间建立适当的平衡。然而，技术的发展速度远超制度构建的步伐，如何确保人工智能始终服务于人类的福祉而非沦为加深不平等的工具，仍是一个悬而未决的时代命题。
passages.text_pinyin: Suízhe réngōng zhìnéng zài sīfǎ, yīliáo, jīnróng děng gāo fēngxiǎn lǐngyù de yìngyòng rìyì pǔbiàn, suànfǎ juécè de gōngzhèngxìng hé tòumíngdù yǐjīng chéngwéi yí gè jídài jiějué de lúnlǐ nántí. Jīqì xuéxí móxíng zài xùnliàn guòchéng zhōng kěnéng jìchéng shènzhì fàngdà xùnliàn shùjù zhōng cúnzài de piānjiàn, cóng'ér dǎozhì qíshìxìng de juécè jiéguǒ. Lìrú, zài zhāopìn lǐngyù, rúguǒ xùnliàn shùjù fǎnyìngle guòqù de xìngbié piānjiàn, suànfǎ kěnéng huì xìtǒngxìng de páichì nǚxìng hòuxuǎn rén; zài xíngshì sīfǎ lǐngyù, fēngxiǎn pínggū suànfǎ bèi fāxiàn duì shǎoshù zúyì cúnzài bù gōngpíng de piānjiàn. Gèng lìng rén yōulǜ de shì, xǔduō shēndù xuéxí móxíng de juécè guòchéng yóurú yí gè 'hēixiāng', jíbiàn shì kāifā zhě yě nányǐ wánquán jiěshì qí zuòchū tèdìng juécè de yījù. Zhè zhǒng bù tòumíngxìng yánzhòng xuēruòle suànfǎ juécè de kě wèn zé xìng, yě shǐde shòudào bù gōngzhèng duìdài de gètǐ nányǐ yǒuxiào de xíngshǐ shēnsù quánlì. Wèi yìngduì zhèxiē tiǎozhàn, xuéshùjiè tíchūle 'kě jiěshì réngōng zhìnéng' de yánjiū fāngxiàng, zhǐ zài kāifā jì gāoxiào yòu tòumíng de suànfǎ móxíng. Tóngshí, duō guó zhèngfǔ hé guójì zǔzhī yě zài jījí zhìdìng réngōng zhìnéng zhìlǐ zhǔnzé, lìtú zài jìshù chuàngxīn yǔ lúnlǐ yuēshù zhī jiān jiànlì shìdàng de pínghéng. Rán'ér, jìshù de fāzhǎn sùdù yuǎn chāo zhìdù gòujiàn de bùfá, rúhé quèbǎo réngōng zhìnéng shǐzhōng fúwù yú rénlèi de fúzhǐ ér fēi lún wéi jiāshēn bù píngděng de gōngjù, réng shì yí gè xuán ér wèi jué de shídài mìngtí.
passages.text_en: As artificial intelligence becomes increasingly prevalent in high-risk fields such as justice, healthcare, and finance, the fairness and transparency of algorithmic decision-making has become an urgent ethical challenge. Machine learning models may inherit or even amplify biases present in training data during the training process, leading to discriminatory decision outcomes. For instance, in recruitment, if training data reflects past gender biases, algorithms may systematically exclude female candidates; in criminal justice, risk assessment algorithms have been found to exhibit unfair biases against ethnic minorities. More worrying still, the decision-making process of many deep learning models resembles a 'black box' — even developers find it difficult to fully explain the basis for specific decisions. This opacity seriously undermines the accountability of algorithmic decisions and makes it difficult for individuals treated unfairly to effectively exercise their right to appeal. To address these challenges, academia has proposed the research direction of 'explainable AI,' aiming to develop algorithmic models that are both efficient and transparent. Meanwhile, multiple governments and international organizations are actively formulating AI governance guidelines, seeking to establish appropriate balance between technological innovation and ethical constraints. However, the pace of technological development far outstrips institutional construction, and how to ensure AI always serves human wellbeing rather than becoming a tool that deepens inequality remains an unresolved question of our era.

questions.q_zh: 算法偏见在哪些领域造成了问题？
questions.q_en: In which fields has algorithmic bias caused problems?
questions.answer: 招聘领域可能排斥女性候选人，刑事司法领域对少数族裔存在不公平偏见。

questions.q_zh: 什么是"可解释人工智能"？
questions.q_en: What is 'explainable AI'?
questions.answer: 一种研究方向，旨在开发既高效又透明的算法模型，使决策过程可以被理解和解释。

passages.title: Space Governance Challenges
passages.text_zh: 随着人类太空活动的日益频繁，外层空间治理已经成为国际法和国际关系领域的一个前沿议题。1967年签署的《外层空间条约》确立了太空探索的基本原则，包括外层空间不得据为己有、和平利用太空以及国际合作等。然而，半个多世纪以来，太空活动的面貌已经发生了根本性的变化。商业航天公司的异军突起打破了国家垄断太空的局面，数以千计的商业卫星涌入轨道空间，太空资源开发的商业前景日益明朗。这些新的发展态势对现有的太空治理框架提出了严峻的挑战。太空碎片的增多对在轨航天器构成了日益严重的威胁，有专家警告，如果不采取有效措施，近地轨道可能在数十年内变得不可用。太空军事化的趋势同样令人忧虑，多个国家已经组建了太空军事力量，反卫星武器的研发和测试加剧了太空安全环境的恶化。此外，关于月球和小行星矿产资源的开发权归属问题，也在国际社会引发了激烈的争论。面对这些复杂的挑战，国际社会迫切需要更新和完善太空治理的法律体系和合作机制，以确保外层空间的和平与可持续利用。
passages.text_pinyin: Suízhe rénlèi tàikōng huódòng de rìyì pínfán, wàicéng kōngjiān zhìlǐ yǐjīng chéngwéi guójìfǎ hé guójì guānxì lǐngyù de yí gè qiányán yìtí. 1967 nián qiānshǔ de Wàicéng Kōngjiān Tiáoyuē quèlìle tàikōng tànsuǒ de jīběn yuánzé, bāokuò wàicéng kōngjiān bùdé jù wéi jǐ yǒu, hépíng lìyòng tàikōng yǐjí guójì hézuò děng. Rán'ér, bàn gè duō shìjì yǐlái, tàikōng huódòng de miànmào yǐjīng fāshēngle gēnběnxìng de biànhuà. Shāngyè hángtiān gōngsī de yìjūn tūqǐ dǎpòle guójiā lǒngduàn tàikōng de júmiàn, shù yǐ qiān jì de shāngyè wèixīng yǒngrù guǐdào kōngjiān, tàikōng zīyuán kāifā de shāngyè qiánjǐng rìyì mínglǎng. Zhèxiē xīn de fāzhǎn tàishì duì xiànyǒu de tàikōng zhìlǐ kuàngjià tíchūle yánjùn de tiǎozhàn. Tàikōng suìpiàn de zēngduō duì zài guǐ hángtiān qì gòuchéngle rìyì yánzhòng de wēixié, yǒu zhuānjiā jǐnggào, rúguǒ bù cǎiqǔ yǒuxiào cuòshī, jìndì guǐdào kěnéng zài shù shí nián nèi biàn de bùkě yòng. Tàikōng jūnshìhuà de qūshì tóngyàng lìng rén yōulǜ, duō gè guójiā yǐjīng zǔjiànle tàikōng jūnshì lìliàng, fǎn wèixīng wǔqì de yánfā hé cèshì jiājùle tàikōng ānquán huánjìng de èhuà. Cǐwài, guānyú yuèqiú hé xiǎo xíngxīng kuàngchǎn zīyuán de kāifā quán guīshǔ wèntí, yě zài guójì shèhuì yǐnfāle jīliè de zhēnglùn. Miànduì zhèxiē fùzá de tiǎozhàn, guójì shèhuì pòqiè xūyào gēngxīn hé wánshàn tàikōng zhìlǐ de fǎlǜ tǐxì hé hézuò jīzhì, yǐ quèbǎo wàicéng kōngjiān de hépíng yǔ kě chíxù lìyòng.
passages.text_en: As human space activities become increasingly frequent, outer space governance has become a frontier issue in international law and international relations. The 1967 Outer Space Treaty established basic principles for space exploration, including that outer space cannot be appropriated, space must be used peacefully, and international cooperation is essential. However, over half a century later, the landscape of space activities has undergone fundamental changes. The sudden rise of commercial space companies has broken the state monopoly on space, thousands of commercial satellites have flooded orbital space, and the commercial prospects of space resource development are becoming increasingly clear. These new developments pose severe challenges to the existing space governance framework. The increase in space debris poses a growing threat to orbiting spacecraft, with experts warning that without effective measures, low Earth orbit could become unusable within decades. The trend toward space militarization is equally concerning — multiple countries have established space military forces, and the development and testing of anti-satellite weapons have worsened the space security environment. Furthermore, questions about the ownership of development rights for lunar and asteroid mineral resources have also sparked fierce debate in the international community. Facing these complex challenges, the international community urgently needs to update and improve the legal framework and cooperation mechanisms for space governance to ensure the peaceful and sustainable use of outer space.

questions.q_zh: 商业航天的发展对太空治理带来了什么挑战？
questions.q_en: What challenges has commercial space development brought to space governance?
questions.answer: 打破国家垄断，大量商业卫星涌入轨道，太空资源开发的归属问题引发争论。

questions.q_zh: 太空碎片问题有多严重？
questions.q_en: How serious is the space debris problem?
questions.answer: 对在轨航天器构成日益严重的威胁，近地轨道可能在数十年内变得不可用。

passages.title: Rural Revitalization Strategy
passages.text_zh: 乡村振兴战略是中国在全面建成小康社会之后提出的重大国家战略，旨在从根本上解决城乡发展不平衡的结构性矛盾。与以往单纯强调农业现代化不同，乡村振兴涵盖了产业兴旺、生态宜居、乡风文明、治理有效和生活富裕五个维度，体现了对农村发展的全方位系统性思考。然而，理想与现实之间依然存在着不小的落差。当前中国农村面临着劳动力持续外流、老龄化加剧和人才匮乏等严峻挑战。大量青壮年劳动力流向城市，导致许多村庄出现了"空心化"现象，留守老人和儿童的生存状况令人担忧。此外，农村产业基础薄弱、土地制度改革滞后以及公共服务供给不足等问题也制约着乡村振兴的步伐。值得关注的是，数字经济和电子商务的发展为农村带来了新的机遇。"淘宝村"的涌现证明了互联网可以帮助偏远地区的农民直接对接广阔的市场。同时，生态旅游和文化创意产业也为农村经济的转型升级提供了新的路径。要实现真正的乡村振兴，关键在于构建一个能够吸引人才回流、激发内生动力的制度环境和政策生态。
passages.text_pinyin: Xiāngcūn zhènxīng zhànlüè shì Zhōngguó zài quánmiàn jiànchéng xiǎokāng shèhuì zhīhòu tíchū de zhòngdà guójiā zhànlüè, zhǐ zài cóng gēnběn shàng jiějué chéngxiāng fāzhǎn bù pínghéng de jiégòuxìng máodùn. Yǔ yǐwǎng dānchún qiángdiào nóngyè xiàndàihuà bùtóng, xiāngcūn zhènxīng hángàile chǎnyè xīngwàng, shēngtài yíjū, xiāngfēng wénmíng, zhìlǐ yǒuxiào hé shēnghuó fùyù wǔ gè wéidù, tǐxiànle duì nóngcūn fāzhǎn de quánfāngwèi xìtǒngxìng sīkǎo. Rán'ér, lǐxiǎng yǔ xiànshí zhī jiān yīrán cúnzàizhe bù xiǎo de luòchā. Dāngqián Zhōngguó nóngcūn miànlínzhe láodònglì chíxù wàiliú, lǎolínghuà jiājù hé réncái kuìfá děng yánjùn tiǎozhàn. Dàliàng qīngzhuàngnián láodònglì liúxiàng chéngshì, dǎozhì xǔduō cūnzhuāng chūxiànle 'kōngxīnhuà' xiànxiàng, liúshǒu lǎorén hé értóng de shēngcún zhuàngkuàng lìng rén dānyōu. Cǐwài, nóngcūn chǎnyè jīchǔ bóruò, tǔdì zhìdù gǎigé zhìhòu yǐjí gōnggòng fúwù gōngjǐ bùzú děng wèntí yě zhìyuēzhe xiāngcūn zhènxīng de bùfá. Zhíde guānzhù de shì, shùzì jīngjì hé diànzǐ shāngwù de fāzhǎn wèi nóngcūn dàiláile xīn de jīyù. 'Táobǎo cūn' de yǒngxiàn zhèngmíngle hùliánwǎng kěyǐ bāngzhù piānyuǎn dìqū de nóngmín zhíjiē duìjiē guǎngkuò de shìchǎng. Tóngshí, shēngtài lǚyóu hé wénhuà chuàngyì chǎnyè yě wèi nóngcūn jīngjì de zhuǎnxíng shēngjí tígōngle xīn de lùjìng. Yào shíxiàn zhēnzhèng de xiāngcūn zhènxīng, guānjiàn zàiyú gòujiàn yí gè nénggòu xīyǐn réncái huíliú, jīfā nèishēng dònglì de zhìdù huánjìng hé zhèngcè shēngtài.
passages.text_en: The rural revitalization strategy is a major national strategy proposed by China after building a moderately prosperous society in all respects, aiming to fundamentally address the structural contradiction of unbalanced urban-rural development. Unlike the previous singular emphasis on agricultural modernization, rural revitalization encompasses five dimensions — thriving industries, livable ecology, civilized customs, effective governance, and prosperous lives — reflecting comprehensive systematic thinking about rural development. However, a considerable gap still exists between ideals and reality. Chinese rural areas currently face severe challenges including continuous labor outflow, intensifying aging, and a shortage of talent. Large numbers of young and middle-aged laborers flow to cities, causing the 'hollowing out' phenomenon in many villages, with the living conditions of left-behind elderly and children raising concern. Moreover, problems such as weak rural industrial foundations, lagging land system reforms, and insufficient public service provision also constrain the pace of rural revitalization. Notably, the development of the digital economy and e-commerce has brought new opportunities to rural areas. The emergence of 'Taobao villages' proves the internet can help farmers in remote areas directly access broad markets. Meanwhile, ecotourism and cultural creative industries also provide new pathways for rural economic transformation and upgrading. To achieve true rural revitalization, the key lies in constructing an institutional environment and policy ecosystem capable of attracting talent to return and stimulating endogenous driving forces.

questions.q_zh: 乡村振兴包括哪五个维度？
questions.q_en: What five dimensions does rural revitalization include?
questions.answer: 产业兴旺、生态宜居、乡风文明、治理有效和生活富裕。

questions.q_zh: 农村"空心化"是什么意思？
questions.q_en: What does rural 'hollowing out' mean?
questions.answer: 大量青壮年劳动力流向城市，村庄只剩留守老人和儿童。

passages.title: Neuroscience and Consciousness
passages.text_zh: 意识的本质是什么？这个困扰了人类数千年的哲学之问，如今正在神经科学的实验室中寻找新的答案。现代脑成像技术，如功能性磁共振成像和脑电图，使得研究者能够前所未有地观察到意识活动在大脑中的神经关联。然而，从神经元的放电模式到主观意识体验之间的鸿沟——哲学家大卫·查尔默斯所称的"意识的困难问题"——依然横亘在科学解释的前方。全球工作空间理论认为，意识的产生源于大脑不同功能区域之间信息的广泛整合与共享；而整合信息理论则从数学角度提出，意识是任何具有足够复杂性和信息整合度的系统所固有的属性。这些理论虽然各有洞见，但距离完整地解释意识现象还相当遥远。近年来，人工意识的概念进一步模糊了有关意识的讨论边界。如果一台机器能够表现出与人类意识相似的行为，我们是否应该赋予它道德地位？这个问题不再只是思想实验，而是正在逼近的现实挑战。意识研究的深入推进，不仅将重塑我们对自身的理解，也必将引发法律、伦理和社会层面的深刻变革。
passages.text_pinyin: Yìshí de běnzhì shì shénme? Zhège kùnrǎole rénlèi shù qiān nián de zhéxué zhī wèn, rújīn zhèngzài shénjīng kēxué de shíyàn shì zhōng xúnzhǎo xīn de dá'àn. Xiàndài nǎo chéngxiàng jìshù, rú gōngnéngxìng cí gòngzhèn chéngxiàng hé nǎo diàntú, shǐde yánjiū zhě nénggòu qián suǒ wèi yǒu de guānchá dào yìshí huódòng zài dànǎo zhōng de shénjīng guānlián. Rán'ér, cóng shénjīng yuán de fàngdiàn móshì dào zhǔguān yìshí tǐyàn zhī jiān de hónggōu—zhéxuéjiā Dàwèi Chá'ěrmòsī suǒ chēng de 'yìshí de kùnnan wèntí'—yīrán hénggèn zài kēxué jiěshì de qiánfāng. Quánqiú gōngzuò kōngjiān lǐlùn rènwéi, yìshí de chǎnshēng yuán yú dànǎo bùtóng gōngnéng qūyù zhī jiān xìnxī de guǎngfàn zhěnghé yǔ gòngxiǎng; ér zhěnghé xìnxī lǐlùn zé cóng shùxué jiǎodù tíchū, yìshí shì rènhé jùyǒu zúgòu fùzáxìng hé xìnxī zhěnghé dù de xìtǒng suǒ gùyǒu de shǔxìng. Zhèxiē lǐlùn suīrán gè yǒu dòngjiàn, dàn jùlí wánzhěng de jiěshì yìshí xiànxiàng hái xiāngdāng yáoyuǎn. Jìn niánlái, réngōng yìshí de gàiniàn jìnyíbù móhule yǒuguān yìshí de tǎolùn biānjiè. Rúguǒ yì tái jīqì nénggòu biǎoxiàn chū yǔ rénlèi yìshí xiāngsì de xíngwéi, wǒmen shìfǒu yīnggāi fùyǔ tā dàodé dìwèi? Zhège wèntí bú zài zhǐ shì sīxiǎng shíyàn, ér shì zhèngzài bījìn de xiànshí tiǎozhàn. Yìshí yánjiū de shēnrù tuījìn, bùjǐn jiāng chóngxù wǒmen duì zìshēn de lǐjiě, yě bì jiāng yǐnfā fǎlǜ, lúnlǐ hé shèhuì céngmiàn de shēnkè biàngé.
passages.text_en: What is the nature of consciousness? This philosophical question that has puzzled humanity for thousands of years is now seeking new answers in neuroscience laboratories. Modern brain imaging techniques, such as functional magnetic resonance imaging and electroencephalography, allow researchers to observe the neural correlates of conscious activity in the brain with unprecedented clarity. However, the chasm between neurons' firing patterns and subjective conscious experience — what philosopher David Chalmers calls the 'hard problem of consciousness' — still looms before scientific explanation. Global Workspace Theory holds that consciousness arises from the broad integration and sharing of information across different functional regions of the brain; while Integrated Information Theory proposes from a mathematical perspective that consciousness is an inherent property of any system with sufficient complexity and information integration. Although these theories each offer insights, they remain far from completely explaining the phenomenon of consciousness. In recent years, the concept of artificial consciousness has further blurred the boundaries of discussions about consciousness. If a machine can exhibit behavior similar to human consciousness, should we grant it moral status? This question is no longer merely a thought experiment but an approaching real challenge. The deepening of consciousness research will not only reshape our understanding of ourselves but will inevitably trigger profound changes at the legal, ethical, and social levels.

questions.q_zh: 什么是"意识的困难问题"？
questions.q_en: What is the 'hard problem of consciousness'?
questions.answer: 从神经元的放电模式到主观意识体验之间的鸿沟，即无法解释为什么会产生主观体验。

questions.q_zh: 文章提到了哪两种意识理论？
questions.q_en: What two theories of consciousness does the passage mention?
questions.answer: 全球工作空间理论和整合信息理论。

passages.title: Ocean Governance and Maritime Rights
passages.text_zh: 海洋占据了地球表面积的百分之七十以上，蕴含着丰富的生物资源、矿产资源和能源资源。然而，长期以来，人类对海洋的利用主要停留在渔业和航运等传统领域，对海洋生态系统的保护则远远不够。过度捕捞导致全球多个渔场面临枯竭的危险，海洋塑料污染已经渗透到了最深的海沟，海洋酸化正在威胁珊瑚礁等脆弱生态系统的生存。与此同时，围绕海洋权益的国际争端也在持续升温。《联合国海洋法公约》虽然确立了领海、专属经济区和大陆架等海洋空间的法律制度，但在实际执行中仍存在大量的灰色地带和争议空间。南海地区的主权争端便是海洋权益博弈的典型案例，涉及领土主权、海洋资源和战略通道等多重利益的交织。随着深海采矿技术的发展，国际海底区域矿产资源的开发问题也日益引起关注。如何在保护海洋生态环境的前提下合理开发海洋资源，如何在维护国家海洋权益的同时促进海洋治理的国际合作，是当今世界面临的一项艰巨的系统性挑战。
passages.text_pinyin: Hǎiyáng zhànjùle dìqiú biǎomiànjī de bǎi fēn zhī qīshí yǐshàng, yùnhánzhe fēngfù de shēngwù zīyuán, kuàngchǎn zīyuán hé néngyuán zīyuán. Rán'ér, chángqī yǐlái, rénlèi duì hǎiyáng de lìyòng zhǔyào tíngliú zài yúyè hé hángyùn děng chuántǒng lǐngyù, duì hǎiyáng shēngtài xìtǒng de bǎohù zé yuǎnyuǎn búgòu. Guòdù bǔlāo dǎozhì quánqiú duō gè yúchǎng miànlín kūjié de wéixiǎn, hǎiyáng sùliào wūrǎn yǐjīng shèntòu dàole zuì shēn de hǎigōu, hǎiyáng suānhuà zhèngzài wēixié shānhújiāo děng cuìruò shēngtài xìtǒng de shēngcún. Yǔ cǐ tóngshí, wéirào hǎiyáng quányì de guójì zhēngduān yě zài chíxù shēngwēn. Liánhéguó Hǎiyáng Fǎ Gōngyuē suīrán quèlìle lǐnghǎi, zhuānshǔ jīngjì qū hé dàlùjià děng hǎiyáng kōngjiān de fǎlǜ zhìdù, dàn zài shíjì zhíxíng zhōng réng cúnzài dàliàng de huīsè dìdài hé zhēngyì kōngjiān. Nánhǎi dìqū de zhǔquán zhēngduān biàn shì hǎiyáng quányì bóyì de diǎnxíng ànlì, shèjí lǐngtǔ zhǔquán, hǎiyáng zīyuán hé zhànlüè tōngdào děng duōchóng lìyì de jiāozhī. Suízhe shēnhǎi cǎikuàng jìshù de fāzhǎn, guójì hǎidǐ qūyù kuàngchǎn zīyuán de kāifā wèntí yě rìyì yǐnqǐ guānzhù. Rúhé zài bǎohù hǎiyáng shēngtài huánjìng de qiántí xià hélǐ kāifā hǎiyáng zīyuán, rúhé zài wéihù guójiā hǎiyáng quányì de tóngshí cùjìn hǎiyáng zhìlǐ de guójì hézuò, shì dāngjīn shìjiè miànlín de yí xiàng jiānjù de xìtǒngxìng tiǎozhàn.
passages.text_en: Oceans cover over seventy percent of the Earth's surface and contain abundant biological, mineral, and energy resources. However, for a long time, human use of the oceans has primarily been limited to traditional areas like fishing and shipping, while protection of marine ecosystems has been far from adequate. Overfishing has pushed multiple global fisheries toward the brink of depletion, marine plastic pollution has penetrated the deepest ocean trenches, and ocean acidification is threatening the survival of fragile ecosystems like coral reefs. Meanwhile, international disputes over maritime rights continue to intensify. Although the United Nations Convention on the Law of the Sea established legal frameworks for maritime spaces including territorial waters, exclusive economic zones, and continental shelves, many gray areas and disputed spaces remain in actual implementation. The sovereignty disputes in the South China Sea are a classic case of maritime rights competition, involving the intertwining of multiple interests including territorial sovereignty, marine resources, and strategic passages. With the development of deep-sea mining technology, the exploitation of mineral resources in international seabed areas is also attracting increasing attention. How to rationally develop marine resources while protecting the marine ecological environment, and how to promote international cooperation in ocean governance while safeguarding national maritime rights, is a formidable systemic challenge facing today's world.

questions.q_zh: 海洋面临哪些生态问题？
questions.q_en: What ecological problems do oceans face?
questions.answer: 过度捕捞、海洋塑料污染和海洋酸化威胁珊瑚礁等生态系统。

questions.q_zh: 南海争端涉及哪些利益？
questions.q_en: What interests are involved in the South China Sea disputes?
questions.answer: 领土主权、海洋资源和战略通道等多重利益。

passages.title: Digital Currency and Financial Sovereignty
passages.text_zh: 数字货币的兴起正在深刻重塑全球金融格局。以比特币为代表的去中心化加密货币虽然引发了广泛关注，但其价格的剧烈波动和缺乏内在价值的支撑使其难以承担真正意义上的货币职能。相比之下，各国央行数字货币的研发正在加速推进，其中中国的数字人民币走在了全球前列。央行数字货币不仅能够提升支付系统的效率和安全性，还可以为货币政策的实施提供更精准的工具。然而，它也引发了关于金融监控和个人隐私之间平衡的激烈讨论。从国际视角来看，数字货币的发展可能重构现有的国际货币体系。美元作为全球储备货币的主导地位面临着潜在的挑战，而数字人民币的跨境使用则可能为人民币国际化提供新的动力。与此同时，稳定币等私人发行的数字货币对国家的货币主权构成了新的威胁。如何在鼓励金融创新的同时有效防范系统性风险，如何在维护金融主权的前提下促进国际金融合作，是各国政策制定者面临的两难抉择。可以预见的是，数字货币领域的竞争将在很大程度上塑造未来数十年的全球金融秩序。
passages.text_pinyin: Shùzì huòbì de xīngqǐ zhèngzài shēnkè chóngxù quánqiú jīnróng géjú. Yǐ Bǐtèbì wéi dàibiǎo de qù zhōngxīnhuà jiāmì huòbì suīrán yǐnfāle guǎngfàn guānzhù, dàn qí jiàgé de jùliè bōdòng hé quēfá nèizài jiàzhí de zhīchēng shǐ qí nányǐ chéngdān zhēnzhèng yìyì shàng de huòbì zhínéng. Xiāngbǐ zhī xià, gèguó yānghàng shùzì huòbì de yánfā zhèngzài jiāsù tuījìn, qízhōng Zhōngguó de shùzì rénmínbì zǒu zài le quánqiú qiánliè. Yānghàng shùzì huòbì bùjǐn nénggòu tíshēng zhīfù xìtǒng de xiàolǜ hé ānquánxìng, hái kěyǐ wèi huòbì zhèngcè de shíshī tígōng gèng jīngzhǔn de gōngjù. Rán'ér, tā yě yǐnfāle guānyú jīnróng jiānkòng hé gèrén yǐnsī zhī jiān pínghéng de jīliè tǎolùn. Cóng guójì shìjiǎo lái kàn, shùzì huòbì de fāzhǎn kěnéng chónggòu xiànyǒu de guójì huòbì tǐxì. Měiyuán zuòwéi quánqiú chǔbèi huòbì de zhǔdǎo dìwèi miànlínzhe qiánzài de tiǎozhàn, ér shùzì rénmínbì de kuàjìng shǐyòng zé kěnéng wèi rénmínbì guójìhuà tígōng xīn de dònglì. Yǔ cǐ tóngshí, wěndìng bì děng sīrén fāxíng de shùzì huòbì duì guójiā de huòbì zhǔquán gòuchéngle xīn de wēixié. Rúhé zài gǔlì jīnróng chuàngxīn de tóngshí yǒuxiào fángfàn xìtǒngxìng fēngxiǎn, rúhé zài wéihù jīnróng zhǔquán de qiántí xià cùjìn guójì jīnróng hézuò, shì gèguó zhèngcè zhìdìng zhě miànlín de liǎngnán juézé. Kěyǐ yùjiàn de shì, shùzì huòbì lǐngyù de jìngzhēng jiāng zài hěn dà chéngdù shàng sùzào wèilái shù shí nián de quánqiú jīnróng zhìxù.
passages.text_en: The rise of digital currency is profoundly reshaping the global financial landscape. Although decentralized cryptocurrencies represented by Bitcoin have attracted widespread attention, their extreme price volatility and lack of intrinsic value support make it difficult for them to fulfill genuine monetary functions. In comparison, central bank digital currency (CBDC) development is accelerating worldwide, with China's digital yuan leading globally. CBDCs can not only enhance the efficiency and security of payment systems but also provide more precise tools for implementing monetary policy. However, they have also sparked heated discussion about the balance between financial surveillance and personal privacy. From an international perspective, digital currency development may restructure the existing international monetary system. The US dollar's dominant position as the global reserve currency faces potential challenges, while cross-border use of the digital yuan could provide new momentum for RMB internationalization. Meanwhile, privately issued digital currencies such as stablecoins pose new threats to national monetary sovereignty. How to effectively prevent systemic risks while encouraging financial innovation, and how to promote international financial cooperation while maintaining financial sovereignty, presents policymakers with a dilemma. It is foreseeable that competition in the digital currency field will to a large extent shape the global financial order for decades to come.

questions.q_zh: 央行数字货币有什么优势？
questions.q_en: What advantages do central bank digital currencies have?
questions.answer: 提升支付系统效率和安全性，为货币政策实施提供更精准的工具。

questions.q_zh: 数字货币对国际货币体系有什么影响？
questions.q_en: How does digital currency affect the international monetary system?
questions.answer: 可能重构现有体系，挑战美元主导地位，推动人民币国际化。

passages.title: The Aesthetic Dimensions of Tang Poetry
passages.text_zh: 唐诗之所以在中国文学史上占据至高无上的地位，不仅因其形式上的完美，更在于其所蕴含的深邃美学意蕴。从初唐四杰到晚唐李商隐，唐诗经历了由质朴到华丽、由外放到内敛的演变历程。王维以禅意入诗，将自然山水升华为精神境界；李白以豪放不羁的笔触书写个体生命的壮阔与孤独；杜甫则以沉郁顿挫之风格映射家国之忧患。值得深思的是，唐诗的意象系统远非简单的修辞手段，而是诗人对宇宙人生进行哲学观照的载体。月亮、流水、落花——这些反复出现的意象构成了一套独特的审美符码，承载着中国文人对时间流逝、生命无常的深切感悟。正因如此，唐诗不仅是文学的巅峰，更是中华审美精神的集中体现，其影响至今仍深刻塑造着汉语文学的表达方式与审美取向。
passages.text_pinyin: Tángshī zhī suǒyǐ zài Zhōngguó wénxuéshǐ shàng zhànjù zhìgāo wúshàng de dìwèi, bùjǐn yīn qí xíngshì shàng de wánměi, gèng zàiyú qí suǒ yùnhán de shēnsuì měixué yìyùn. Cóng chū Táng sì jié dào wǎn Táng Lǐ Shāngyǐn, Tángshī jīnglì le yóu zhìpǔ dào huálì, yóu wàifàng dào nèiliǎn de yǎnbiàn lìchéng. Wáng Wéi yǐ chányì rù shī, jiāng zìrán shānshuǐ shēnghuá wéi jīngshén jìngjiè; Lǐ Bái yǐ háofàng bùjī de bǐchù shūxiě gètǐ shēngmìng de zhuàngkuò yǔ gūdú; Dù Fǔ zé yǐ chényù dùncuò zhī fēnggé yìngshè jiāguó zhī yōuhuàn. Zhíde shēnsī de shì, Tángshī de yìxiàng xìtǒng yuǎnfēi jiǎndān de xiūcí shǒuduàn, ér shì shīrén duì yǔzhòu rénshēng jìnxíng zhéxué guānzhào de zàitǐ. Yuèliàng, liúshuǐ, luòhuā——zhèxiē fǎnfù chūxiàn de yìxiàng gòuchéng le yī tào dútè de shěnměi fúmǎ, chéngzài zhe Zhōngguó wénrén duì shíjiān liúshì, shēngmìng wúcháng de shēnqiè gǎnwù. Zhèng yīn rúcǐ, Tángshī bùjǐn shì wénxué de diānfēng, gèng shì Zhōnghuá shěnměi jīngshén de jízhōng tǐxiàn, qí yǐngxiǎng zhìjīn réng shēnkè sùzào zhe Hànyǔ wénxué de biǎodá fāngshì yǔ shěnměi qǔxiàng.
passages.text_en: The reason Tang poetry occupies a supreme position in Chinese literary history lies not only in its formal perfection but also in the profound aesthetic implications it embodies. From the Four Outstanding Poets of the Early Tang to Li Shangyin of the Late Tang, Tang poetry underwent an evolution from simplicity to splendor, from extroversion to introspection. Wang Wei infused his poetry with Chan Buddhist insight, elevating natural landscapes into spiritual realms; Li Bai wrote of the grandeur and solitude of individual existence with bold, unrestrained brushstrokes; Du Fu reflected national anxieties through his deeply melancholic and rhythmically varied style. What merits deep reflection is that the imagery system of Tang poetry is far from mere rhetorical device—it serves as a vehicle for the poet's philosophical contemplation of the universe and human life. The moon, flowing water, falling blossoms—these recurring images constitute a unique aesthetic code, bearing the profound sentiments of Chinese literati regarding the passage of time and the impermanence of life. For precisely this reason, Tang poetry is not merely the pinnacle of literature but also the concentrated embodiment of Chinese aesthetic spirit, its influence still profoundly shaping the expressive modes and aesthetic orientations of Chinese-language literature today.

questions.q_zh: 作者认为唐诗意象系统的本质功能是什么？
questions.q_en: What does the author consider the essential function of Tang poetry's imagery system?
questions.answer: 作者认为唐诗的意象系统不是简单的修辞手段，而是诗人对宇宙人生进行哲学观照的载体，承载着文人对时间流逝和生命无常的深切感悟。

questions.q_zh: 文章中如何区分王维、李白和杜甫三位诗人的风格特征？
questions.q_en: How does the passage distinguish the stylistic characteristics of Wang Wei, Li Bai, and Du Fu?
questions.answer: 王维以禅意入诗，将山水升华为精神境界；李白以豪放不羁的笔触书写生命的壮阔与孤独；杜甫以沉郁顿挫的风格映射家国忧患。

questions.q_zh: 作者为什么说唐诗的影响至今仍然深刻？
questions.q_en: Why does the author say Tang poetry's influence remains profound to this day?
questions.answer: 因为唐诗不仅是文学的巅峰，更是中华审美精神的集中体现，它至今仍深刻塑造着汉语文学的表达方式与审美取向。

passages.title: Confucian Thought and Modern Governance
passages.text_zh: 儒家思想能否为现代社会治理提供有效的思想资源，这一问题在学术界引发了持续而深入的争论。批评者指出，儒学产生于农业宗法社会，其等级观念与当代民主理念存在根本性冲突。然而，若深入审视儒家思想的核心命题，我们会发现其中蕴含着超越时代局限性的普遍价值。孔子所倡导的“仁政“理念，本质上是对权力运行施加道德约束的主张；“礼“的精神内核并非僵化的等级秩序，而是对社会和谐与公共秩序的追求。更为重要的是，儒家关于“修身齐家治国平天下“的论述，实质上构建了一套从个体伦理延伸至公共治理的完整逻辑链条。当代新儒学者尝试将这些传统资源与现代制度设计相融合，探索一种既尊重个人权利又注重社群责任的治理模式。这种理论努力尽管尚未形成成熟的系统方案，但无疑为超越西方中心主义的治理话语提供了富有启发性的思考路径。
passages.text_pinyin: Rújiā sīxiǎng néng fǒu wèi xiàndài shèhuì zhìlǐ tígōng yǒuxiào de sīxiǎng zīyuán, zhè yī wèntí zài xuéshùjiè yǐnfā le chíxù ér shēnrù de zhēnglùn. Pīpíng zhě zhǐchū, Rúxué chǎnshēng yú nóngyè zōngfǎ shèhuì, qí děngjí guānniàn yǔ dāngdài mínzhǔ lǐniàn cúnzài gēnběnxìng chōngtū. Rán'ér, ruò shēnrù shěnshì Rújiā sīxiǎng de héxīn mìngtí, wǒmen huì fāxiàn qízhōng yùnhán zhe chāoyuè shídài júxiànxìng de pǔbiàn jiàzhí. Kǒngzǐ suǒ chàngdǎo de 'rénzhèng' lǐniàn, běnzhì shàng shì duì quánlì yùnxíng shījiā dàodé yuēshù de zhǔzhāng; 'lǐ' de jīngshén nèihé bìngfēi jiānghuà de děngjí zhìxù, ér shì duì shèhuì héxié yǔ gōnggòng zhìxù de zhuīqiú. Gèng wéi zhòngyào de shì, Rújiā guānyú 'xiūshēn qíjiā zhìguó píng tiānxià' de lùnshù, shízhì shàng gòujiàn le yī tào cóng gètǐ lúnlǐ yánshēn zhì gōnggòng zhìlǐ de wánzhěng luójì liántiáo. Dāngdài xīn Rúxué zhě chángshì jiāng zhèxiē chuántǒng zīyuán yǔ xiàndài zhìdù shèjì xiāng rónghé, tànsuǒ yī zhǒng jì zūnzhòng gèrén quánlì yòu zhùzhòng shèqún zérèn de zhìlǐ móshì. Zhè zhǒng lǐlùn nǔlì jǐnguǎn shàngwèi xíngchéng chéngshú de xìtǒng fāng'àn, dàn wúyí wèi chāoyuè xīfāng zhōngxīn zhǔyì de zhìlǐ huàyǔ tígōng le fùyǒu qǐfāxìng de sīkǎo lùjìng.
passages.text_en: Whether Confucian thought can provide effective intellectual resources for modern social governance has sparked sustained and profound debate in academic circles. Critics point out that Confucianism originated in an agrarian patriarchal society, and its hierarchical concepts fundamentally conflict with contemporary democratic ideals. However, if we examine the core propositions of Confucian thought more deeply, we discover that they contain universal values that transcend the limitations of their era. Confucius's concept of 'benevolent governance' is essentially an assertion of imposing moral constraints on the exercise of power; the spiritual core of 'ritual propriety' is not rigid hierarchical order but rather the pursuit of social harmony and public order. More importantly, Confucian discourse on 'cultivating oneself, regulating the family, governing the state, and pacifying the world' effectively constructs a complete logical chain extending from individual ethics to public governance. Contemporary Neo-Confucian scholars attempt to integrate these traditional resources with modern institutional design, exploring a governance model that both respects individual rights and emphasizes communal responsibility. Though this theoretical endeavor has yet to produce a mature systematic plan, it undoubtedly provides an enlightening path of thought for transcending Western-centric governance discourse.

questions.q_zh: 批评者对儒学与现代治理的关系持什么看法？
questions.q_en: What view do critics hold regarding the relationship between Confucianism and modern governance?
questions.answer: 批评者认为儒学产生于农业宗法社会，其等级观念与当代民主理念存在根本性冲突。

questions.q_zh: 作者如何重新诠释儒家“礼“的概念？
questions.q_en: How does the author reinterpret the Confucian concept of 'ritual propriety'?
questions.answer: 作者认为“礼“的精神内核并非僵化的等级秩序，而是对社会和谐与公共秩序的追求。

questions.q_zh: 当代新儒学者的理论探索有什么意义？
questions.q_en: What is the significance of contemporary Neo-Confucian scholars' theoretical explorations?
questions.answer: 他们的探索为超越西方中心主义的治理话语提供了富有启发性的思考路径，尽管尚未形成成熟的系统方案。

passages.title: International Law and Sovereign Equality
passages.text_zh: 主权平等原则是现代国际法体系的基石，然而其在实际国际关系中的落实却面临诸多深层次的困境。自《威斯特伐利亚和约》确立主权国家体系以来，主权平等便作为国际交往的基本准则被普遍接受。联合国宪章第二条明确规定各会员国主权平等，不得以武力威胁或使用武力侵犯他国领土完整。然而，国际实践中，大国往往凭借其经济实力与军事优势对小国施加不对称的影响力，使得法律上的平等与事实上的不平等之间形成尖锐矛盾。国际经济秩序中的结构性不公更是加剧了这一问题：发展中国家在国际金融机构中的话语权严重不足，贸易规则的制定往往反映发达国家的利益诉求。面对这些挑战，国际法学界提出了诸多改革方案，包括增强国际组织的代表性与透明度、建立更加公正的争端解决机制等。唯有在制度层面切实保障主权平等，国际法的正当性与公信力方能得到有效维护。
passages.text_pinyin: Zhǔquán píngděng yuánzé shì xiàndài guójìfǎ tǐxì de jīshí, rán'ér qí zài shíjì guójì guānxì zhōng de luòshí què miànlín zhūduō shēncéngcì de kùnjìng. Zì 'Wēisītèfálìyà Héyuē' quèlì zhǔquán guójiā tǐxì yǐlái, zhǔquán píngděng biàn zuòwéi guójì jiāowǎng de jīběn zhǔnzé bèi pǔbiàn jiēshòu. Liánhéguó Xiànzhāng dì èr tiáo míngquè guīdìng gè huìyuánguó zhǔquán píngděng, bùdé yǐ wǔlì wēixié huò shǐyòng wǔlì qīnfàn tāguó lǐngtǔ wánzhěng. Rán'ér, guójì shíjiàn zhōng, dàguó wǎngwǎng píngjiè qí jīngjì shílì yǔ jūnshì yōushì duì xiǎoguó shījiā bù duìchèn de yǐngxiǎnglì, shǐde fǎlǜ shàng de píngděng yǔ shìshí shàng de bù píngděng zhījiān xíngchéng jiānruì máodùn. Guójì jīngjì zhìxù zhōng de jiégòuxìng bùgōng gèng shì jiājù le zhè yī wèntí: fāzhǎnzhōng guójiā zài guójì jīnróng jīgòu zhōng de huàyǔquán yánzhòng bùzú, màoyì guīzé de zhìdìng wǎngwǎng fǎnyìng fādá guójiā de lìyì sùqiú. Miànduì zhèxiē tiǎozhàn, guójì fǎxuéjiè tíchū le zhūduō gǎigé fāng'àn, bāokuò zēngqiáng guójì zǔzhī de dàibiǎoxìng yǔ tòumíngdù, jiànlì gèngjiā gōngzhèng de zhēngduān jiějué jīzhì děng. Wéiyǒu zài zhìdù céngmiàn qièshí bǎozhàng zhǔquán píngděng, guójìfǎ de zhèngdàngxìng yǔ gōngxìnlì fāng néng dédào yǒuxiào wéihù.
passages.text_en: The principle of sovereign equality is the cornerstone of the modern international legal system, yet its implementation in actual international relations faces numerous deep-seated difficulties. Since the Treaty of Westphalia established the sovereign state system, sovereign equality has been universally accepted as a fundamental norm of international interaction. Article 2 of the United Nations Charter explicitly stipulates that all member states are sovereign equals and that no state may threaten or use force to violate the territorial integrity of another. However, in international practice, major powers often leverage their economic strength and military advantages to exert asymmetric influence over smaller states, creating a sharp contradiction between legal equality and de facto inequality. Structural injustice in the international economic order further exacerbates this issue: developing countries have severely insufficient voice in international financial institutions, and the formulation of trade rules often reflects the interests of developed nations. Facing these challenges, the international legal community has proposed numerous reform plans, including enhancing the representativeness and transparency of international organizations and establishing more equitable dispute resolution mechanisms. Only by concretely safeguarding sovereign equality at the institutional level can the legitimacy and credibility of international law be effectively maintained.

questions.q_zh: 主权平等在国际实践中面临的核心矛盾是什么？
questions.q_en: What is the core contradiction that sovereign equality faces in international practice?
questions.answer: 法律上的平等与事实上的不平等之间存在尖锐矛盾，大国凭借经济和军事优势对小国施加不对称的影响力。

questions.q_zh: 国际经济秩序中的结构性不公体现在哪些方面？
questions.q_en: In what aspects does structural injustice in the international economic order manifest?
questions.answer: 发展中国家在国际金融机构中的话语权严重不足，贸易规则的制定往往反映发达国家的利益诉求。

passages.title: Transformation of the Literati Spirit
passages.text_zh: 中国文人精神的嬗变构成了一部跌宕起伏的文化心灵史。先秦时期，士人以“道“自任，孔子周游列国以推行仁政，孟子倡言“舍生取义“，展现了知识分子以天下为己任的崇高情怀。至魏晋时期，政治的黑暗与生命的脆弱促使文人转向内心世界的探索——竹林七贤以放达不羁的行为方式表达对虚伪名教的抗议，陶渊明则以归隐田园作为对浊世的无声拒绝。唐宋文人在入世与出世之间寻求平衡，苏轼的一生便是这种张力的生动写照：既有“致君尧舜上“的政治抱负，亦有“一蓑烟雨任平生“的旷达胸襟。明清之际，士人面对易代之痛，或慷慨赴难以殉节，或遁入学术以保全气节。近代以降，传统文人精神遭遇前所未有的冲击，西学东渐使知识分子在传统与现代之间艰难抉择。这一绵延数千年的精神谱系，深刻揭示了中国知识阶层在理想与现实、个体与家国之间的永恒张力。
passages.text_pinyin: Zhōngguó wénrén jīngshén de shànbiàn gòuchéng le yī bù diédàng qǐfú de wénhuà xīnlíng shǐ. Xiān Qín shíqī, shìrén yǐ 'dào' zìrèn, Kǒngzǐ zhōuyóu lièguó yǐ tuīxíng rénzhèng, Mèngzǐ chàngyán 'shěshēng qǔyì', zhǎnxiàn le zhīshi fènzǐ yǐ tiānxià wéi jǐrèn de chónggāo qínghuái. Zhì Wèi Jìn shíqī, zhèngzhì de hēi'àn yǔ shēngmìng de cuìruò cùshǐ wénrén zhuǎnxiàng nèixīn shìjiè de tànsuǒ——Zhúlín Qī Xián yǐ fàngdá bùjī de xíngwéi fāngshì biǎodá duì xūwěi míngjiào de kàngyì, Táo Yuānmíng zé yǐ guīyǐn tiányuán zuòwéi duì zhuóshì de wúshēng jùjué. Táng Sòng wénrén zài rùshì yǔ chūshì zhījiān xúnqiú pínghéng, Sū Shì de yīshēng biàn shì zhè zhǒng zhānglì de shēngdòng xiězhào: jì yǒu 'zhì jūn Yáo Shùn shàng' de zhèngzhì bàofù, yì yǒu 'yī suō yānyǔ rèn píngshēng' de kuàngdá xiōngjīn. Míng Qīng zhī jì, shìrén miànduì yìdài zhī tòng, huò kāngkǎi fùnàn yǐ xùnjié, huò dùnrù xuéshù yǐ bǎoquán qìjié. Jìndài yǐ jiàng, chuántǒng wénrén jīngshén zāoyù qiánsuǒwèiyǒu de chōngjī, xīxué dōngjiàn shǐ zhīshi fènzǐ zài chuántǒng yǔ xiàndài zhījiān jiānnán juézé. Zhè yī miányán shù qiānnián de jīngshén pǔxì, shēnkè jiēshì le Zhōngguó zhīshi jiēcéng zài lǐxiǎng yǔ xiànshí, gètǐ yǔ jiāguó zhījiān de yǒnghéng zhānglì.
passages.text_en: The transformation of the Chinese literati spirit constitutes a dramatic cultural and spiritual history. In the pre-Qin period, scholars took 'the Way' as their personal mission—Confucius traveled among various states to promote benevolent governance, while Mencius advocated 'sacrificing life for righteousness,' demonstrating intellectuals' lofty sentiment of taking the world as their own responsibility. By the Wei-Jin period, political darkness and the fragility of life prompted literati to turn toward exploration of the inner world—the Seven Sages of the Bamboo Grove expressed their protest against hypocritical moral doctrines through unbridled behavior, while Tao Yuanming's retreat to pastoral life served as a silent rejection of the corrupt world. Tang-Song literati sought balance between engagement and withdrawal from worldly affairs, and Su Shi's entire life was a vivid portrait of this tension: he possessed both the political ambition of 'elevating the ruler to the level of Yao and Shun' and the broad-minded spirit of 'letting a lifetime pass in mist and rain with just a straw cloak.' During the Ming-Qing transition, scholars facing the pain of dynastic change either met difficulty with fortitude to preserve their integrity or retreated into scholarship to maintain their moral character. Since the modern era, the traditional literati spirit has encountered unprecedented shocks, as the influx of Western learning forced intellectuals into difficult choices between tradition and modernity. This spiritual genealogy spanning thousands of years profoundly reveals the eternal tension among China's intellectual class between ideals and reality, the individual and the nation.

questions.q_zh: 魏晋时期文人精神发生了怎样的转变？其原因是什么？
questions.q_en: How did the literati spirit transform during the Wei-Jin period, and what caused this?
questions.answer: 政治的黑暗与生命的脆弱促使文人转向内心世界的探索，竹林七贤以放达不羁抗议虚伪名教，陶渊明以归隐田园拒绝浊世。

questions.q_zh: 苏轼如何体现了唐宋文人入世与出世之间的张力？
questions.q_en: How does Su Shi embody the tension between worldly engagement and withdrawal among Tang-Song literati?
questions.answer: 苏轼既有“致君尧舜上“的政治抱负，又有“一蓑烟雨任平生“的旷达胸襟，体现了入世与出世的平衡。

passages.title: Narrative Techniques in Dream of the Red Chamber
passages.text_zh: 《红楼梦》之所以被誉为中国古典小说的巅峰之作，其精妙绝伦的叙事艺术功不可没。曹雪芹摒弃了传统章回小说线性叙事的惯常模式，转而采用一种多声部、多层次的复调叙事结构。小说以贾宝玉的视角为主线，却不断通过其他人物的言行与心理活动构建起丰富的叙事层次。更为精妙的是，曹雪芹运用“草蛇灰线“的伏笔技法，将诸多看似零散的细节编织成一张缜密的叙事网络——一首判词、一个梦境、一场宴席，都可能暗含对人物命运的预示。此外，《红楼梦》的叙事还呈现出鲜明的象征主义特征：太虚幻境与现实世界的对照、通灵宝玉的隐喻意涵，都赋予了作品超越写实层面的哲学深度。这种将日常生活的精微描写与宏大命运主题相融合的叙事策略，不仅在中国文学传统中独树一帜，即便放在世界文学的视野中审视，亦堪称叙事艺术的杰出范例。
passages.text_pinyin: 'Hónglóumèng' zhī suǒyǐ bèi yù wéi Zhōngguó gǔdiǎn xiǎoshuō de diānfēng zhī zuò, qí jīngmiào juélún de xùshì yìshù gōngbùkěmò. Cáo Xuěqín bìnqì le chuántǒng zhānghuí xiǎoshuō xiànxìng xùshì de guàncháng móshì, zhuǎn'ér cǎiyòng yī zhǒng duō shēngbù, duō céngcì de fùdiào xùshì jiégòu. Xiǎoshuō yǐ Jiǎ Bǎoyù de shìjiǎo wéi zhǔxiàn, què bùduàn tōngguò qítā rénwù de yánxíng yǔ xīnlǐ huódòng gòujiàn qǐ fēngfù de xùshì céngcì. Gèng wéi jīngmiào de shì, Cáo Xuěqín yùnyòng 'cǎoshé huīxiàn' de fúbǐ jìfǎ, jiāng zhūduō kànsì língsuǎn de xìjié biānzhī chéng yī zhāng zhěnmì de xùshì wǎngluò——yī shǒu pàncí, yī gè mèngjìng, yī chǎng yànxí, dōu kěnéng ànhán duì rénwù mìngyùn de yùshì. Cǐwài, 'Hónglóumèng' de xùshì hái chéngxiàn chū xiānmíng de xiàngzhēng zhǔyì tèzhēng: Tàixū Huànjìng yǔ xiànshí shìjiè de duìzhào, Tōnglíng Bǎoyù de yǐnyù yìhán, dōu fùyǔ le zuòpǐn chāoyuè xiěshí céngmiàn de zhéxué shēndù. Zhè zhǒng jiāng rìcháng shēnghuó de jīngwēi miáoxiě yǔ hóngdà mìngyùn zhǔtí xiāng rónghé de xùshì cèlüè, bùjǐn zài Zhōngguó wénxué chuántǒng zhōng dúshù yīzhì, jíbiàn fàng zài shìjiè wénxué de shìyě zhōng shěnshì, yì kānchēng xùshì yìshù de jiéchū fànlì.
passages.text_en: The reason Dream of the Red Chamber is acclaimed as the pinnacle of Chinese classical fiction owes no small credit to its exquisitely brilliant narrative art. Cao Xueqin abandoned the conventional linear narrative mode of traditional chapter novels, instead adopting a polyphonic, multi-layered narrative structure. While the novel takes Jia Baoyu's perspective as its main thread, it continuously builds rich narrative layers through the words, actions, and psychological activities of other characters. Even more ingenious is Cao Xueqin's employment of the 'snake in the grass, thread in the ash' foreshadowing technique, weaving seemingly scattered details into a meticulous narrative web—a single prophetic verse, a dream, a banquet feast may all contain hidden premonitions of characters' fates. Furthermore, the narrative of Dream of the Red Chamber displays distinctive symbolist characteristics: the contrast between the Illusory Land of Great Void and the real world, the metaphorical implications of the Spiritual Jade—all endow the work with philosophical depth transcending the realistic level. This narrative strategy of fusing minute descriptions of daily life with grand themes of destiny is not only unique in the Chinese literary tradition but, even when examined from the perspective of world literature, stands as an outstanding exemplar of narrative art.

questions.q_zh: ”草蛇灰线“的叙事技法在《红楼梦》中是如何运用的？
questions.q_en: How is the 'snake in the grass, thread in the ash' narrative technique employed in Dream of the Red Chamber?
questions.answer: 曹雪芹将看似零散的细节——判词、梦境、宴席等——编织成缜密的叙事网络，暗含对人物命运的预示。

questions.q_zh: 《红楼梦》的象征主义特征体现在哪些方面？
questions.q_en: In what aspects do the symbolist characteristics of Dream of the Red Chamber manifest?
questions.answer: 体现在太虚幻境与现实世界的对照、通灵宝玉的隐喻意涵等方面，赋予作品超越写实层面的哲学深度。

questions.q_zh: 作者认为《红楼梦》的叙事结构与传统章回小说有何不同？
questions.q_en: How does the author consider the narrative structure of Dream of the Red Chamber different from traditional chapter novels?
questions.answer: 曹雪芹摒弃了线性叙事的惯常模式，采用多声部、多层次的复调叙事结构，以贾宝玉视角为主线但通过其他人物构建丰富层次。

passages.title: The Art of Diplomatic Rhetoric
passages.text_zh: 外交辞令是国际政治舞台上一种独特的话语艺术，其精髓在于以最为委婉含蓄的方式传递最为复杂微妙的政治信号。与日常语言的直接明了不同，外交语言遵循着一套高度规范化的表达体系：当一国声明“高度关注“某一事态时，实际上已经包含了严肃的警告意味；而所谓“保留进一步采取措施的权利“，则暗示着实质性反制行动的可能性。这种看似模糊的表达方式并非毫无意义的空话，恰恰相反，它为各方在紧张局势中保留了回旋余地，避免了因言辞过于刚性而导致外交僵局。联合国安理会决议的措辞便是这一艺术的典型范例：每一个词语的选择都经过各方的反复斟酌与艰难谈判，“敦促“”呼吁“”要求“等措辞之间存在着精确的力度递进。深谙此道的外交家能够在字里行间解读出丰富的政策信息，而未经训练的普通读者则往往对其中的微妙含义一无所觉。可以说，外交辞令是将语言的模糊性转化为战略资源的典范。
passages.text_pinyin: Wàijiāo cílìng shì guójì zhèngzhì wǔtái shàng yī zhǒng dútè de huàyǔ yìshù, qí jīngsuǐ zàiyú yǐ zuìwéi wěiwǎn hánxù de fāngshì chuándì zuìwéi fùzá wēimiào de zhèngzhì xìnhào. Yǔ rìcháng yǔyán de zhíjiē míngliǎo bùtóng, wàijiāo yǔyán zūnxún zhe yī tào gāodù guīfànhuà de biǎodá tǐxì: dāng yī guó shēngmíng 'gāodù guānzhù' mǒu yī shìtài shí, shíjì shàng yǐjīng bāohán le yánsù de jǐnggào yìwèi; ér suǒwèi 'bǎoliú jìnyībù cǎiqǔ cuòshī de quánlì', zé ànshì zhe shízhìxìng fǎnzhì xíngdòng de kěnéngxìng. Zhè zhǒng kànsì móhu de biǎodá fāngshì bìngfēi háo wú yìyì de kōnghuà, qiàqià xiāngfǎn, tā wèi gè fāng zài jǐnzhāng júshì zhōng bǎoliú le huíxuán yúdì, bìmiǎn le yīn yáncí guòyú gāngxìng ér dǎozhì wàijiāo jiāngjú. Liánhéguó Ānlǐhuì juéyì de cuòcí biàn shì zhè yī yìshù de diǎnxíng fànlì: měi yī gè cíyǔ de xuǎnzé dōu jīngguò gè fāng de fǎnfù zhēnzhuó yǔ jiānnán tánpàn, 'dūncù' 'hūyù' 'yāoqiú' děng cuòcí zhījiān cúnzài zhe jīngquè de lìdù dìjìn. Shēn'ān cǐ dào de wàijiāojiā nénggòu zài zìlǐhángjiān jiědú chū fēngfù de zhèngcè xìnxī, ér wèi jīng xùnliàn de pǔtōng dúzhě zé wǎngwǎng duì qízhōng de wēimiào hányì yī wú suǒ jué. Kěyǐ shuō, wàijiāo cílìng shì jiāng yǔyán de móhúxìng zhuǎnhuà wéi zhànlüè zīyuán de diǎnfàn.
passages.text_en: Diplomatic rhetoric is a unique discourse art on the stage of international politics, its essence lying in conveying the most complex and subtle political signals through the most tactful and implicit means. Unlike the directness and clarity of everyday language, diplomatic language follows a highly standardized system of expression: when a nation states it is 'highly concerned' about a certain situation, this actually already contains serious warning implications; while the so-called 'reserving the right to take further measures' hints at the possibility of substantive countermeasures. This seemingly vague mode of expression is by no means meaningless empty rhetoric—quite the contrary, it preserves room for maneuvering for all parties during tense situations, avoiding diplomatic deadlocks caused by overly rigid language. The wording of UN Security Council resolutions exemplifies this art: the selection of every term undergoes repeated deliberation and difficult negotiation by all parties, and between terms like 'urge,' 'call upon,' and 'demand' exists a precise escalation of force. Diplomats well-versed in this art can decode rich policy information between the lines, while ordinary readers without training are often completely unaware of the subtle implications within. It can be said that diplomatic rhetoric is a paradigm of transforming the ambiguity of language into a strategic resource.

questions.q_zh: 外交语言中“高度关注“和“保留采取措施的权利“分别暗示什么？
questions.q_en: What do 'high concern' and 'reserving the right to take measures' respectively imply in diplomatic language?
questions.answer: ”高度关注“已经包含严肃的警告意味，“保留进一步采取措施的权利“暗示着实质性反制行动的可能性。

questions.q_zh: 外交辞令的模糊性为什么被认为是一种战略资源？
questions.q_en: Why is the ambiguity of diplomatic rhetoric considered a strategic resource?
questions.answer: 因为它为各方在紧张局势中保留了回旋余地，避免了因言辞过于刚性而导致外交僵局。

passages.title: The Philosophical Dimensions of Chinese Calligraphy
passages.text_zh: 中国书法绝非单纯的书写技艺，而是一门融合了哲学思辨与审美创造的综合性艺术。在书法的笔墨运行中，蕴含着中国哲学最为核心的范畴：阴与阳的辩证统一体现于笔画的粗细、墨色的浓淡之间；虚与实的相互映衬彰显于留白与着墨的空间布局之中；动与静的和谐共生则贯穿于行笔的疾徐与收放之间。王羲之《兰亭集序》之所以被奉为“天下第一行书“，不仅因其笔法精湛，更因整幅作品流露出的那种恰到好处的自然天成之美——既非刻意经营，亦非放任自流，而是达到了“从心所欲不逾矩“的至高境界。宋代书论家将这一理念概括为“意在笔先“，即书写之前须有完整的精神构想。然而，真正的书法大家又强调“意到笔随“的即兴创造，让笔墨在精神引导下自由流动。这种对立统一的辩证关系，恰恰是中国哲学“天人合一“理念在艺术领域的精妙投射。
passages.text_pinyin: Zhōngguó shūfǎ juéfēi dānchún de shūxiě jìyì, ér shì yī mén rónghé le zhéxué sībiàn yǔ shěnměi chuàngzào de zōnghéxìng yìshù. Zài shūfǎ de bǐmò yùnxíng zhōng, yùnhán zhe Zhōngguó zhéxué zuìwéi héxīn de fànchóu: yīn yǔ yáng de biànzhèng tǒngyī tǐxiàn yú bǐhuà de cūxì, mòsè de nóngdàn zhījiān; xū yǔ shí de xiānghù yìngchèn zhāngxiǎn yú liúbái yǔ zhuómò de kōngjiān bùjú zhī zhōng; dòng yǔ jìng de héxié gòngshēng zé guànchuān yú xíngbǐ de jíxú yǔ shōufàng zhījiān. Wáng Xīzhī 'Lántíng Jí Xù' zhī suǒyǐ bèi fèng wéi 'tiānxià dì yī xíngshū', bùjǐn yīn qí bǐfǎ jīngzhàn, gèng yīn zhěng fú zuòpǐn liúlù chū de nà zhǒng qiàdàohǎochù de zìrán tiānchéng zhī měi——jì fēi kèyì jīngyíng, yì fēi fàngrèn zìliú, ér shì dádào le 'cóng xīn suǒ yù bù yú jǔ' de zhìgāo jìngjiè. Sòng dài shūlùn jiā jiāng zhè yī lǐniàn gàikuò wéi 'yì zài bǐ xiān', jí shūxiě zhī qián xū yǒu wánzhěng de jīngshén gòuxiǎng. Rán'ér, zhēnzhèng de shūfǎ dàjiā yòu qiángdiào 'yì dào bǐ suí' de jíxìng chuàngzào, ràng bǐmò zài jīngshén yǐndǎo xià zìyóu liúdòng. Zhè zhǒng duìlì tǒngyī de biànzhèng guānxì, qiàqià shì Zhōngguó zhéxué 'tiānrén héyī' lǐniàn zài yìshù lǐngyù de jīngmiào tóushè.
passages.text_en: Chinese calligraphy is by no means a mere writing technique but rather a comprehensive art form that integrates philosophical speculation with aesthetic creation. Within the movement of brush and ink in calligraphy lie the most fundamental categories of Chinese philosophy: the dialectical unity of yin and yang manifests in the thickness and thinness of strokes and the density and lightness of ink; the mutual complementarity of emptiness and substance is displayed in the spatial layout between blank space and inked areas; the harmonious coexistence of movement and stillness runs through the speed and restraint of brush movement. Wang Xizhi's Preface to the Orchid Pavilion Collection is revered as 'the finest running script under heaven' not only for its masterful brushwork but more for the perfectly natural, effortless beauty emanating from the entire work—neither contrived nor unrestrained, it achieves the supreme realm of 'following the heart's desire without transgressing the rules.' Song dynasty calligraphy theorists summarized this concept as 'intention before the brush,' meaning one must have a complete spiritual conception before writing. However, true calligraphy masters also emphasize the improvisational creation of 'the brush following where intention arrives,' letting ink flow freely under spiritual guidance. This dialectical relationship of unity of opposites is precisely the exquisite projection of the Chinese philosophical concept of 'unity of heaven and humanity' in the artistic domain.

questions.q_zh: 书法中如何体现阴阳辩证统一的哲学思想？
questions.q_en: How does calligraphy embody the philosophical idea of the dialectical unity of yin and yang?
questions.answer: 体现于笔画的粗细、墨色的浓淡、留白与着墨的空间布局、行笔的疾徐与收放之间。

questions.q_zh: ”意在笔先“与“意到笔随“之间的关系是什么？
questions.q_en: What is the relationship between 'intention before the brush' and 'the brush following intention'?
questions.answer: 两者构成对立统一的辩证关系，是中国哲学“天人合一“理念在艺术领域的精妙投射——既需要精神构想，又强调即兴创造。

passages.title: Good Faith Principle in Contract Law
passages.title_zh: 合同法中的诚实信用原则
passages.text_zh: 诚实信用原则作为民法的基本原则之一，在合同法领域具有举足轻重的地位。该原则要求合同当事人在缔约、履行及解除合同的全过程中，应当恪守诚信、善意行事，不得损害对方的合理期待与正当利益。从法理学角度分析，诚实信用原则的功能是多维度的：其一，它是法律规范的补充性渊源，当成文法存在漏洞时，法官可援引该原则进行漏洞填补与利益衡量；其二，它构成了对当事人行使权利的内在限制，禁止权利的滥用与不当行使；其三，它催生了一系列具体的附随义务，如通知、协助、保密、照顾等义务。值得注意的是，诚实信用原则的适用具有高度的弹性与不确定性，这既赋予了司法裁判必要的灵活性，也潜藏着裁判恣意的风险。因此，如何在维护法律确定性的前提下合理运用诚实信用原则，是各国合同法理论与实践中亟待解决的核心课题。唯有通过判例积累与学理阐释的不断深化，方能逐步廓清该原则的适用边界。
passages.text_pinyin: Chéngshí xìnyòng yuánzé zuòwéi mínfǎ de jīběn yuánzé zhī yī, zài hétongfǎ lǐngyù jùyǒu jǔzú qīngzhòng de dìwèi. Gāi yuánzé yāoqiú hétong dāngshìrén zài dìyuē, lǚxíng jí jiěchú hétong de quán guòchéng zhōng, yīngdāng kèshǒu chéngxìn, shànyì xíngshì, bùdé sǔnhài duìfāng de hélǐ qīdài yǔ zhèngdàng lìyì. Cóng fǎlǐxué jiǎodù fēnxī, chéngshí xìnyòng yuánzé de gōngnéng shì duō wéidù de: qí yī, tā shì fǎlǜ guīfàn de bǔchōngxìng yuānyuán, dāng chéngwénfǎ cúnzài lòudòng shí, fǎguān kě yuányǐn gāi yuánzé jìnxíng lòudòng tiánbǔ yǔ lìyì héngliang; qí èr, tā gòuchéng le duì dāngshìrén xíngshǐ quánlì de nèizài xiànzhì, jìnzhǐ quánlì de lànyòng yǔ bùdàng xíngshǐ; qí sān, tā cuīshēng le yī xìliè jùtǐ de fùsuí yìwù, rú tōngzhī, xiézhù, bǎomì, zhàogù děng yìwù. Zhíde zhùyì de shì, chéngshí xìnyòng yuánzé de shìyòng jùyǒu gāodù de tánxìng yǔ bù quèdìngxìng, zhè jì fùyǔ le sīfǎ cáipàn bìyào de línghuóxìng, yě qiáncáng zhe cáipàn zìyì de fēngxiǎn. Yīncǐ, rúhé zài wéihù fǎlǜ quèdìngxìng de qiántí xià hélǐ yùnyòng chéngshí xìnyòng yuánzé, shì gè guó hétongfǎ lǐlùn yǔ shíjiàn zhōng jídài jiějué de héxīn kètí. Wéiyǒu tōngguò pànlì jīlěi yǔ xuélǐ chǎnshì de bùduàn shēnhuà, fāng néng zhúbù kuòqīng gāi yuánzé de shìyòng biānjiè.
passages.text_en: The principle of good faith, as one of the fundamental principles of civil law, holds a position of paramount importance in the field of contract law. This principle requires that contracting parties throughout the entire process of concluding, performing, and terminating contracts shall adhere to honesty, act in good faith, and not damage the other party's reasonable expectations and legitimate interests. From a jurisprudential perspective, the functions of the good faith principle are multidimensional: first, it serves as a supplementary source of legal norms—when gaps exist in written law, judges may invoke this principle to fill gaps and balance interests; second, it constitutes an inherent limitation on parties' exercise of rights, prohibiting abuse and improper exercise of rights; third, it generates a series of specific ancillary obligations, such as notification, assistance, confidentiality, and duty of care. It is worth noting that the application of the good faith principle possesses a high degree of elasticity and uncertainty, which both endows judicial adjudication with necessary flexibility and harbors the risk of arbitrary judgment. Therefore, how to reasonably apply the good faith principle while maintaining legal certainty is a core issue urgently requiring resolution in contract law theory and practice across nations. Only through the continuous deepening of case law accumulation and doctrinal interpretation can the boundaries of this principle's application be gradually clarified.

questions.q_zh: 诚实信用原则在法理学上具有哪三个维度的功能？
questions.q_en: What three-dimensional functions does the good faith principle serve from a jurisprudential perspective?
questions.answer: 一是法律规范的补充性渊源，二是对当事人行使权利的内在限制，三是催生通知、协助、保密、照顾等附随义务。

questions.q_zh: 诚实信用原则的适用面临什么困境？
questions.q_en: What dilemma does the application of the good faith principle face?
questions.answer: 其适用具有高度弹性与不确定性，既赋予司法裁判灵活性，也潜藏裁判恣意的风险，需要在法律确定性与灵活性之间寻求平衡。

questions.q_zh: 作者认为如何廓清诚实信用原则的适用边界？
questions.q_en: How does the author believe the boundaries of the good faith principle's application can be clarified?
questions.answer: 通过判例积累与学理阐释的不断深化，逐步廓清该原则的适用边界。

passages.title: Globalization and Cultural Identity
passages.text_zh: 全球化浪潮对各民族文化认同的冲击与重塑，已成为当代文化研究中最具紧迫性的议题之一。一方面，信息技术的飞速发展使文化传播突破了地理疆界的限制，不同文明之间的交流与对话达到了前所未有的广度与深度；另一方面，强势文化对弱势文化的渗透与同化亦引发了广泛的忧虑——地方性知识体系的消逝、传统价值观念的瓦解、语言多样性的急剧衰减，都被视为文化全球化的负面后果。然而，将全球化简单等同于文化同质化的论断并不完全准确。实际上，全球化进程中也涌现出了强劲的文化本土化趋势：各民族在接受外来文化元素的同时，往往会将其纳入自身的文化框架中进行创造性的转化与重构。这种“全球在地化“的文化实践表明，文化认同并非一成不变的本质性存在，而是在持续的跨文化互动中不断协商与重塑的动态过程。关键在于，各民族能否在开放包容的心态下保持文化自觉，在吸收外来营养的同时守护自身文化传统的核心价值。
passages.text_pinyin: Quánqiúhuà lángcháo duì gè mínzú wénhuà rèntóng de chōngjī yǔ chóngsuò, yǐ chéngwéi dāngdài wénhuà yánjiū zhōng zuì jù jǐnpòxìng de yìtí zhī yī. Yī fāngmiàn, xìnxī jìshù de fēisù fāzhǎn shǐ wénhuà chuánbō tūpò le dìlǐ jiāngjiè de xiànzhì, bùtóng wénmíng zhījiān de jiāoliú yǔ duìhuà dádào le qiánsuǒwèiyǒu de guǎngdù yǔ shēndù; lìng yī fāngmiàn, qiángshì wénhuà duì ruòshì wénhuà de shèntòu yǔ tónghuà yì yǐnfā le guǎngfàn de yōulǜ——dìfāngxìng zhīshi tǐxì de xiāoshì, chuántǒng jiàzhí guānniàn de wǎjiě, yǔyán duōyàngxìng de jíjù shuāijiǎn, dōu bèi shìwéi wénhuà quánqiúhuà de fùmiàn hòuguǒ. Rán'ér, jiāng quánqiúhuà jiǎndān děngtóng yú wénhuà tóngzhìhuà de lùnduàn bìng bù wánquán zhǔnquè. Shíjì shàng, quánqiúhuà jìnchéng zhōng yě yǒngxiàn chū le qiángjìng de wénhuà běntǔhuà qūshì: gè mínzú zài jiēshòu wàilái wénhuà yuánsù de tóngshí, wǎngwǎng huì jiāng qí nàrù zìshēn de wénhuà kuàngjià zhōng jìnxíng chuàngzàoxìng de zhuǎnhuà yǔ chónggòu. Zhè zhǒng 'quánqiú zàidìhuà' de wénhuà shíjiàn biǎomíng, wénhuà rèntóng bìngfēi yīchéngbùbiàn de běnzhìxìng cúnzài, ér shì zài chíxù de kuà wénhuà hùdòng zhōng bùduàn xiéshāng yǔ chóngsuò de dòngtài guòchéng. Guānjiàn zàiyú, gè mínzú néng fǒu zài kāifàng bāoróng de xīntài xià bǎochí wénhuà zìjué, zài xīshōu wàilái yíngyǎng de tóngshí shǒuhù zìshēn wénhuà chuántǒng de héxīn jiàzhí.
passages.text_en: The impact and reshaping of globalization on the cultural identity of various ethnic groups has become one of the most urgent topics in contemporary cultural studies. On one hand, the rapid development of information technology has enabled cultural dissemination to break through geographical boundaries, with exchange and dialogue between different civilizations reaching unprecedented breadth and depth; on the other hand, the penetration and assimilation of weaker cultures by dominant ones has also provoked widespread concern—the disappearance of local knowledge systems, the disintegration of traditional values, and the sharp decline of linguistic diversity are all viewed as negative consequences of cultural globalization. However, the assertion that simply equates globalization with cultural homogenization is not entirely accurate. In reality, the process of globalization has also given rise to a strong trend of cultural localization: while accepting foreign cultural elements, various ethnic groups often incorporate them into their own cultural frameworks for creative transformation and reconstruction.
